```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - فاتورة #{{ sale.sale_number }}</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Kufi+Arabic:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Noto Kufi Arabic', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b7355 0%, #c9a961 100%);
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 9px;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-start;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size or 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation or 'portrait' }};
      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .invoice {
      {% if settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
        width: 100%;
        max-height: {{ '200mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '138mm' }};
      {% elif settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
        width: 100%;
        max-height: {{ '269mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '206mm' }};
      {% else %}
        width: 100%;
        max-height: {{ '287mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '200mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }};
      border-radius: 5px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
    }
    .header::before {
      content: '☪';
      position: absolute;
      top: 5px;
      right: 15px;
      font-size: 30px;
      opacity: 0.2;
    }
    .logo { height: 40px; background: white; padding: 5px; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .company-name { 
      font-size: 16px; 
      font-weight: 700; 
      margin-bottom: 3px;
      text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .company-info { font-size: 8px; opacity: 0.95; line-height: 1.4; }
    .title-section {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
    }
    .invoice-title {
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }};
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .invoice-number {
      font-size: 9px;
      color: #666;
    }
    .content {
      padding: 10px;
    }
    .info-boxes {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .info-box {
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fff 0%, #f8f9fa 100%);
      border: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
      border-radius: 5px;
      padding: 6px;
    }
    .info-box h3 {
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }};
      font-size: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
      padding-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .info-box p {
      margin: 2px 0;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 8px 0;
      border: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    thead {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%);
      color: white;
    }
    th {
      padding: 5px 4px;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    td {
      padding: 4px;
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    }
    tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f8f9fa; }
    .totals {
      margin-top: 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fff 0%, #f8f9fa 100%);
      border: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 8px;
      width: 400px;
      margin-right: 0;
      margin-left: auto;
    }
    .total-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 5px 0;
      font-size: 9px;
      border-bottom: 1px dashed #dee2e6;
    }
    .total-row.final {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      margin-top: 10px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
      border-radius: 5px;
      border: none;
    }
    .payments-table {
      margin-top: 10px;
      border: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .payments-header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 8px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .payment-row {
      padding: 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
      background: white;
    }
    .payment-row:nth-child(even) { background: #f8f9fa; }
    .cheque-details {
      background: #fff3cd;
      border: 1px solid #ffc107;
      border-radius: 5px;
      padding: 8px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .footer {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 10px;
      border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .signature-section {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      margin-top: 20px;
      padding-top: 20px;
      border-top: 2px dashed {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }};
    }
    .signature-box {
      text-align: center;
      width: 150px;
    }
    .signature-line {
      border-top: 2px solid #333;
      margin-top: 40px;
      padding-top: 8px;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  
    @media print {
      .invoice {
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border: none !important;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="invoice-print gulf-invoice">
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#c9a961' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#8b7355' }} 100%); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 9px; cursor: pointer;">
      🖨️ طباعة الفاتورة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="invoice">
    <div class="header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
      <div class="company-info">
        <div>{{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address }}</div>
        <div>📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone }} {% if settings and settings.phone_2 and settings.phone_2 != 'None' %}| {{ settings.phone_2 }}{% endif %}</div>
        <div>📧 {{ (settings.email if settings and settings.email else none) or tenant_email or company_email }} {% if settings and settings.website and settings.website != 'None' %}| 🌐 {{ settings.website }}{% endif %}</div>
        {% if settings and settings.tax_number and settings.tax_number != 'None' %}<div style="margin-top: 5px;">الرقم الضريبي: {{ settings.tax_number }}</div>{% endif %}
        {% if print_branch %}
        <div>🏢 الفرع: {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}</div>
        {% if print_branch.address %}
        <div>📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ print_branch.address }}</div>
        {% endif %}
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '🧾 فـاتـورة بـيـع' %}
    {% set doc_number = sale.sale_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <div class="content">
      <div class="info-boxes">
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>🏢 بيانات العميل</h3>
          <p><strong>الاسم:</strong> {{ sale.customer.name }}</p>
          {% if sale.customer.phone %}<p><strong>الهاتف:</strong> {{ sale.customer.phone }}</p>{% endif %}
          {% if sale.customer.email %}<p><strong>البريد:</strong> {{ sale.customer.email }}</p>{% endif %}
        </div>
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>📅 بيانات الفاتورة</h3>
          <p><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ sale.sale_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</p>
          <p><strong>الوقت:</strong> {{ sale.sale_date.strftime('%H:%M') }}</p>
          <p><strong>المستخدم:</strong> {{ print_user_name or (sale.seller.full_name if sale.seller else '-') }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th style="width: 5%;">#</th>
            <th style="width: 40%;">المنتج</th>
            <th style="width: 13%;">الكمية</th>
            <th style="width: 14%;">السعر</th>
            <th style="width: 13%;">الخصم%</th>
            <th style="width: 15%;">الإجمالي</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for line in sale.lines %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
            <td style="text-align: right;"><strong>{{ line.product.name if line.product else '-' }}</strong></td>
            <td>{{ line.quantity }}</td>
            <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.unit_price) }}</td>
            <td>{{ line.discount_percent if line.discount_percent else '-' }}</td>
            <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.line_total) }}</strong></td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <div class="totals">
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>المجموع الفرعي:</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.subtotal) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% if sale.discount_amount > 0 %}
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>الخصم:</span>
          <strong style="color: #dc3545;">- {{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.discount_amount) }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        {% if sale.shipping_cost > 0 %}
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>الشحن:</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.shipping_cost) }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        {% if sale.tax_amount > 0 %}
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>الضريبة ({{ sale.tax_rate }}%):</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.tax_amount) }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        <div class="total-row final">
          <span>⭐ الإجمالي النهائي ⭐</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.total_amount) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}
      </div>

      <!-- قسم الدفعات -->
      {% if sale.payments %}
      <div class="payments-table">
        <div class="payments-header">💰 الدفعات المسد
```

### File: templates\invoices\minimal.html

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>شركة أزاد للأنظمة الذكية - فاتورة مبيعات #{{ sale.sale_number }}</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Cairo', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      background: #34495e;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #2c3e50;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-start;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size or 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation or 'portrait' }};
      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .invoice {
      {% if settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '148mm' }};
      {% elif settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '279mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '216mm' }};
      {% else %}
        width: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '297mm' }};
        height: {{ '297mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '210mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      padding: 8px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      overflow: auto;
    }
    .header {
      border-bottom: 1px solid {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};
      padding-bottom: 15px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .header-left {
      flex: 1;
    }
    .header-right {
      text-align: left;
    }
    .company-name { 
      font-size: 20px; 
      font-weight: 700; 
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }}; 
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .company-info { font-size: 9px; color: #7f8c8d; line-height: 1.6; }
    .invoice-title {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: #95a5a6;
      text-align: left;
    }
    .invoice-number {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};
      text-align: left;
    }
    .info-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .info-item {
      padding: 10px;
      background: #ecf0f1;
      border-left: 3px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#3498db' }};
    }
    .info-item label { 
      font-size: 9px; 
      color: #7f8c8d; 
      text-transform: uppercase; 
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .info-item value { 
      font-size: 9px; 
      font-weight: 600; 
      color: #2c3e50;
    }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 15px 0;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    thead {
      background: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};
      color: white;
    }
    th {
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: right;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    td {
      padding: 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ecf0f1;
    }
    tbody tr:hover { background: #f8f9fa; }
    .totals {
      margin-top: 10px;
      width: 350px;
      margin-right: 0;
      margin-left: auto;
    }
    .total-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .total-row.final {
      background: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      margin-top: 5px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .payments-section {
      margin-top: 10px;
      padding: 8px;
      background: #f8f9fa;
      border-left: 4px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#3498db' }};
    }
    .payments-section h4 {
      font-size: 9px;
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .payment-item {
      padding: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .cheque-box {
      background: #fff3cd;
      border: 1px solid #ffc107;
      border-radius: 3px;
      padding: 5px 8px;
      margin-top: 5px;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    .footer {
      margin-top: 20px;
      padding-top: 15px;
      border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 9px;
      color: #7f8c8d;
    }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  
    @media print {
      .invoice {
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border: none !important;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="invoice-print minimal-invoice">
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }}; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 25px; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer;">
      طباعة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="invoice">
    <div class="header">
      <div class="header-left">
        {% with logo_style='height: 40px; margin-bottom: 8px;' %}{% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}{% endwith %}
        <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
        <div class="company-info">
          {{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address }}<br>
          📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone }} | 📧 {{ (settings.email if settings and settings.email else none) or tenant_email or company_email }}<br>
          {% if settings and settings.website and settings.website != 'None' %}🌐 {{ settings.website }}<br>{% endif %}
          {% if settings and settings.tax_number and settings.tax_number != 'None' %}ض.ر: {{ settings.tax_number }}{% endif %}
          {% if print_branch %}
          <br>🏢 الفرع: {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}
          {% if print_branch.address %}<br>📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ print_branch.address }}{% endif %}
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="header-right">
        <div class="invoice-title">INVOICE</div>
        <div class="invoice-number">{{ sale.sale_number }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '🧾 فاتورة بيع' %}
    {% set doc_number = sale.sale_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <div class="info-grid">
      <div class="info-item">
        <label>العميل</label>
        <value><strong>{{ sale.customer.name }}</strong></value>
        {% if sale.customer.phone %}<br><small style="font-size: 9px;">{{ sale.customer.phone }}</small>{% endif %}
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <label>التاريخ / المستخدم</label>
        <value>{{ sale.sale_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</value>
        <br><small style="font-size: 9px;">{{ print_user_name or (sale.seller.full_name if sale.seller else '-') }}</small>
      </div>
    </div>

    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width: 5%;">#</th>
          <th style="width: 40%;">المنتج</th>
          <th style="width: 15%;">الكمية</th>
          <th style="width: 15%;">السعر</th>
          <th style="width: 10%;">خصم</th>
          <th style="width: 15%;">الإجمالي</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for line in sale.lines %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
          <td><strong>{{ line.product.name if line.product else '-' }}</strong></td>
          <td>{{ line.quantity }}</td>
          <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.unit_price) }}</td>
          <td>{{ line.discount_percent if line.discount_percent else '-' }}</td>
          <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.line_total) }}</strong></td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="totals">
      <div class="total-row">
        <span>المجموع:</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.subtotal) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% if sale.discount_amount > 0 %}
      <div class="total-row">
        <span>الخصم:</span>
        <strong>- {{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.discount_amount) }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      {% if sale.tax_amount > 0 %}
      <div class="total-row">
        <span>الضريبة:</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.tax_amount) }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      <div class="total-row final">
        <span>الإجمالي:</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.total_amount) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}
    </div>

    <!-- قسم الدفعات -->
    {% if sale.payments %}
    <div class="payments-section">
      <h4>💳 الدفعات</h4>
      {% for payment in sale.payments %}
      <div class="payment-item">
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
          <div>
            <strong>{{ payment.payment_number }}</strong> | 
            {{ payment.payment_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}
          </div>
          <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #28a745;">
            {{ "{:,.2f}".format(payment.amount_aed) }} AED
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top: 3px;">
          طريقة الدفع: 
          {% if payment.payment_method == 'cash' %}💵 نقدي
          {% elif payment.payment_method == 'card' %}💳 بطاقة
          {% elif payment.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}🏦 تحويل
          {% elif payment.payment_method == 'cheque' %}📝 شيك
          {% else %}💰 محفظة{% endif %}
        </div>
        {% if payment.payment_method == 'cheque' and payment.cheque_number %}
        <div class="cheque-box">
          <strong>📝 رقم الشيك:</strong> {{ payment.cheque_number }} | 
          <strong>📅 الاستحقاق:</strong> {{ payment.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if payment.cheque_date else '-' }} | 
          <strong>🏦 البنك:</strong> {{ payment.bank_name or '-' }}
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    <div class="footer">
      <!-- Bank Info -->
      {% if settings and ((settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None') or (settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None') or (settings.swift_code and settings.swift_code != 'None')) %}
      <div style="margin-bottom: 8px; padding: 10px; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px; border-left: 3px solid {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }};">
        <p style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 8px; color: {{ settings.header_color or '#2c3e50' }}; margin-bottom: 5px;">🏦 Bank Transfer Details</p>
        <div style="font-size: 9px; line-height: 1.6;">
          {% if settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None' %}<p style="margin: 2px 0;"><strong>Bank:</strong> {{ settings.bank_name }}</p>{% endif %}
          {% if settings.bank_account_number %}<p style="margin: 2px 0;"><strong>Account:</strong> {{ settings.bank_account_number }}</p>{% endif %}
          {% if settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None' %}<p style="margin: 2px 0;"><strong>IBAN:</strong> {{ settings.iban }}</p>{% endif %}


[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="{{ current_language }}" dir="{{ 'rtl' if is_rtl else 'ltr' }}">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - فاتورة #{{ sale.sale_number }}</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Tajawal', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      background: #95a5a6;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 9px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-start;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size if settings else 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation if settings else 'portrait' }};
      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .invoice {
      {% if settings and settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '148mm' }};
      {% elif settings and settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '279mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '216mm' }};
      {% else %}
        width: {{ '210mm' if (not settings or settings.orientation == 'portrait') else '297mm' }};
        height: {{ '297mm' if (not settings or settings.orientation == 'portrait') else '210mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      border-radius: 0;
      overflow: auto;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
      position: relative;
    }
    .header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 15px 20px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .logo { height: 50px; background: white; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .company-name { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .company-info { font-size: 8px; opacity: 0.95; }
    .invoice-title {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 12px 15px;
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }};
    }
    .invoice-title h2 { color: {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }}; font-size: 16px; margin: 0; }
    .invoice-number { color: {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }}; font-size: 8px; margin-top: 5px; }
    .branch-banner {
      margin-top: 8px;
      display: inline-block;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
      color: #2c3e50;
      border: 1px dashed rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 4px 10px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .content { padding: 15px 20px; }
    .info-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .info-box {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 10px 12px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      border-right: 3px solid {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }};
    }
    .info-box h3 { color: {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }}; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 9px; }
    .info-box p { margin: 4px 0; color: #555; font-size: 8px; }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 10px 0;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    thead {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }} 100%);
      color: white;
    }
    th, td {
      padding: 6px 8px;
      text-align: right;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    }
    th { font-size: 9px; }
    tbody tr:hover { background: #f8f9fa; }
    .total-section {
      margin-top: 12px;
      text-align: left;
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 12px 15px;
      border-radius: 6px;
    }
    .total-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 5px 0;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .total-row.final {
      border-top: 2px solid {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }};
      padding-top: 8px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }};
    }
    .footer {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 12px 15px;
      text-align: center;
      border-top: 2px solid {{ settings.accent_color if settings else '#764ba2' }};
      color: #666;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .qr-code { margin: 10px 0; }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; margin: 0; background: white; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
      .invoice { box-shadow: none; border: none; }
    }
  
    @media print {
      .invoice {
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border: none !important;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="invoice-print modern-invoice">
  <div class="invoice">
    <div class="header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
      <div class="company-info">
        <div>{{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address }}</div>
        <div>📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone }} | 📧 {{ (settings.email if settings and settings.email else none) or tenant_email or company_email }}</div>
        {% if settings and settings.tax_number and settings.tax_number != 'None' %}<div>الرقم الضريبي: {{ settings.tax_number }}</div>{% endif %}
        {% if print_branch %}
        <div>🏢 الفرع: {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}</div>
        {% if print_branch.address %}
        <div>📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ print_branch.address }}</div>
        {% endif %}
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '🧾 فاتورة بيع' %}
    {% set doc_number = sale.sale_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <div class="content">
      <div class="info-grid">
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>🏢 بيانات الزبون</h3>
          <p><strong>الاسم:</strong> {{ sale.customer.name }}</p>
          <p><strong>الهاتف:</strong> {{ sale.customer.phone }}</p>
          <p><strong>العنوان:</strong> {{ sale.customer.address }}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>📅 بيانات الفاتورة</h3>
          <p><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ sale.sale_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</p>
          <p><strong>الحالة:</strong> <span style="color: #28a745">✓ مكتملة</span></p>
          <p><strong>المستخدم:</strong> {{ print_user_name or (sale.seller.full_name if sale.seller else '-') }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th>
            <th>المنتج</th>
            <th>{{ t('Quantity') }}</th>
            <th>{{ t('Price') }}</th>
            <th>{{ t('Total') }}</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for line in sale.lines %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
            <td>{{ line.product.name if line.product else '-' }}</td>
            <td>{{ "{:,.3f}".format(line.quantity) }}</td>
            <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.unit_price) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
            <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.line_total) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <div class="total-section">
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>الإجمالي الفرعي:</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.subtotal) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% if sale.tax_amount > 0 %}
        <div class="total-row">
          <span>الضريبة ({{ sale.tax_rate }}%):</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.tax_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        <div class="total-row final">
          <span>الإجمالي النهائي:</span>
          <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.total_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- قسم الدفعات -->
      {% if sale.payments %}
      <div style="margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc;">
        <h4 style="color: {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }}; font-size: 9px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 700;">💰 الدفعات</h4>
        <table style="font-size: 9px;">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style="padding: 5px; font-size: 8px;">رقم الدفعة</th>
              <th style="padding: 5px; font-size: 8px;">التاريخ</th>
              <th style="padding: 5px; font-size: 8px;">المبلغ</th>
              <th style="padding: 5px; font-size: 8px;">الطريقة</th>
              <th style="padding: 5px; font-size: 8px;">التفاصيل</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {% for payment in sale.payments %}
            <tr>
              <td style="padding: 4px;">{{ payment.payment_number }}</td>
              <td style="padding: 4px;">{{ payment.payment_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
              <td style="padding: 4px; font-weight: bold; color: #28a745;">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(payment.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
              <td style="padding: 4px;">
                {% if payment.payment_method == 'cash' %}نقدي
                {% elif payment.payment_method == 'card' %}بطاقة
                {% elif payment.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}تحويل
                {% elif payment.payment_method == 'cheque' %}شيك
                {% else %}محفظة{% endif %}
              </td>
              <td style="padding: 4px; font-size: 8px;">
                {% if payment.payment_method == 'cheque' and payment.cheque_number %}
                  <div style="background: #fff3cd; padding: 3px 5px; border-radius: 3px; border-right: 2px solid #ffc107;">
                    📝 {{ payment.cheque_number }}<br>
                    📅 {{ payment.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if payment.cheque_date else '-' }}<br>
                    🏦 {{ payment.bank_name or '-' }}
                  </div>
                {% elif payment.reference_number %}
                  {{ payment.reference_number }}
                {% else %}-{% endif %}
              </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}
    </div>

    <div class="footer">
      <p>{{ settings.payment_terms_ar if settings and settings.payment_terms_ar else 'الدفع نقداً أو بالتحويل البنكي' }}</p>
      
      <!-- Bank Info Section -->
      {% if settings and ((settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None') or (settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None') or (settings.swift_code and settings.swift_code != 'None')) %}
      <div style="margin-top: 8px; padding: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fa 0%, #e9ecef 100%); border-radius: 5px; border-right: 3px solid {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }};">
        <p style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 9px; color: {{ settings.header_color if settings else '#667eea' }}; margin-bottom: 5px;">🏦 معلومات ا

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

Modified: 06/02/2026 07:35:19

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>فاتورة #{{ sale.sale_number }}</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
      padding: 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
      background: white;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size if settings else 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation if settings else 'portrait' }};
      margin: 2mm;
    }
    .invoice {
      max-width: 100%;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
    }
    .header {
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .branch-name {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: #555;
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .logo { 
      height: 40px; 
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .company-name { 
      font-size: 9px; 
      font-weight: bold; 
      margin: 5px 0;
    }
    .company-info { 
      font-size: 8px; 
      color: #555; 
      line-height: 1.4;
    }
    .title {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: bold;
      margin: 15px 0;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .info-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin: 8px 0;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    th, td {
      border: 1px solid #000;
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: right;
    }
    th {
      background: #f0f0f0;
      font-weight: bold;
    }
    .totals {
      margin-top: 8px;
      text-align: left;
      margin-left: auto;
      width: 250px;
    }
    .total-line {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 5px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    }
    .total-final {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: bold;
      border-top: 2px solid #000;
      border-bottom: 3px double #000;
      padding: 8px 0;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }
    .footer {
      margin-top: 20px;
      padding-top: 15px;
      border-top: 1px solid #000;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #555;
    }
    .bank-info {
      background: #f9f9f9;
      border: 1px solid #ccc;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 10px 0;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .signature {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      margin-top: 40px;
    }
    .sig-box {
      text-align: center;
      width: 150px;
    }
    .sig-line {
      border-top: 1px solid #000;
      margin-top: 40px;
      padding-top: 5px;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    @media print {
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  
    @media print {
      .invoice {
        width: 100% !important;
        max-width: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border: none !important;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0 !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="invoice-print">
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 10px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: #000; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 20px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 3px;">
      طباعة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="invoice">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
      <div class="company-info">
        {{ settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else 'العنوان' }}<br>
        📞 {{ settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else '---' }}
        {% if settings and settings.email %} • 📧 {{ settings.email }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% if print_branch or sale.branch %}
      {% set header_branch = print_branch or sale.branch %}
      <div class="branch-name">فرع: {{ header_branch.name }}{% if header_branch.code %} ({{ header_branch.code }}){% endif %}</div>
      {% if header_branch.address %}
      <div class="company-info">📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ header_branch.address }}</div>
      {% endif %}
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '🧾 فاتورة' %}
    {% set doc_number = sale.sale_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <!-- Basic Info -->
    <div class="info-row">
      <div><strong>رقم الفاتورة:</strong> {{ sale.sale_number }}</div>
      <div><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ sale.sale_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-row">
      <div><strong>العميل:</strong> {{ sale.customer.name if sale.customer else '-' }}</div>
      <div><strong>المستخدم:</strong> {{ print_user_name or (sale.seller.full_name if sale.seller else '-') }}</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Items Table -->
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width: 5%;">#</th>
          <th style="width: 45%;">المنتج</th>
          <th style="width: 15%;">الكمية</th>
          <th style="width: 15%;">السعر</th>
          <th style="width: 20%;">المجموع</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for line in sale.lines %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
          <td>{{ line.product.name if line.product else '-' }}</td>
          <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.quantity) }}</td>
          <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.unit_price) }}</td>
          <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(line.line_total) }}</strong></td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <!-- Totals -->
    <div class="totals">
      <div class="total-line">
        <span>المجموع:</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.subtotal) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% if sale.tax_amount > 0 %}
      <div class="total-line">
        <span>الضريبة ({{ sale.tax_rate }}%):</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.tax_amount) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      <div class="total-line total-final">
        <span>الإجمالي:</span>
        <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.total_amount) }} {{ sale.currency }}</strong>
      </div>
      {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}
    </div>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="footer">
      <!-- Bank Info -->
      {% if settings and (settings.bank_name or settings.iban) %}
      <div class="bank-info">
        <strong>معلومات التحويل:</strong><br>
        {% if settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None' %}البنك: {{ settings.bank_name }} • {% endif %}
        {% if settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None' %}IBAN: {{ settings.iban }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <!-- Business Info -->
      {% if settings and (settings.tax_number or settings.commercial_register) %}
      <div style="font-size: 9px; margin: 5px 0;">
        {% if settings.tax_number %}ض.ر: {{ settings.tax_number }}{% endif %}
        {% if settings.tax_number and settings.commercial_register %} • {% endif %}
        {% if settings.commercial_register and settings.commercial_register != 'None' %}س.ت: {{ settings.commercial_register }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <!-- Default Note -->
      {% if settings and settings.default_invoice_note_ar and settings.default_invoice_note_ar != 'None' %}
      <div style="margin: 10px 0; padding: 5px; border: 1px dashed #999; font-size: 8px;">
        {{ settings.default_invoice_note_ar }}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <div style="margin-top: 10px;">شكراً لتعاملكم معنا</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Signature -->
    <div class="signature">
      <div class="sig-box">
        <div class="sig-line">البائع</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sig-box">
        <div class="sig-line">العميل</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Watermark -->
    {% if settings and settings.enable_watermark %}
      {% if settings.watermark_image_path %}
        <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); opacity: 0.02; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none;">
          <img src="{{ url_for('static', filename=settings.watermark_image_path) }}" alt="Watermark" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
      {% elif settings.watermark_text %}
        <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-45deg); font-size: 100px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.02); font-weight: bold; z-index: -1;">
          {{ settings.watermark_text }}
        </div>
      {% endif %}
    {% endif %}
  </div>
</body>
</html>


```

### File: templates\ledger\account_ledger.html

Size: 4150 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - دفتر حساب {{ account.name }}{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}دفتر حساب: {{ account.code }} - {{ account.name }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <form method="get" class="form-inline d-inline">
      <label class="mr-2">الفرع:</label>
      <select name="branch_id" class="form-control mr-2" onchange="this.form.submit()" style="min-width: 140px;">
        <option value="">كل الفروع</option>
        {% for b in branches or [] %}
        <option value="{{ b.id }}" {{ 'selected' if selected_branch == b.id else '' }}>{{ b.name }} ({{ b.code }})</option>
        {% endfor %}
      </select>
      <input type="hidden" name="date_from" value="{{ date_from or '' }}">
      <input type="hidden" name="date_to" value="{{ date_to or '' }}">
    </form>
    <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-secondary ml-2">
      <i class="fas fa-print mr-2"></i>طباعة
    </button>
    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.index') }}" class="btn btn-info ml-2">العودة</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary">
    <h3 class="card-title text-white">{{ account.code }} - {{ account.name }}</h3>
    <div class="card-tools">
      <span class="badge badge-light">{{ account.type }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>{{ t('Date') }}</th>
          <th>رقم القيد</th>
          <th>{{ t('Description') }}</th>
          <th>المرجع</th>
          <th class="text-danger">مدين</th>
          <th class="text-success">دائن</th>
          <th>{{ t('Balance') }}</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for transaction in transactions %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ transaction.date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
          <td>{{ transaction.entry_number }}</td>
          <td>{{ transaction.description }}</td>
          <td>
            {% if transaction.reference %}
            <a href="#">{{ transaction.reference }}</a>
            {% else %}-{% endif %}
          </td>
          <td class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(transaction.debit) if transaction.debit > 0 else '-' }}</td>
          <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(transaction.credit) if transaction.credit > 0 else '-' }}</td>
          <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(transaction.balance) }}</strong></td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
      <tfoot class="bg-light">
        <tr style="font-weight: 700;">
          <td colspan="4" class="text-center">{{ t('Total') }}</td>
          <td class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(summary.total_debit) }}</td>
          <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(summary.total_credit) }}</td>
          <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(summary.final_balance) }} AED</strong></td>
        </tr>
      </tfoot>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
@media print {
  @page {
    size: A4 {{ 'landscape' if request.args.get('orientation') == 'landscape' else 'portrait' }};
    margin: 15mm;
  }
  /* إخفاء عناصر UI */
  .main-sidebar, .main-header, .main-footer, 
  .content-header, .no-print, button, .btn,
  .breadcrumb, .navbar, .sidebar {
    display: none !important;
  }
  /* تحسين المحتوى للطباعة */
  .content-wrapper {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }
  .card {
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }
  body {
    background: white !important;
  }
  /* تحسين الجداول */
  table {
    page-break-inside: auto;
  }
  tr {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    page-break-after: auto;
  }
  thead {
    display: table-header-group;
  }
  tfoot {
    display: table-footer-group;
  }
}
</style>
{% endblock %}



```

### File: templates\ledger\account_statement.html

Size: 7416 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:45:21

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}كشف الحساب - {{ statement.account.full_name }}{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}كشف الحساب التفصيلي{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.accounts_tree') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>العودة
    </a>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="window.print()">
      <i class="fas fa-print mr-2"></i>طباعة
    </button>
    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.account_statement', id=statement.account.id) }}?export=excel" class="btn btn-success">
      <i class="fas fa-file-excel mr-2"></i>تصدير Excel
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary">
    <h3 class="card-title text-white">
      <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-2"></i>
      كشف حساب: {{ statement.account.full_name }}
    </h3>
    <div class="card-tools">
      <span class="badge badge-light">{{ statement.account.type_ar }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <!-- فلتر التاريخ والفرع (عزل الفروع عند اللزوم) -->
    <form method="get" class="form-inline mb-3 flex-wrap" action="">
      <label class="ml-2 mr-2">الفرع:</label>
      <select name="branch_id" class="form-control mr-3" style="min-width: 140px;">
        <option value="">كل الفروع</option>
        {% for b in branches or [] %}
        <option value="{{ b.id }}" {{ 'selected' if selected_branch == b.id else '' }}>{{ b.name }} ({{ b.code }})</option>
        {% endfor %}
      </select>
      <label class="ml-2 mr-2">من تاريخ:</label>
      <input type="date" name="date_from" class="form-control mr-3" value="{{ date_from or '' }}">
      <label class="ml-2 mr-2">إلى تاريخ:</label>
      <input type="date" name="date_to" class="form-control mr-3" value="{{ date_to or '' }}">
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
        <i class="fas fa-filter mr-2"></i>فلتر
      </button>
      {% if date_from or date_to or selected_branch %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.account_statement', id=statement.account.id) }}" class="btn btn-secondary mr-2">
        <i class="fas fa-times mr-2"></i>إلغاء الفلتر
      </a>
      {% endif %}
    </form>

    <!-- معلومات الحساب -->
    <div class="row mb-3">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="info-box bg-light">
          <span class="info-box-icon bg-primary"><i class="fas fa-calculator"></i></span>
          <div class="info-box-content">
            <span class="info-box-text">الرصيد الافتتاحي</span>
            <span class="info-box-number">
              {{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.opening_balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="info-box bg-light">
          <span class="info-box-icon bg-success"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i></span>
          <div class="info-box-content">
            <span class="info-box-text">إجمالي المدين</span>
            <span class="info-box-number text-success">
              {{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_debit) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="info-box bg-light">
          <span class="info-box-icon bg-danger"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i></span>
          <div class="info-box-content">
            <span class="info-box-text">إجمالي الدائن</span>
            <span class="info-box-number text-danger">
              {{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_credit) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- جدول المعاملات -->
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table class="table table-bordered table-striped table-hover">
        <thead class="bg-light">
          <tr>
            <th width="100">التاريخ</th>
            <th width="120">رقم القيد</th>
            <th width="100">النوع</th>
            <th>البيان</th>
            <th width="100">المرجع</th>
            <th width="120" class="text-center">مدين</th>
            <th width="120" class="text-center">دائن</th>
            <th width="120" class="text-center">الرصيد</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% if statement.opening_balance != 0 %}
          <tr class="table-info">
            <td colspan="7" class="text-center"><strong>الرصيد الافتتاحي</strong></td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.opening_balance) }}</strong>
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% endif %}
          
          {% for trans in statement.transactions %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ trans.date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
            <td>
              <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.view_entry', id=trans.entry_number.split('-')[1]) }}" class="badge badge-primary">
                {{ trans.entry_number }}
              </a>
            </td>
            <td><small class="badge badge-secondary">{{ trans.entry_type }}</small></td>
            <td>{{ trans.description }}</td>
            <td><small>{{ trans.reference }}</small></td>
            <td class="text-center text-success">
              {% if trans.debit > 0 %}{{ "{:,.2f}".format(trans.debit) }}{% else %}-{% endif %}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center text-danger">
              {% if trans.credit > 0 %}{{ "{:,.2f}".format(trans.credit) }}{% else %}-{% endif %}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <strong class="{{ 'text-success' if trans.balance > 0 else 'text-danger' if trans.balance < 0 else '' }}">
                {{ "{:,.2f}".format(trans.balance) }}
              </strong>
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
        <tfoot class="bg-light">
          <tr>
            <th colspan="5" class="text-left">الإجمالي:</th>
            <th class="text-center text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_debit) }}</th>
            <th class="text-center text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_credit) }}</th>
            <th class="text-center">
              <strong class="{{ 'text-success' if statement.closing_balance > 0 else 'text-danger' if statement.closing_balance < 0 else '' }}">
                {{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.closing_balance) }}
              </strong>
            </th>
          </tr>
        </tfoot>
      </table>
    </div>

    {% if not statement.transactions %}
    <div class="alert alert-info text-center">
      <i class="fas fa-info-circle mr-2"></i>
      لا توجد حركات على هذا الحساب في الفترة المحددة
    </div>
    {% endif %}
  </div>
</div>

<style>
@media print {
  .btn, .form-inline, .card-tools {
    display: none !important;
  }
  .card {
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }
}
</style>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\ledger\accounts_tree.html

Size: 4075 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:53:59

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}شجرة الحسابات - Chart of Accounts{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}شجرة الحسابات{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.index') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>العودة
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.manual_entry') }}" class="btn btn-success">
      <i class="fas fa-plus-circle mr-2"></i>قيد يدوي
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary">
    <h3 class="card-title text-white">
      <i class="fas fa-sitemap mr-2"></i>شجرة الحسابات المتكاملة
    </h3>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <div class="row">
      {% for root_account in accounts_tree %}
      <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
        <div class="card border-{{ 'success' if root_account.type == 'asset' else ('danger' if root_account.type == 'liability' else ('primary' if root_account.type == 'revenue' else 'warning')) }}">
          <div class="card-header bg-{{ 'success' if root_account.type == 'asset' else ('danger' if root_account.type == 'liability' else ('primary' if root_account.type == 'revenue' else 'warning')) }} text-white">
            <h5 class="mb-0">
              <i class="fas fa-{{ 'coins' if root_account.type == 'asset' else ('file-invoice-dollar' if root_account.type == 'liability' else ('chart-line' if root_account.type == 'revenue' else 'receipt')) }} mr-2"></i>
              {{ root_account.code }} - {{ root_account.name_ar }}
            </h5>
            <small>{{ root_account.type_ar }}</small>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body p-0">
            <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
              {% for level1 in root_account.children %}
              <li class="list-group-item">
                <strong>
                  {% if level1.is_header %}
                  <i class="fas fa-folder text-warning mr-1"></i>
                  {% else %}
                  <i class="fas fa-file text-info mr-1"></i>
                  {% endif %}
                  {{ level1.code }} - {{ level1.name_ar }}
                </strong>
                {% if not level1.is_header %}
                <span class="badge badge-info float-left">
                  {{ "{:,.2f}".format(level1.balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
                </span>
                <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.account_statement', id=level1.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary float-left mr-2">
                  <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> كشف
                </a>
                {% endif %}
                
                {% if level1.children %}
                <ul class="list-unstyled mt-2 mr-4">
                  {% for level2 in level1.children %}
                  <li class="mb-1">
                    <i class="fas fa-angle-left text-muted mr-1"></i>
                    {{ level2.code }} - {{ level2.name_ar }}
                    {% if not level2.is_header %}
                    <span class="badge badge-secondary float-left">
                      {{ "{:,.2f}".format(level2.balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
                    </span>
                    <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.account_statement', id=level2.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info float-left mr-2">
                      <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                    </a>
                    {% endif %}
                  </li>
                  {% endfor %}
                </ul>
                {% endif %}
              </li>
              {% endfor %}
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.card-body ul {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.list-unstyled li {
  padding: 5px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px dotted #dee2e6;
}
.list-unstyled li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}
</style>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\ledger\advanced\add_advanced_expense.html

Size: 2615 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}إضافة مصروف متقدم{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header"><h3><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> إضافة مصروف متقدم</h3></div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <form method="post" action="">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>التاريخ *</label>
              <input type="date" name="expense_date" class="form-control" required value="{{ today }}">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
             <div class="form-group">
               <label>الفرع *</label>
               <select name="branch_id" class="form-control" required>
                 {% if current_user.is_super_admin() or current_user.is_owner %}
                    <option value="">-- عام --</option>
                    {% for branch in branches %}
                        <option value="{{ branch.id }}">{{ branch.name }}</option>
                    {% endfor %}
                 {% else %}
                    <option value="{{ current_user.branch_id }}" selected>{{ current_user.branch.name if current_user.branch else 'عام' }}</option>
                 {% endif %}
               </select>
             </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الفئة *</label>
              <select name="category_id" class="form-control" required>
                {% for cat in categories %}
                <option value="{{ cat.id }}">{{ cat.name_ar }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>المبلغ *</label>
              <input type="number" name="amount" class="form-control" step="0.01" required>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>البيان</label>
          <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> حفظ</button>
        <a href="{{ url_for('advanced_ledger.advanced_expenses') }}" class="btn btn-secondary"><i class="fas fa-times"></i> إلغاء</a>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\ledger\advanced\add_customs_tax.html

Size: 5256 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}إضافة ضريبة جمركية{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header">
          <h3 class="card-title">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> إضافة ضريبة جمركية
          </h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          {% set form_data = form_data if form_data is defined else request.form %}
          <form method="post" action="">
            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
            
            <div class="row">
              <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>الاسم (EN) *</label>
                  <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control" required value="{{ form_data.get('name', '') }}">
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>الاسم (AR) *</label>
                  <input type="text" name="name_ar" class="form-control" required value="{{ form_data.get('name_ar', '') }}">
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>النسبة % *</label>
                  <input type="number" name="rate" class="form-control" step="0.01" required value="{{ form_data.get('rate', '') }}">
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>نوع الحساب *</label>
                  {% set selected_tax_type = form_data.get('tax_type', 'customs') %}
                  <select name="tax_type" class="form-control" required>
                    <option value="customs" {% if selected_tax_type == 'customs' %}selected{% endif %}>جمارك</option>
                    <option value="vat" {% if selected_tax_type == 'vat' %}selected{% endif %}>ضريبة القيمة المضافة</option>
                    <option value="excise" {% if selected_tax_type == 'excise' %}selected{% endif %}>ضريبة انتقائية</option>
                    <option value="other" {% if selected_tax_type == 'other' %}selected{% endif %}>أخرى</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>الحساب المحاسبي *</label>
                  <select name="gl_account_id" class="form-control" required>
                    <option value="" {% if not form_data.get('gl_account_id') %}selected{% endif %}>بلا</option>
                    {% for account in accounts %}
                    <option value="{{ account.id }}" {% if form_data.get('gl_account_id') and form_data.get('gl_account_id')|int == account.id %}selected{% endif %}>
                      {{ account.code }} - {{ account.name_ar }}
                    </option>
                    {% endfor %}
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="row">
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <div class="form-check mt-4">
                    <input type="checkbox" name="is_percentage" id="is_percentage" class="form-check-input" {% if form_data.get('is_percentage') %}checked{% endif %}>
                    <label class="form-check-label" for="is_percentage">احتساب كنسبة مئوية</label>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>ساري من *</label>
                  <input type="date" name="effective_from" class="form-control" required value="{{ form_data.get('effective_from', '') }}">
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>ساري إلى</label>
                  <input type="date" name="effective_to" class="form-control" value="{{ form_data.get('effective_to', '') }}">
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الوصف</label>
              <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="3">{{ form_data.get('description', '') }}</textarea>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
                <i class="fas fa-save"></i> حفظ
              </button>
              <a href="{{ url_for('advanced_ledger.customs_taxes') }}" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i> إلغاء
              </a>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\ledger\advanced\add_expense_category.html

Size: 2703 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}إضافة فئة مصروفات{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header"><h3><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> إضافة فئة مصروفات</h3></div>
    <div class="card-body">
      {% set form_data = form_data if form_data is defined else request.form %}
      <form method="post" action="">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الاسم (EN) *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control" required value="{{ form_data.get('name', '') }}">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الاسم (AR) *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name_ar" class="form-control" required value="{{ form_data.get('name_ar', '') }}">
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الفئة الأب</label>
              <select name="parent_id" class="form-control">
                <option value="" {% if not form_data.get('parent_id') %}selected{% endif %}>بلا</option>
                {% for parent in parent_categories %}
                <option value="{{ parent.id }}" {% if form_data.get('parent_id') and form_data.get('parent_id')|int == parent.id %}selected{% endif %}>
                  {{ parent.name_ar }}
                </option>
                {% endfor %}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>الحساب المحاسبي *</label>
              <select name="gl_account_id" class="form-control" required>
                {% for account in accounts %}
                <option value="{{ account.id }}" {% if form_data.get('gl_account_id') and form_data.get('gl_account_id')|int == account.id %}selected{% endif %}>
                  {{ account.code }} - {{ account.name_ar }}
                </option>
                {% endfor %}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> حفظ</button>
        <a href="{{ url_for('advanced_ledger.expense_categories') }}" class="btn btn-secondary"><i class="fas fa-times"></i> إلغاء</a>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\ledger\advanced\advanced_analytics.html

Size: 10990 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}نظام التحليل المالي المتقدم - Advanced Financial Analytics{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="row mb-4">
    <div class="col-12">
      <div class="card bg-gradient-primary text-white">
        <div class="card-body">
          <h2><i class="fas fa-chart-area mr-2"></i>نظام التحليل المالي المتقدم</h2>
          <p>تحليلات شاملة ونسب مالية ومؤشرات أداء وتوقعات مستقبلية</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- النسب المالية -->
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-md-12">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header bg-info text-white">
          <h4><i class="fas fa-percent mr-2"></i>النسب المالية الرئيسية</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="row">
            <!-- نسب السيولة -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <h5>نسب السيولة</h5>
              <ul class="list-group">
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>النسبة الجارية</span>
                  <strong class="text-success">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.liquidity.current_ratio) }}</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>النسبة السريعة</span>
                  <strong class="text-info">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.liquidity.quick_ratio) }}</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>نسبة النقدية</span>
                  <strong class="text-primary">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.liquidity.cash_ratio) }}</strong>
                </li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <!-- نسب الربحية -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <h5>نسب الربحية</h5>
              <ul class="list-group">
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>هامش الربح الإجمالي</span>
                  <strong class="text-success">{{ "{:.1f}".format(ratios.profitability.gross_profit_margin) }}%</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>هامش الربح الصافي</span>
                  <strong class="text-info">{{ "{:.1f}".format(ratios.profitability.net_profit_margin) }}%</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>العائد على الأصول</span>
                  <strong class="text-primary">{{ "{:.1f}".format(ratios.profitability.return_on_assets) }}%</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>العائد على حقوق الملكية</span>
                  <strong class="text-warning">{{ "{:.1f}".format(ratios.profitability.return_on_equity) }}%</strong>
                </li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <!-- نسب الكفاءة -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <h5>نسب الكفاءة</h5>
              <ul class="list-group">
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>معدل دوران الأصول</span>
                  <strong class="text-success">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.efficiency.asset_turnover) }}</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>نسبة المصروفات</span>
                  <strong class="text-info">{{ "{:.1f}".format(ratios.efficiency.expense_ratio) }}%</strong>
                </li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <!-- نسب المديونية -->
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <h5>نسب المديونية</h5>
              <ul class="list-group">
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>الدين إلى حقوق الملكية</span>
                  <strong class="text-warning">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.leverage.debt_to_equity) }}</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>الدين إلى الأصول</span>
                  <strong class="text-info">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.leverage.debt_to_assets) }}</strong>
                </li>
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
                  <span>مضاعف حقوق الملكية</span>
                  <strong class="text-primary">{{ "{:.2f}".format(ratios.leverage.equity_multiplier) }}</strong>
                </li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- توزيع المصروفات والإيرادات -->
  <div class="row mt-4">
    <div class="col-md-6">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
          <h4><i class="fas fa-chart-pie mr-2"></i>توزيع المصروفات</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <canvas id="expenseChart" height="300"></canvas>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <h5>الإجمالي: {{ "{:,.2f}".format(expense_breakdown.total) }} د.إ</h5>
            <table class="table table-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>الحساب</th>
                  <th>المبلغ</th>
                  <th>النسبة</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {% for item in expense_breakdown.items[:5] %}
                <tr>
                  <td>{{ item.account_name }}</td>
                  <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.amount) }}</td>
                  <td><span class="badge badge-danger">{{ "{:.1f}".format(item.percentage) }}%</span></td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-6">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
          <h4><i class="fas fa-chart-pie mr-2"></i>توزيع الإيرادات</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <canvas id="revenueChart" height="300"></canvas>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <h5>الإجمالي: {{ "{:,.2f}".format(revenue_breakdown.total) }} د.إ</h5>
            <table class="table table-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>الحساب</th>
                  <th>المبلغ</th>
                  <th>النسبة</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {% for item in revenue_breakdown.items[:5] %}
                <tr>
                  <td>{{ item.account_name }}</td>
                  <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.amount) }}</td>
                  <td><span class="badge badge-success">{{ "{:.1f}".format(item.percentage) }}%</span></td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- التوقعات المالية -->
  <div class="row mt-4">
    <div class="col-md-12">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
          <h4><i class="fas fa-crystal-ball mr-2"></i>التوقعات المالية</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <canvas id="forecastChart" height="100"></canvas>
          <div class="alert alert-info mt-3">
            <i class="fas fa-info-circle mr-2"></i>
            التوقعات مبنية على تحليل البيانات التاريخية ومعدلات النمو السابقة
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block scripts %}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@3.9.1/dist/chart.min.js"></script>
<script>
// رسم بياني للمصروفات
const expenseData = {{ expense_breakdown.items|tojson }};
const expenseLabels = expenseData.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.account_name);
const expenseValues = expenseData.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.amount);

new Chart(document.getElementById('expenseChart'), {
  type: 'doughnut',
  data: {
    labels: expenseLabels,
    datasets: [{
      data: expenseValues,
      backgroundColor: ['#dc3545', '#f5576c', '#ff6384', '#ff8fa3', '#ffb3c1']
    }]
  },
  options: {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false
  }
});

// رسم بياني للإيرادات
const revenueData = {{ revenue_breakdown.items|tojson }};
const revenueLabels = revenueData.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.account_name);
const revenueValues = revenueData.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.amount);

new Chart(document.getElementById('revenueChart'), {
  type: 'doughnut',
  data: {
    labels: revenueLabels,
    datasets: [{
      data: revenueValues,
      backgroundColor: ['#28a745', '#20c997', '#17a2b8', '#6610f2', '#6f42c1']
    }]
  },
  options: {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false
  }
});

// رسم بياني للتوقعات
const forecastData = {{ forecast|tojson }};
const forecastLabels = forecastData.map(item => item.month);
const forecastRevenue = forecastData.map(item => item.revenue);
const forecastExpenses = forecastData.map(item => item.expenses);
const forecastProfit = forecastData.map(item => item.profit);

new Chart(document.getElementById('forecastChart'), {
  type: 'line',
  data: {
    labels: forecastLabels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'الإيرادات المتوقعة',
        data: forecastRevenue,
        borderColor: '#28a745',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.1)',
        fill: true,
        borderDash: [5, 5]
      },
      {
        label: 'المصروفات المتوقعة',
        data: forecastExpenses,
        borderColor: '#dc3545',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.1)',
        fill: true,
        borderDash: [5, 5]
      },
      {
        label: 'الربح المتوقع',
        data: forecastProfit,
        borderColor: '#007bff',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.1)',
        fill: true,
        borderDash: [5, 5]
      }
    ]
  },
  options: {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false
  }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

```
