### File: templates\owner\users_list.html

Size: 8907 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - إدارة المستخدمين والصلاحيات{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="content-header">
  <div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="row mb-2">
      <div class="col-sm-6">
        <h1 class="m-0">👥 إدارة المستخدمين</h1>
      </div>
      <div class="col-sm-6">
        <ol class="breadcrumb float-sm-left">
          <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{{ url_for('owner.dashboard') }}">لوحة المالك</a></li>
          <li class="breadcrumb-item active">{{ t('Users') }}</li>
        </ol>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content">
  <div class="container-fluid">
    
    <!-- إحصائيات سريعة -->
    <div class="row mb-4">
      <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
        <div class="small-box bg-info">
          <div class="inner">
            <h3>{{ stats.total }}</h3>
            <p>إجمالي المستخدمين</p>
          </div>
          <div class="icon">
            <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
        <div class="small-box bg-success">
          <div class="inner">
            <h3>{{ stats.active }}</h3>
            <p>المستخدمون النشطون</p>
          </div>
          <div class="icon">
            <i class="fas fa-user-check"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
        <div class="small-box bg-warning">
          <div class="inner">
            <h3 style="color: #000;">{{ stats.admins + stats.managers }}</h3>
            <p style="color: #000;">المدراء والإداريون</p>
          </div>
          <div class="icon">
            <i class="fas fa-user-tie"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="col-lg-3 col-6">
        <div class="small-box bg-danger">
          <div class="inner">
            <h3>{{ stats.sellers }}</h3>
            <p>البائعون</p>
          </div>
          <div class="icon">
            <i class="fas fa-user-tag"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- أزرار الإجراءات -->
    <div class="row mb-3">
      <div class="col-12">
        <a href="{{ url_for('owner.create_user') }}" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
          <i class="fas fa-user-plus mr-2"></i>إضافة مستخدم جديد
        </a>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-info btn-lg" onclick="$('#users-table').DataTable().search('').draw();">
          <i class="fas fa-sync mr-2"></i>تحديث
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- جدول المستخدمين -->
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary">
        <h3 class="card-title text-white">
          <i class="fas fa-users mr-2"></i>قائمة المستخدمين
        </h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <table id="users-table" class="table table-hover table-striped">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>#</th>
              <th>الصورة</th>
              <th>{{ t('Username') }}</th>
              <th>{{ t('Full Name') }}</th>
              <th>{{ t('Email') }}</th>
              <th>الدور</th>
              <th>الفرع</th>
              <th>{{ t('Status') }}</th>
              <th>آخر دخول</th>
              <th>الإجراءات</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {% for user in users %}
            <tr class="{{ 'table-warning' if not user.is_active else '' }}">
              <td>{{ user.id }}</td>
              <td>
                <div class="user-avatar">
                  {% if user.is_owner %}
                    <span class="badge badge-danger badge-lg" style="font-size: 1.2rem;">
                      <i class="fas fa-crown"></i>
                    </span>
                  {% elif user.role and user.role.name == 'Super Admin' %}
                    <span class="badge badge-primary badge-lg" style="font-size: 1.2rem;">
                      <i class="fas fa-user-shield"></i>
                    </span>
                  {% elif user.role and user.role.name == 'Manager' %}
                    <span class="badge badge-info badge-lg" style="font-size: 1.2rem;">
                      <i class="fas fa-user-tie"></i>
                    </span>
                  {% else %}
                    <span class="badge badge-secondary badge-lg" style="font-size: 1.2rem;">
                      <i class="fas fa-user"></i>
                    </span>
                  {% endif %}
                </div>
              </td>
              <td>
                <strong>{{ user.username }}</strong>
                {% if user.is_owner %}
                  <span class="badge badge-danger ml-2">مالك</span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
              <td>{{ user.full_name or '-' }}</td>
              <td>{{ user.email or '-' }}</td>
              <td>
                {% if user.role %}
                  <span class="badge badge-{{ 'danger' if user.role.name == 'Super Admin' else 'info' if user.role.name == 'Manager' else 'secondary' }}">
                    {{ user.role.name }}
                  </span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="badge badge-secondary">{{ t('Not Specified') }}</span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
              <td>
                {% if user.branch %}
                  <span class="badge badge-primary">
                    {{ user.branch.name }}{% if user.branch.code %} ({{ user.branch.code }}){% endif %}
                  </span>
                {% elif user.is_owner or (user.role and user.role.slug in ['super_admin', 'developer']) %}
                  <span class="badge badge-success">
                    كل الفروع
                  </span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="text-muted">غير محدد</span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
              <td>
                {% if user.is_active %}
                  <span class="badge badge-success">
                    <i class="fas fa-check"></i> نشط
                  </span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="badge badge-danger">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> معطل
                  </span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
              <td>
                {% if user.last_login %}
                  <small>{{ user.last_login.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</small>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="text-muted">لم يسجل دخول</span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
              <td>
                <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
                  <a href="{{ url_for('owner.user_profile', user_id=user.id) }}" class="btn btn-info" title="الملف الشخصي">
                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('owner.edit_user', user_id=user.id) }}" class="btn btn-primary" title="{{ t('Edit') }}">
                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                  </a>
                  {% if not user.is_owner and user.id != current_user.id %}
                  <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('owner.delete_user', user_id=user.id) }}" style="display: inline;" onsubmit="return confirm('هل تريد تعطيل هذا المستخدم؟');">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger" title="تعطيل">
                      <i class="fas fa-ban"></i>
                    </button>
                  </form>
                  {% endif %}
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
    
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.user-avatar {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.small-box {
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.small-box .icon {
  font-size: 70px;
}
</style>

<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
  $('#users-table').DataTable({
    "language": {
      "url": "{{ url_for('static', filename='datatables/Arabic.json') }}"
    },
    "order": [[0, "desc"]],
    "pageLength": 25,
    "dom": 'Bfrtip',
    "buttons": [
      'copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'print'
    ]
  });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\owner\verify_backups.html

Size: 2574 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}التحقق من النسخ{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="mb-3">
    {% if current_user.is_owner or (current_user.role and current_user.role.slug == 'developer') %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('owner.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> رجوع للوحة المالك
      </a>
    {% else %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('main.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> رجوع للوحة التحكم
      </a>
    {% endif %}
    <a href="{{ url_for('owner.list_backups') }}" class="btn btn-info">
      <i class="fas fa-archive"></i> النسخ الاحتياطية
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('owner.data_cleanup') }}" class="btn btn-danger">
      <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> التنظيف
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <h3><i class="fas fa-check-double"></i> التحقق من النسخ الاحتياطية</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <table class="table table-bordered table-hover">
        <thead class="thead-light">
          <tr>
            <th width="40%">اسم الملف</th>
            <th width="15%">الحجم</th>
            <th width="25%">تاريخ الإنشاء</th>
            <th width="20%">الحالة</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% if backups %}
            {% for backup in backups %}
            <tr class="{{ 'table-success' if backup.valid else 'table-danger' }}">
              <td><code>{{ backup.filename }}</code></td>
              <td>{{ backup.size }} MB</td>
              <td>{{ backup.created }}</td>
              <td>
                {% if backup.valid %}
                <span class="badge badge-success">
                  <i class="fas fa-check"></i> صحيح
                </span>
                {% else %}
                <span class="badge badge-danger">
                  <i class="fas fa-times"></i> تالف
                </span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
          {% else %}
            <tr>
              <td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted">
                <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> لا توجد نسخ احتياطية
              </td>
            </tr>
          {% endif %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

---

### File: templates\owner\view_card.html

Size: 5468 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - عرض البطاقة{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="content-wrapper">
    <div class="content-header">
        <div class="container-fluid">
            <div class="row mb-2">
                <div class="col-sm-6">
                    <h1 class="m-0">عرض البطاقة</h1>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <section class="content">
        <div class="container-fluid">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h3 class="card-title">معلومات البطاقة</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <table class="table table-bordered">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>العميل</th>
                                    <td>{{ card.customer.name if card.customer else 'غير محدد' }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>نوع البطاقة</th>
                                    <td>
                                        {% if card.card_type == 'visa' %}
                                            <span class="badge badge-primary">Visa</span>
                                        {% elif card.card_type == 'mastercard' %}
                                            <span class="badge badge-warning">Mastercard</span>
                                        {% else %}
                                            <span class="badge badge-secondary">{{ card.card_type }}</span>
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>رقم البطاقة</th>
                                    <td>{{ card_data.card_number if card_data else '**** **** **** ' + card.last_four_digits }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>اسم حامل البطاقة</th>
                                    <td>{{ card_data.cardholder_name if card_data else 'غير محدد' }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>تاريخ الانتهاء</th>
                                    <td>{{ card.expiry_month }}/{{ card.expiry_year }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>CVV</th>
                                    <td>{{ card_data.cvv if card_data else '***' }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>عدد الاستخدام</th>
                                    <td>{{ card.usage_count }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>تاريخ الإنشاء</th>
                                    <td>{{ card.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>آخر استخدام</th>
                                    <td>{{ card.last_used_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') if card.last_used_at else 'لم يتم الاستخدام' }}</td>
                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h3 class="card-title">إجراءات البطاقة</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <div class="alert alert-warning">
                                <h5><i class="icon fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> تحذير!</h5>
                                هذه المعلومات حساسة ويجب التعامل معها بحذر.
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="btn-group-vertical w-100">
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-info mb-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> تعديل البطاقة
                                </button>
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning mb-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-ban"></i> تعطيل البطاقة
                                </button>
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger mb-2">
                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> حذف البطاقة
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

Size: 2548 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}إعدادات واتساب{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <a href="{{ url_for('owner.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> رجوع للوحة المالك
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('owner.email_settings') }}" class="btn btn-info">
      <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> البريد
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('owner.sms_settings') }}" class="btn btn-warning">
      <i class="fas fa-sms"></i> الرسائل
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <h3><i class="fab fa-whatsapp"></i> إعدادات واتساب</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <form method="post" action="">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>API URL</label>
          <input type="url" 
                 name="whatsapp_api_url" 
                 class="form-control" 
                 value="{{ settings.whatsapp_api_url or '' }}" 
                 placeholder="https://api.whatsapp.com">
        </div>
        
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>API Key</label>
          <input type="password" 
                 name="whatsapp_api_key" 
                 class="form-control" 
                 value="{{ settings.whatsapp_api_key or '' }}">
        </div>
        
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>رقم الهاتف</label>
          <input type="text" 
                 name="whatsapp_phone_number" 
                 class="form-control" 
                 value="{{ settings.whatsapp_phone_number or '' }}" 
                 placeholder="+971501234567">
        </div>
        
        <div class="form-group">
          <div class="custom-control custom-switch">
            <input type="checkbox" 
                   class="custom-control-input" 
                   id="whatsapp_enabled" 
                   name="whatsapp_enabled" 
                   {% if settings.whatsapp_enabled %}checked{% endif %}>
            <label class="custom-control-label" for="whatsapp_enabled">
              تفعيل واتساب
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
          <i class="fas fa-save"></i> حفظ
        </button>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\partials\flask_pagination.html

Size: 1487 bytes
Modified: 05/31/2026 20:13:14

```html
{% if pagination and pagination.pages > 1 %}
{% set qs = request.args.to_dict() %}
{% if qs.pop('page', None) %}{% endif %}
<nav class="d-print-none mt-3" aria-label="Pagination">
  <ul class="pagination justify-content-center mb-1">
    {% if pagination.has_prev %}
    <li class="page-item">
      <a class="page-link" href="{{ url_for(endpoint, page=pagination.prev_num, **qs) }}">السابق</a>
    </li>
    {% else %}
    <li class="page-item disabled"><span class="page-link">السابق</span></li>
    {% endif %}
    {% for page_num in pagination.iter_pages(left_edge=1, right_edge=1, left_current=2, right_current=2) %}
      {% if page_num %}
      <li class="page-item {% if page_num == pagination.page %}active{% endif %}">
        <a class="page-link" href="{{ url_for(endpoint, page=page_num, **qs) }}">{{ page_num }}</a>
      </li>
      {% else %}
      <li class="page-item disabled"><span class="page-link">…</span></li>
      {% endif %}
    {% endfor %}
    {% if pagination.has_next %}
    <li class="page-item">
      <a class="page-link" href="{{ url_for(endpoint, page=pagination.next_num, **qs) }}">التالي</a>
    </li>
    {% else %}
    <li class="page-item disabled"><span class="page-link">التالي</span></li>
    {% endif %}
  </ul>
  <p class="text-center text-muted small mb-0">
    صفحة {{ pagination.page }} من {{ pagination.pages }} — {{ pagination.total }} سجل
  </p>
</nav>
{% endif %}

```

  {% if _doc_logo %}

### File: templates\partials\print_unified_amount_qr.html

Size: 1432 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:43:36

```html
{% set _amount_value = 0 %}
{% set _amount_currency = tenant_default_currency or 'AED' %}
{% if receipt is defined and receipt %}
  {% set _amount_value = receipt.base_amount if receipt.base_amount is not none else (receipt.amount if receipt.amount is not none else 0) %}
  {% set _amount_currency = receipt.currency or tenant_default_currency or 'AED' %}
{% elif sale is defined and sale %}
  {% set _amount_value = sale.total_amount if sale.total_amount is not none else 0 %}
  {% set _amount_currency = sale.currency or tenant_default_currency or 'AED' %}
{% endif %}

{% set _words_fallback = number_to_arabic_words(_amount_value, _amount_currency) if number_to_arabic_words is defined else '' %}
{% set _display_amount_words = amount_in_words or _words_fallback %}

{% if _display_amount_words %}
<div style="margin: 10px 0; padding: 8px 10px; background: #f8fafc; border-right: 4px solid #64748b; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 9px; color: #1f2937;">
  <strong>المبلغ بالحروف:</strong> {{ _display_amount_words }}
</div>
{% endif %}

{% if qr_data_url %}
<div style="margin: 10px 0 6px 0; text-align: center;">
  <img src="{{ qr_data_url }}" alt="QR" style="width: 110px; height: 110px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px; background: #fff;">
  <div style="font-size: 8px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px;">رمز تحقق المستند</div>
</div>
{% endif %}

```

{% set _company_name = (settings.company_name_ar if settings is defined and settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or (company.name_ar if company is defined and company and company.name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' %}
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fa 0%, #eef2f7 100%); border: 1px solid #d6dbe3; border-radius: 10px; margin: 10px 10px 14px 10px; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: center;">
  <div style="font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f2937; margin-bottom: 4px;">
    {{ doc_title or 'مستند مالي' }}
  </div>
  <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 8px;">
    رقم المستند: <strong>{{ doc_number or '-' }}</strong>
  </div>
  <div style="display: inline-block; background: #ffffff; border: 1px dashed #94a3b8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 9px; color: #334155; line-height: 1.8;">
    <div><strong>الشركة:</strong> {{ _company_name }}</div>

    {% if print_branch %}

    {% if print_branch.address %}<div><strong>عنوان الفرع:</strong> {{ print_branch.address }}</div>{% endif %}
    {% endif %}
  </div>
</div>

### File: templates\partners\create.html

Size: 6607 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 23:03:57

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}إضافة شريك جديد{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-user-plus me-2"></i>إضافة شريك جديد</h1>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row">
  <div class="col-lg-8">
    <form method="POST" class="card">
      <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <i class="fas fa-user-tie me-2"></i>بيانات الشريك
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الاسم <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control" required>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الاسم الإنجليزي</label>
            <input type="text" name="name_en" class="form-control">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الكود</label>
            <input type="text" name="code" class="form-control" placeholder="P001">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">رقم الهوية</label>
            <input type="text" name="id_number" class="form-control">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">النوع</label>
            <select name="partner_type" class="form-select">
              <option value="investor">شريك استثماري</option>
              <option value="working_partner">شريك عامل</option>
              <option value="silent_partner">شريك صامت</option>
              <option value="branch_partner">شريك فرع</option>
              <option value="warehouse_partner">شريك مستودع</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">مستوى الشراكة</label>
            <select name="scope_type" id="scope_type" class="form-select" onchange="updateScopeOptions()">
              <option value="company">مستوى الشركة</option>
              <option value="branch">فرع محدد</option>
              <option value="warehouse">مستودع محدد</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6" id="scope_id_container" style="display:none;">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold" id="scope_id_label">—</label>
            <select name="scope_id" id="scope_id" class="form-select">
              <option value="">— اختر —</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">رأس المال</label>
            <input type="number" name="investment_amount" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة الربح %</label>
            <input type="number" name="share_percentage" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">مبلغ شهري ثابت</label>
            <input type="number" name="fixed_monthly_amount" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01">
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة المصاريف %</label>
            <input type="number" name="expense_share_percentage" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة الخسارة %</label>
            <input type="number" name="loss_share_percentage" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">حد أدنى للربح</label>
            <input type="number" name="min_profit_threshold" class="form-control" value="0" step="0.01">
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الهاتف</label>
            <input type="text" name="phone" class="form-control">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">البريد</label>
            <input type="email" name="email" class="form-control">
          </div>
          <div class="col-12">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">العنوان</label>
            <textarea name="address" class="form-control" rows="2"></textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="col-12">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">ملاحظات</label>
            <textarea name="notes" class="form-control" rows="2"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer d-flex justify-content-between">
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">إلغاء</a>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> حفظ</button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const branches = {{ branches|map(attribute='id')|list|tojson }};
const warehouses = {{ warehouses|map(attribute='id')|list|tojson }};
const branchNames = {{ branches|map(attribute='name')|list|tojson }};
const warehouseNames = {{ warehouses|map(attribute='name')|list|tojson }};

function updateScopeOptions() {
  const scope = document.getElementById('scope_type').value;
  const container = document.getElementById('scope_id_container');
  const label = document.getElementById('scope_id_label');
  const select = document.getElementById('scope_id');

  select.innerHTML = '<option value="">— اختر —</option>';

  if (scope === 'company') {
    container.style.display = 'none';
    select.value = '';
  } else {
    container.style.display = 'block';
    if (scope === 'branch') {
      label.textContent = 'الفرع';
      branchNames.forEach((name, i) => {
        select.innerHTML += `<option value="${branches[i]}">${name}</option>`;
      });
    } else if (scope === 'warehouse') {
      label.textContent = 'المستودع';
      warehouseNames.forEach((name, i) => {
        select.innerHTML += `<option value="${warehouses[i]}">${name}</option>`;
      });
    }
  }
}
updateScopeOptions();
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

---

### File: templates\partners\distribute.html

Size: 1672 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 23:08:18

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}توزيع أرباح{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-chart-pie me-2"></i>توزيع أرباح فترة</h1>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row justify-content-center">
  <div class="col-lg-6">
    <form method="POST" class="card">
      <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
      <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
        <i class="fas fa-calculator me-2"></i>حساب وتوزيع الأرباح
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="alert alert-info">
          <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>سيتم إنشاء توزيعات "مسودة" لجميع الشركاء النشطين للفترة المختارة.
        </div>
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">من تاريخ</label>
            <input type="date" name="period_start" class="form-control" value="{{ default_start }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">إلى تاريخ</label>
            <input type="date" name="period_end" class="form-control" value="{{ default_end }}">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer d-flex justify-content-between">
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">إلغاء</a>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success"><i class="fas fa-calculator me-1"></i> إنشاء التوزيعات</button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\partners\distributions.html

Size: 3627 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 23:09:58

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}توزيعات الأرباح{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  <h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-chart-bar me-2"></i>توزيعات الأرباح</h1>
  <a href="{{ url_for('partners.distribute') }}" class="btn btn-success"><i class="fas fa-plus me-1"></i> توزيع جديد</a>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
      <h3 class="card-title mb-0">قائمة التوزيعات</h3>
      <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.distributions') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary {% if not request.args.get('status') %}active{% endif %}">الكل</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.distributions', status='draft') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('status') == 'draft' %}active{% endif %}">مسودة</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.distributions', status='approved') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('status') == 'approved' %}active{% endif %}">معتمد</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.distributions', status='paid') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('status') == 'paid' %}active{% endif %}">مدفوع</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table class="table table-hover mb-0">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>الفترة</th>
            <th>الشريك</th>
            <th class="text-center">الربح الصافي</th>
            <th class="text-center">النصيب</th>
            <th class="text-center">الحالة</th>
            <th class="text-center">إجراءات</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for d in distributions %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ d.period_start }} – {{ d.period_end }}</td>
            <td>{{ d.partner.name }}</td>
            <td class="text-center">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(d.net_profit or 0) }}</td>
            <td class="text-center"><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(d.net_due or 0) }}</strong></td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <span class="badge bg-{{ {'draft':'secondary','approved':'info','paid':'success','cancelled':'danger'}[d.status] }}">{{ d.status_label }}</span>
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">
              {% if d.status == 'draft' %}
              <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('partners.approve_distribution', dist_id=d.id) }}" style="display:inline;">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="اعتماد"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button>
              </form>
              {% elif d.status == 'approved' %}
              <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('partners.pay_distribution', dist_id=d.id) }}" style="display:inline;">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-success" title="تسجيل دفع"><i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave"></i></button>
              </form>
              {% endif %}
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% else %}
          <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-4">لا توجد توزيعات.</td></tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

---

### File: templates\partners\edit.html

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}تعديل {{ partner.name }}{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-user-edit me-2"></i>تعديل: {{ partner.name }}</h1>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row">
  <div class="col-lg-8">
    <form method="POST" class="card">
      <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
        <i class="fas fa-edit me-2"></i>بيانات الشريك
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الاسم <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.name }}" required>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الاسم الإنجليزي</label>
            <input type="text" name="name_en" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.name_en or '' }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الكود</label>
            <input type="text" name="code" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.code or '' }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">رقم الهوية</label>
            <input type="text" name="id_number" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.id_number or '' }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">النوع</label>
            <select name="partner_type" class="form-select">
              <option value="investor" {% if partner.partner_type == 'investor' %}selected{% endif %}>شريك استثماري</option>
              <option value="working_partner" {% if partner.partner_type == 'working_partner' %}selected{% endif %}>شريك عامل</option>
              <option value="silent_partner" {% if partner.partner_type == 'silent_partner' %}selected{% endif %}>شريك صامت</option>
              <option value="branch_partner" {% if partner.partner_type == 'branch_partner' %}selected{% endif %}>شريك فرع</option>
              <option value="warehouse_partner" {% if partner.partner_type == 'warehouse_partner' %}selected{% endif %}>شريك مستودع</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">مستوى الشراكة</label>
            <select name="scope_type" id="scope_type" class="form-select" onchange="updateScopeOptions()">
              <option value="company" {% if partner.scope_type == 'company' %}selected{% endif %}>مستوى الشركة</option>
              <option value="branch" {% if partner.scope_type == 'branch' %}selected{% endif %}>فرع محدد</option>
              <option value="warehouse" {% if partner.scope_type == 'warehouse' %}selected{% endif %}>مستودع محدد</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6" id="scope_id_container" {% if partner.scope_type == 'company' %}style="display:none;"{% endif %}>
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold" id="scope_id_label">
              {% if partner.scope_type == 'branch' %}الفرع{% elif partner.scope_type == 'warehouse' %}المستودع{% else %}—{% endif %}
            </label>
            <select name="scope_id" id="scope_id" class="form-select">
              <option value="">— اختر —</option>
              {% if partner.scope_type == 'branch' %}
                {% for b in branches %}
                <option value="{{ b.id }}" {% if partner.scope_id == b.id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ b.name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
              {% elif partner.scope_type == 'warehouse' %}
                {% for w in warehouses %}
                <option value="{{ w.id }}" {% if partner.scope_id == w.id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ w.name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
              {% endif %}
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">رأس المال</label>
            <input type="number" name="investment_amount" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.investment_amount or 0 }}" step="0.01">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة الربح %</label>
            <input type="number" name="share_percentage" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.share_percentage or 0 }}" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">مبلغ شهري ثابت</label>
            <input type="number" name="fixed_monthly_amount" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.fixed_monthly_amount or 0 }}" step="0.01">
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة المصاريف %</label>
            <input type="number" name="expense_share_percentage" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.expense_share_percentage or 0 }}" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">نسبة الخسارة %</label>
            <input type="number" name="loss_share_percentage" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.loss_share_percentage or 0 }}" step="0.01" max="100">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">حد أدنى للربح</label>
            <input type="number" name="min_profit_threshold" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.min_profit_threshold or 0 }}" step="0.01">
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">الهاتف</label>
            <input type="text" name="phone" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.phone or '' }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">البريد</label>
            <input type="email" name="email" class="form-control" value="{{ partner.email or '' }}">
          </div>
          <div class="col-12">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">العنوان</label>
            <textarea name="address" class="form-control" rows="2">{{ partner.address or '' }}</textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="col-12">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold">ملاحظات</label>
            <textarea name="notes" class="form-control" rows="2">{{ partner.notes or '' }}</textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="col-12">
            <div class="form-check form-switch">
              <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="is_active" id="is_active" {% if partner.is_active %}checked{% endif %}>
              <label class="form-check-label" for="is_active">نشط</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer d-flex justify-content-between">
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.view', id=partner.id) }}" class="btn btn-secondary">إلغاء</a>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-warning"><i class="fas fa-save me-1"></i> حفظ التعديلات</button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const branches = {{ branches|map(attribute='id')|list|tojson }};
const warehouses = {{ warehouses|map(attribute='id')|list|tojson }};
const branchNames = {{ branches|map(attribute='name')|list|tojson }};
const warehouseNames = {{ warehouses|map(attribute='name')|list|tojson }};

function updateScopeOptions() {
  const scope = document.getElementById('scope_type').value;
  const container = document.getElementById('scope_id_container');
  const label = document.getElementById('scope_id_label');
  const select = document.getElementById('scope_id');

  select.innerHTML = '<option value="">— اختر —</option>';

  if (scope === 'company') {
    container.style.display = 'none';
    select.value = '';
  } else {
    container.style.display = 'block';
    if (scope === 'branch') {
      label.textContent = 'الفرع';
      branchNames.forEach((name, i) => {
        select.innerHTML += `<option value="${branches[i]}">${name}</option>`;
      });
    } else if (scope === 'warehouse') {
      label.textContent = 'المستودع';
      warehouseNames.forEach((name, i) => {
        select.innerHTML += `<option value="${warehouses[i]}">${name}</option>`;
      });
    }
  }
}
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\partners\index.html

Size: 3728 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 23:01:49

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}الشركاء والمساهمين{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  <h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-users-cog me-2"></i>الشركاء والمساهمين</h1>
  <a href="{{ url_for('partners.create') }}" class="btn btn-primary">
    <i class="fas fa-plus me-1"></i> شريك جديد
  </a>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
      <h3 class="card-title mb-0"><i class="fas fa-list me-2"></i>قائمة الشركاء</h3>
      <div class="btn-group">
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index') }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary {% if not request.args.get('scope') %}active{% endif %}">الكل</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index', scope='company') }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('scope') == 'company' %}active{% endif %}">شركة</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index', scope='branch') }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('scope') == 'branch' %}active{% endif %}">فرع</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('partners.index', scope='warehouse') }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary {% if request.args.get('scope') == 'warehouse' %}active{% endif %}">مستودع</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table class="table table-hover mb-0">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>الشريك</th>
            <th>المستوى</th>
            <th>النوع</th>
            <th class="text-center">النسبة</th>
            <th class="text-center">رأس المال</th>
            <th class="text-center">الرصيد</th>
            <th>الحالة</th>
            <th class="text-center">إجراءات</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for p in partners %}
          <tr>
            <td>
              <strong>{{ p.name }}</strong>
              {% if p.name_en %}<br><small class="text-muted">{{ p.name_en }}</small>{% endif %}
            </td>
            <td>{{ p.scope_label }}</td>
            <td>{{ p.partner_type_label }}</td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <span class="badge bg-info">{{ "%.2f"|format(p.share_percentage or 0) }}%</span>
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(p.investment_amount or 0) }}</td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <strong class="{% if (p.current_balance or 0) >= 0 %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}">
                {{ "{:,.2f}".format(p.current_balance or 0) }}
              </strong>
            </td>
            <td>
              {% if p.is_active %}
                <span class="badge bg-success">نشط</span>
              {% else %}
                <span class="badge bg-secondary">غير نشط</span>
              {% endif %}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <a href="{{ url_for('partners.view', id=p.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="عرض">
                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
              </a>
              <a href="{{ url_for('partners.edit', id=p.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-warning" title="تعديل">
                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
              </a>
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% else %}
          <tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted py-4">لا يوجد شركاء مسجلين.</td></tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\partners\statement.html

Size: 3862 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 23:16:30

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}كشف حساب {{ partner.name }}{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice me-2"></i>كشف حساب: {{ partner.name }}</h1>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-body">
    <form method="GET" class="row g-3 align-items-end">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <label class="form-label">من تاريخ</label>
        <input type="date" name="start_date" class="form-control" value="{{ start_date }}">
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <label class="form-label">إلى تاريخ</label>
        <input type="date" name="end_date" class="form-control" value="{{ end_date }}">
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-filter me-1"></i> عرض</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="window.print()"><i class="fas fa-print me-1"></i> طباعة</button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="row mb-4">
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="text-muted">الرصيد الافتتاحي</h6>
        <h4>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.opening_balance) }}</h4>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="text-muted">إجمالي الدائن</h6>
        <h4 class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_credit) }}</h4>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="text-muted">إجمالي المدين</h6>
        <h4 class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.total_debit) }}</h4>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="text-muted">الرصيد الختامي</h6>
        <h4 class="{% if statement.closing_balance >= 0 %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}">
          {{ "{:,.2f}".format(statement.closing_balance) }}
        </h4>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header"><i class="fas fa-list me-2"></i>تفاصيل الحركات</div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table class="table table-hover mb-0">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th>
            <th>التاريخ</th>
            <th>النوع</th>
            <th>البيان</th>
            <th class="text-center">مدين</th>
            <th class="text-center">دائن</th>
            <th class="text-center">الرصيد</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for t in statement.transactions %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
            <td>{{ t.transaction_date }}</td>
            <td>{{ t.transaction_type_label }}</td>
            <td>{{ t.notes or '—' }}</td>
            <td class="text-center {% if t.is_debit %}text-danger fw-bold{% endif %}">
              {% if t.is_debit %}{{ "{:,.2f}".format(abs(t.amount_base or 0)) }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center {% if t.is_credit %}text-success fw-bold{% endif %}">
              {% if t.is_credit %}{{ "{:,.2f}".format(t.amount_base or 0) }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(t.balance_after or 0) }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% else %}
          <tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted py-4">لا توجد حركات في الفترة المحددة.</td></tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\partners\view.html

Size: 6202 bytes

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}{{ partner.name }} — تفاصيل الشريك{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  <div>
    <h1 class="text-gradient mb-0"><i class="fas fa-user-tie me-2"></i>{{ partner.name }}</h1>
    <p class="text-muted">{{ partner.partner_type_label }} | {{ partner.scope_label }}</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <a href="{{ url_for('partners.edit', id=partner.id) }}" class="btn btn-warning"><i class="fas fa-edit me-1"></i> تعديل</a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('partners.statement', id=partner.id) }}" class="btn btn-info"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice me-1"></i> كشف حساب</a>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-4">
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="text-muted">رأس المال</h5>
        <h3 class="text-primary">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance_summary.investment) }}</h3>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="text-muted">الرصيد الجاري</h5>
        <h3 class="{% if balance_summary.current_balance >= 0 %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}">
          {{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance_summary.current_balance) }}
        </h3>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="text-muted">إجمالي الأرباح</h5>
        <h3 class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance_summary.total_profit) }}</h3>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <div class="card text-center">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="text-muted">إجمالي المسحوبات</h5>
        <h3 class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance_summary.total_withdrawals) }}</h3>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="row">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header"><i class="fas fa-percentage me-2"></i>نسب الشراكة</div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
          <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
            <span>نسبة الربح</span><strong>{{ "%.2f"|format(partner.share_percentage or 0) }}%</strong>
          </li>
          <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
            <span>نسبة المصاريف</span><strong>{{ "%.2f"|format(partner.expense_share_percentage or 0) }}%</strong>
          </li>
          <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
            <span>نسبة الخسارة</span><strong>{{ "%.2f"|format(partner.loss_share_percentage or 0) }}%</strong>
          </li>
          <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
            <span>مبلغ شهري ثابت</span><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.fixed_monthly_amount or 0) }}</strong>
          </li>
          <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between">
            <span>حد أدنى للربح</span><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.min_profit_threshold or 0) }}</strong>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header"><i class="fas fa-address-card me-2"></i>معلومات التواصل</div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
          <li class="list-group-item"><i class="fas fa-phone me-2 text-muted"></i>{{ partner.phone or '—' }}</li>
          <li class="list-group-item"><i class="fas fa-envelope me-2 text-muted"></i>{{ partner.email or '—' }}</li>
          <li class="list-group-item"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt me-2 text-muted"></i>{{ partner.address or '—' }}</li>
          <li class="list-group-item"><i class="fas fa-id-card me-2 text-muted"></i>{{ partner.id_number or '—' }}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between">
        <span><i class="fas fa-chart-pie me-2"></i>آخر التوزيعات</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body p-0">
        <table class="table table-sm table-hover mb-0">
          <thead><tr><th>الفترة</th><th>الربح</th><th>النصيب</th><th>الحالة</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            {% for d in latest_distributions %}
            <tr>
              <td>{{ d.period_start }} – {{ d.period_end }}</td>
              <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(d.net_profit or 0) }}</td>
              <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(d.net_due or 0) }}</td>
              <td><span class="badge bg-{{ {'draft':'secondary','approved':'info','paid':'success','cancelled':'danger'}[d.status] }}">{{ d.status_label }}</span></td>
            </tr>
            {% else %}
            <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد توزيعات.</td></tr>
            {% endfor %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header"><i class="fas fa-exchange-alt me-2"></i>حركات مالية</div>
      <div class="card-body p-0">
        <table class="table table-sm table-hover mb-0">
          <thead><tr><th>التاريخ</th><th>النوع</th><th>المبلغ</th><th>الرصيد</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            {% for t in latest_transactions %}
            <tr>
              <td>{{ t.transaction_date }}</td>
              <td>{{ t.transaction_type_label }}</td>
              <td class="{% if t.is_credit %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(t.amount_base or 0) }}</td>
              <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(t.balance_after or 0) }}</td>
            </tr>
            {% else %}
            <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد حركات.</td></tr>
            {% endfor %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\payment_vault\cards.html

Size: 14011 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}إدارة البطاقات - Card Management{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-credit-card text-primary"></i> إدارة البطاقات المحفوظة</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">جميع بطاقات الدفع المسجلة (مشفرة وآمنة)</p>
    </div>
    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-warning" onclick="toggleDecryption()">
            <i class="fas fa-eye" id="decrypt-icon"></i> <span id="decrypt-text">عرض البيانات المشفرة</span>
        </button>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .card-item {
        background: white;
        border-radius: 15px;
        padding: 25px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        border-right: 5px solid;
        transition: all 0.3s;
    }
    
    .card-item.visa { border-color: #1A1F71; }
    .card-item.mastercard { border-color: #EB001B; }
    .card-item.amex { border-color: #006FCF; }
    
    .card-item:hover {
        transform: translateX(-5px);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }
    
    .card-visual {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        color: white;
        min-height: 150px;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }
    
    .card-visual.visa {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A1F71 0%, #4A5FD6 100%);
    }
    
    .card-visual.mastercard {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EB001B 0%, #F79E1B 100%);
    }
    
    .card-visual.amex {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #006FCF 0%, #0099CC 100%);
    }
    
    .card-visual::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        top: -50%;
        right: -50%;
        width: 200%;
        height: 200%;
        background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
    }
    
    .card-number {
        font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
        font-size: 1.4rem;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin: 20px 0;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 1;
    }
    
    .card-details {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 1;
    }
    
    .encrypted-data {
        background: #f8f9fa;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 15px;
        margin-top: 15px;
        border: 2px dashed #dc3545;
        display: none;
    }
    
    .encrypted-data.show {
        display: block;
    }
    
    .stat-box {
        background: white;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        text-align: center;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    }
    
    .stat-number {
        font-size: 2rem;
        font-weight: 900;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- تحذير أمني -->
<div class="alert alert-danger">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
            <strong>تحذير أمني:</strong> هذه البيانات حساسة للغاية! لا تشاركها مع أحد. جميع العمليات مسجلة ومراقبة.
        </div>
        
<!-- إحصائيات البطاقات -->
<div class="row mb-4">
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number text-primary">{{ total_cards }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">إجمالي البطاقات</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number text-success">${{ total_amount|default(0) }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">المبلغ الإجمالي</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number text-info">{{ visa_count }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Visa</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number text-danger">{{ mastercard_count }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Mastercard</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
<!-- قائمة البطاقات -->
<div class="row">
            {% if cards %}
                {% for card in cards %}
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <div class="card-item {{ card.card_type|lower }}">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <div class="card-visual {{ card.card_type|lower }}">
                                    <div style="position: relative; z-index: 1;">
                                        <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                                            {{ card.card_type|upper }}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="card-number">
                                            **** **** **** {{ card.card_last_4 }}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="card-details">
                                            <div>
                                                <small>CARDHOLDER</small><br>
                                                <strong>{{ card.customer_name }}</strong>
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <small>BIN</small><br>
                                                <strong>{{ card.card_bin or 'N/A' }}</strong>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="col-md-6">
                                <h6 class="text-primary">معلومات المعاملة</h6>
                                <table class="table table-sm">
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>النوع:</strong></td>
                                        <td>
                                            {% if card.transaction_type == 'purchase' %}
                                                🛒 مشترية
                                            {% else %}
                                                💝 تبرع
                                            {% endif %}
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                    {% if card.package %}
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>الباقة:</strong></td>
                                        <td>{{ card.package }}</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    {% endif %}
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>المبلغ:</strong></td>
                                        <td><strong class="text-success">${{ card.amount }}</strong></td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>التاريخ:</strong></td>
                                        <td>{{ card.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</td>
                                    </tr>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong>الحالة:</strong></td>
                                        <td>
                                            {% if card.status == 'completed' %}
                                                <span class="badge badge-success">✓ مكتملة</span>
                                            {% else %}
                                                <span class="badge badge-warning">⏳ {{ card.status }}</span>
                                            {% endif %}
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                </table>
                                
                                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-info btn-block" onclick="viewCard({{ card.id }})">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye"></i> عرض التفاصيل
                                </button>
                                
                                <!-- البيانات المشفرة (تظهر عند الطلب فقط) -->
                                <div class="encrypted-data" id="encrypted-{{ card.id }}">
                                    <h6 class="text-danger"><i class="fas fa-lock-open"></i> بيانات مفكوكة التشفير</h6>
                                    <div class="card-decrypted-info">
                                        جاري التحميل...
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                {% endfor %}
            {% else %}
                <div class="col-12">
                    <div class="alert alert-info text-center">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle fa-3x mb-3" style="display: block;"></i>
                        <h5>لا توجد بطاقات محفوظة</h5>
                        <p>سيتم حفظ البطاقات تلقائياً عند إجراء عمليات دفع جديدة</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            {% endif %}
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    let decryptionEnabled = false;
    
    function toggleDecryption() {
        decryptionEnabled = !decryptionEnabled;
        const icon = document.getElementById('decrypt-icon');
        const text = document.getElementById('decrypt-text');
        
        if (decryptionEnabled) {
            icon.className = 'fas fa-eye-slash';
            text.textContent = 'إخفاء البيانات المشفرة';
            
            Swal.fire({
                title: 'تحذير أمني!',
                text: 'أنت على وشك عرض بيانات حساسة. تأكد من أنك وحدك!',
                icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonText: 'متابعة',
                cancelButtonText: 'إلغاء',
                confirmButtonColor: '#d33'
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.encrypted-data').forEach(el => {
                        el.classList.add('show');
                    });
                } else {
                    decryptionEnabled = false;
                    icon.className = 'fas fa-eye';
                    text.textContent = 'عرض البيانات المشفرة';
                }
            });
        } else {
            document.querySelectorAll('.encrypted-data').forEach(el => {
                el.classList.remove('show');
            });
        }
    }
    
    function viewCard(id) {
        // جلب البيانات من الخادم
        fetch(`/payment-vault/card/${id}/decrypt`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}'
            }
        })
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success && data.card) {
                const cardInfo = `
                    <div style="text-align: right; font-family: monospace;">
                        <p><strong>رقم البطاقة:</strong> ${data.ca

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

### File: templates\payment_vault\change_password.html

Size: 5706 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}تغيير كلمة المرور - Change Password{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center">
    <i class="fas fa-key text-warning mr-3" style="font-size: 2rem;"></i>
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">🔐 تغيير كلمة مرور الخزينة</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">تحديث كلمة المرور السرية للخزينة</p>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row justify-content-center">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-key mr-2"></i>تغيير كلمة المرور
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payment_vault.change_password') }}">
                            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label for="current_password">
                                    <i class="fas fa-lock mr-2"></i>كلمة المرور الحالية
                                </label>
                                <input type="password" 
                                       class="form-control" 
                                       id="current_password" 
                                       name="current_password" 
                                       required
                                       placeholder="أدخل كلمة المرور الحالية">
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label for="new_password">
                                    <i class="fas fa-key mr-2"></i>كلمة المرور الجديدة
                                </label>
                                <input type="password" 
                                       class="form-control" 
                                       id="new_password" 
                                       name="new_password" 
                                       required
                                       minlength="8"
                                       placeholder="أدخل كلمة المرور الجديدة (8 أحرف على الأقل)">
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label for="confirm_password">
                                    <i class="fas fa-check-circle mr-2"></i>تأكيد كلمة المرور الجديدة
                                </label>
                                <input type="password" 
                                       class="form-control" 
                                       id="confirm_password" 
                                       name="confirm_password" 
                                       required
                                       minlength="8"
                                       placeholder="أعد إدخال كلمة المرور الجديدة">
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="alert alert-info">
                                <i class="fas fa-info-circle mr-2"></i>
                                <strong>متطلبات كلمة المرور:</strong>
                                <ul class="mb-0 mt-2">
                                    <li>8 أحرف على الأقل</li>
                                    <li>يُنصح بخلط الأحرف والأرقام والرموز</li>
                                    <li>تجنب كلمات المرور الشائعة</li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="text-center">
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-warning btn-lg">
                                    <i class="fas fa-save mr-2"></i>
                                    تغيير كلمة المرور
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </form>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="card mt-3">
                    <div class="card-body text-center">
                        <a href="{{ url_for('payment_vault.settings') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>
                            العودة للإعدادات
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const newPassword = [REDACTED]
    const confirmPassword = [REDACTED]
    
    function validatePasswords() {
        if (newPassword.value !== confirmPassword.value) {
            confirmPassword.setCustomValidity('كلمة المرور غير متطابقة');
        } else {
            confirmPassword.setCustomValidity('');
        }
    }
    
    newPassword.addEventListener('change', validatePasswords);
    confirmPassword.addEventListener('keyup', validatePasswords);
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

```
