### File: templates\payment_vault\purchases.html

Size: 10306 bytes
Modified: 05/31/2026 20:13:14

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}مشتريات النظام - الخزينة السرية{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-shopping-bag text-primary"></i> مشتريات النظام</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">متابعة جميع عمليات شراء الباقات وتفعيلها</p>
    </div>
    <a href="{{ url_for('payment_vault.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> العودة للوحة التحكم
    </a>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .purchase-card {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        border-radius: 15px;
        padding: 20px;
        color: white;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    }
    
    .purchase-card h3 {
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }
    
    .purchase-stats {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
        gap: 15px;
        margin-bottom: 30px;
    }
    
    .stat-box {
        background: white;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        text-align: center;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    }
    
    .stat-number {
        font-size: 2rem;
        font-weight: 900;
        color: #667eea;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    
    .stat-label {
        color: #666;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
    
    .purchase-table {
        background: white;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    }
    
    .status-badge {
        padding: 5px 15px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        font-weight: 600;
    }
    
    .status-completed {
        background: #d4edda;
        color: #155724;
    }
    
    .status-pending {
        background: #fff3cd;
        color: #856404;
    }
    
    .status-refunded {
        background: #f8d7da;
        color: #721c24;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Security Alert -->
<div class="alert alert-warning">
                <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
                <strong>تنبيه أمني:</strong> هذه الصفحة محمية بكلمة مرور الخزينة. جميع العمليات مسجلة ومراقبة.
            </div>

<!-- Purchase Stats -->
<div class="purchase-stats">
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number">{{ stats.total }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">إجمالي المشتريات</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number">${{ "{:,.2f}".format(stats.revenue) }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">المبلغ الإجمالي</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number">{{ stats.completed }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">مشتريات مكتملة</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-box">
                    <div class="stat-number">{{ stats.pending }}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">مشتريات قيد الانتظار</div>
                </div>
            </div>

<!-- Purchases Table -->
<div class="purchase-table">
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
                    <h3><i class="fas fa-list"></i> قائمة المشتريات</h3>
                    <a href="{{ url_for('payment_vault.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> العودة للوحة التحكم
                    </a>
                </div>

                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover">
                        <thead style="background: #f8f9fa;">
                            <tr>
                                <th>#</th>
                                <th>التاريخ</th>
                                <th>الباقة</th>
                                <th>العميل</th>
                                <th>المبلغ</th>
                                <th>طريقة الدفع</th>
                                <th>الحالة</th>
                                <th>الإجراءات</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% if purchases %}
                                {% for purchase in purchases %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
                                    <td>{{ purchase.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') if purchase.created_at else 'N/A' }}</td>
                                    <td>
                                        {% if purchase.package %}
                                            {{ purchase.package.icon }} {{ purchase.package.name_ar }}
                                        {% else %}
                                            -
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        {{ purchase.customer_name }}<br>
                                        <small class="text-muted">{{ purchase.customer_email }}</small>
                                        {% if purchase.company_name %}
                                        <br><small><i class="fas fa-building"></i> {{ purchase.company_name }}</small>
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                    <td><strong>${{ "{:,.2f}".format(purchase.amount_paid) }}</strong></td>
                                    <td>
                                        {% if purchase.payment_method == 'crypto' %}
                                            <i class="fab fa-bitcoin"></i> عملات رقمية
                                        {% elif purchase.payment_method == 'card' %}
                                            <i class="fas fa-credit-card"></i> بطاقة
                                        {% elif purchase.payment_method == 'paypal' %}
                                            <i class="fab fa-paypal"></i> PayPal
                                        {% elif purchase.payment_method == 'bank' %}
                                            <i class="fas fa-university"></i> تحويل بنكي
                                        {% else %}
                                            {{ purchase.payment_method }}
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span class="status-badge status-{{ purchase.payment_status }}">
                                            {% if purchase.payment_status == 'completed' %}
                                                ✓ مكتملة
                                            {% elif purchase.payment_status == 'pending' %}
                                                ⏳ قيد الانتظار
                                            {% elif purchase.payment_status == 'failed' %}
                                                ✗ فشلت
                                            {% elif purchase.payment_status == 'refunded' %}
                                                ↩ مسترجعة
                                            {% else %}
                                                {{ purchase.payment_status }}
                                            {% endif %}
                                        </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <a href="{{ url_for('payment_vault.purchase_detail', id=purchase.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-info">
                                            <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        {% if purchase.payment_status == 'pending' and purchase.activation_status != 'activated' %}
                                        <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payment_vault.activate_purchase', id=purchase.id) }}" style="display: inline;">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-success" onclick="return confirm('هل تريد تفعيل هذه الباقة؟')">
                                                <i class="fas fa-check"></i>
                                            </button>
                                        </form>
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                {% endfor %}
                            {% else %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="8" class="text-center text-muted">
                                        <i class="fas fa-inbox fa-3x mb-3" style="display: block;"></i>
                                        لا توجد مشتريات حتى الآن
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            {% endif %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                    
                    {% if pagination %}
                    {% set endpoint = 'payment_vault.view_purchases' %}
                    {% include 'partials/flask_pagination.html' %}
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payment_vault\reports.html

Size: 10753 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}التقارير المالية - Financial Reports{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center">
    <i class="fas fa-chart-line text-info mr-3" style="font-size: 2rem;"></i>
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">📊 التقارير المالية</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">تقارير شاملة للمشتريات والتبرعات</p>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .report-card {
        background: white;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 20px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    }
    
    .metric-box {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        color: white;
    }
    
    .metric-value {
        font-size: 2rem;
        font-weight: 900;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    
    .metric-label {
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        opacity: 0.9;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- فلتر الفترة -->
<div class="card mb-4">
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="GET" class="row" action="">
                    <div class="col-md-3">
                        <label>من تاريخ</label>
                        <input type="date" name="from_date" class="form-control" 
                               value="{{ request.args.get('from_date', '') }}">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-3">
                        <label>إلى تاريخ</label>
                        <input type="date" name="to_date" class="form-control" 
                               value="{{ request.args.get('to_date', '') }}">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-3">
                        <label>نوع التقرير</label>
                        <select name="report_type" class="form-control">
                            <option value="all">الكل</option>
                            <option value="purchases">المشتريات فقط</option>
                            <option value="donations">التبرعات فقط</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-3">
                        <label>&nbsp;</label>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-block">
                            <i class="fas fa-search"></i> عرض التقرير
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
        
<!-- ملخص الإيرادات -->
<div class="row mb-4">
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="metric-box">
                    <div class="metric-value">${{ summary.total_revenue|default(0) }}</div>
                    <div class="metric-label">إجمالي الإيرادات</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="metric-box" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);">
                    <div class="metric-value">${{ summary.total_purchases_amount|default(0) }}</div>
                    <div class="metric-label">إيرادات المشتريات</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="metric-box" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%);">
                    <div class="metric-value">${{ summary.total_donations_amount|default(0) }}</div>
                    <div class="metric-label">إيرادات التبرعات</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
                <div class="metric-box" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b 0%, #38f9d7 100%);">
                    <div class="metric-value">{{ summary.total_transactions|default(0) }}</div>
                    <div class="metric-label">إجمالي العمليات</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
<!-- رسم بياني للإيرادات -->
<div class="report-card">
            <h5 class="mb-3"><i class="fas fa-chart-area text-success"></i> الإيرادات الشهرية</h5>
            <canvas id="revenueChart" height="80"></canvas>
        </div>
        
<!-- تقسيم الإيرادات -->
<div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="report-card">
                    <h5 class="mb-3"><i class="fas fa-pie-chart text-primary"></i> توزيع الإيرادات</h5>
                    <canvas id="revenueDistChart"></canvas>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="report-card">
                    <h5 class="mb-3"><i class="fas fa-chart-bar text-warning"></i> المبيعات حسب الباقة</h5>
                    <canvas id="packageSalesChart"></canvas>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
<!-- جدول تفصيلي -->
<div class="report-card mt-4">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
                <h5 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-table text-danger"></i> التفاصيل الكاملة</h5>
                <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="exportReport()">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> تصدير Excel
                </button>
            </div>
            
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-striped table-hover">
                    <thead class="thead-dark">
                        <tr>
                            <th>#</th>
                            <th>التاريخ</th>
                            <th>النوع</th>
                            <th>التفاصيل</th>
                            <th>المبلغ</th>
                            <th>العملة</th>
                            <th>الحالة</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% if transactions %}
                            {% for trans in transactions %}
                            <tr>
                                <td>{{ loop.index }}</td>
                                <td>{{ trans.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</td>
                                <td>
                                    {% if trans.transaction_type == 'purchase' %}
                                        <span class="badge badge-primary">🛒 مشترية</span>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <span class="badge badge-danger">💝 تبرع</span>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    {% if trans.transaction_type == 'purchase' %}
                                        {{ trans.package }} - {{ trans.customer_name }}
                                    {% else %}
                                        {{ trans.donor_name or 'مجهول' }}
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                                <td><strong>${{ trans.amount_usd }}</strong></td>
                                <td>{{ trans.crypto_type|upper }}</td>
                                <td>
                                    {% if trans.status == 'completed' %}
                                        <span class="badge badge-success">✓</span>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <span class="badge badge-warning">⏳</span>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        {% else %}
                            <tr>
                                <td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد بيانات</td>
                            </tr>
                        {% endif %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<script>
    // Revenue Chart
    const revenueCtx = document.getElementById('revenueChart').getContext('2d');
    new Chart(revenueCtx, {
        type: 'line',
        data: {
            labels: {{ monthly_labels|tojson }},
            datasets: [{
                label: 'المشتريات',
                data: {{ monthly_purchases_data|tojson }},
                borderColor: '#667eea',
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1)',
                tension: 0.4
            }, {
                label: 'التبرعات',
                data: {{ monthly_donations_data|tojson }},
                borderColor: '#f5576c',
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(245, 87, 108, 0.1)',
                tension: 0.4
            }]
        },
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: true
        }
    });
    
    // Revenue Distribution
    const distCtx = document.getElementById('revenueDistChart').getContext('2d');
    new Chart(distCtx, {
        type: 'pie',
        data: {
            labels: ['المشتريات', 'التبرعات'],
            datasets: [{
                data: [{{ summary.total_purchases_amount|default(0) }}, {{ summary.total_donations_amount|default(0) }}],
                backgroundColor: ['#667eea', '#f5576c']
            }]
        }
    });
    
    // Package Sales
    const pkgCtx = document.getElementById('packageSalesChart').getContext('2d');
    new Chart(pkgCtx, {
        type: 'doughnut',
        data: {
            labels: ['أساسية', 'احترافية', 'شركات'],
            datasets: [{
                data: {{ package_stats|tojson }},
                backgroundColor: ['#667eea', '#f5576c', '#28a745']
            }]
        }
    });
    
    function exportReport() {
        Swal.fire({
            icon: 'info',
            title: 'تصدير التقرير',
            text: 'سيتم تحميل التقرير كملف Excel',
            confirmButtonText: 'حسناً'
        });
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payment_vault\settings.html

Size: 27425 bytes
Modified: 05/31/2026 20:13:14

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}إعدادات الخزينة السرية - Vault Settings{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center">
    <i class="fas fa-cog text-primary mr-3" style="font-size: 2rem;"></i>
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">⚙️ إعدادات الخزينة السرية</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">تكوين إعدادات الدفع والأمان</p>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-8">
                <div class="card">
                    <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
                        <h5 class="mb-0">
                            <i class="fas fa-cog mr-2"></i>إعدادات الخزينة
                        </h5>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payment_vault.settings') }}">
                            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                            <!-- Payment Settings -->
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label for="nowpayments_api_key">
                                            <i class="fas fa-key mr-2"></i>NOWPayments API Key
                                        </label>
                                        <input type="text" 
                                               class="form-control" 
                                               id="nowpayments_api_key" 
                                               name="nowpayments_api_key" 
                                               value="{{ vault.nowpayments_api_key or '' }}"
                                               placeholder="your-nowpayments-api-key">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label for="nowpayments_ipn_secret">
                                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt mr-2"></i>IPN Secret
                                        </label>
                                        <input type="text" 
                                               class="form-control" 
                                               id="nowpayments_ipn_secret" 
                                               name="nowpayments_ipn_secret" 
                                               value="{{ vault.nowpayments_ipn_secret or '' }}"
                                               placeholder="your-ipn-secret-here">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Crypto Addresses -->
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-4">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label for="bitcoin_address">
                                            <i class="fab fa-bitcoin mr-2"></i>Bitcoin Address
                                        </label>
                                        <input type="text" 
                                               class="form-control" 
                                               id="bitcoin_address" 
                                               name="bitcoin_address" 
                                               value="{{ vault.bitcoin_address or '' }}"
                                               placeholder="bc1qyourbtcaddresshere">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-4">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label for="ethereum_address">
                                            <i class="fab fa-ethereum mr-2"></i>Ethereum Address
                                        </label>
                                        <input type="text" 
                                               class="form-control" 
                                               id="ethereum_address" 
                                               name="ethereum_address" 
                                               value="{{ vault.ethereum_address or '' }}"
                                               placeholder="0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f0bEb">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-4">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label for="usdt_address">
                                            <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign mr-2"></i>USDT Address
                                        </label>
                                        <input type="text" 
                                               class="form-control" 
                                               id="usdt_address" 
                                               name="usdt_address" 
                                               value="{{ vault.usdt_address or '' }}"
                                               placeholder="TYASr5UV6HEcXatwdFQfmLVUqQQQMUxHLS">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <hr>
                            
                            <!-- PayPal Settings -->
                            <h5 class="border-bottom pb-2 mb-3">
                                <i class="fab fa-paypal text-primary"></i> إعدادات PayPal
                            </h5>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-envelope mr-2"></i>البريد التجاري PayPal</label>
                                        <input type="email" class="form-control" name="paypal_business_email" 
                                               value="{{ vault.paypal_business_email or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="business@company.com">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-cog mr-2"></i>وضع PayPal</label>
                                        <select class="form-control" name="paypal_mode">
                                            <option value="sandbox" {% if vault.paypal_mode == 'sandbox' %}selected{% endif %}>Sandbox (اختبار)</option>
                                            <option value="live" {% if vault.paypal_mode == 'live' %}selected{% endif %}>Live (إنتاج)</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-key mr-2"></i>PayPal Client ID</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="paypal_client_id" 
                                               value="{{ vault.paypal_client_id or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="Client ID">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-lock mr-2"></i>PayPal Secret</label>
                                        <input type="password" class="form-control" name="paypal_client_secret" 
                                               value="{{ vault.paypal_client_secret or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="Secret Key">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <hr>
                            
                            <!-- Bank Account Settings -->
                            <h5 class="border-bottom pb-2 mb-3">
                                <i class="fas fa-university text-success"></i> معلومات الحساب البنكي
                            </h5>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-building mr-2"></i>اسم البنك</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_name" 
                                               value="{{ vault.bank_name or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="البنك العربي">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-user mr-2"></i>اسم صاحب الحساب</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_account_name" 
                                               value="{{ vault.bank_account_name or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="Azad Systems LLC">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-hashtag mr-2"></i>رقم الحساب</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_account_number" 
                                               value="{{ vault.bank_account_number or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="123456789">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="col-md-6">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-barcode mr-2"></i>IBAN</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_iban" 
                                               value="{{ vault.bank_iban or '' }}" 
                                               placeholder="AE123456789012345678901">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="row">
                                <div class="col-md-4">
                                    <div class="form-group">
                                        <label><i class="fas fa-globe mr-2"></i>SWIFT Code</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_swift_code" 
                                               value="{{ vault
```

### File: templates\payment_vault\unlock.html

Size: 5487 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}فتح الخزينة السرية - Unlock Vault{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center">
    <i class="fas fa-unlock text-warning mr-3" style="font-size: 2rem;"></i>
    <div>
        <h1 class="mb-0">🔓 فتح الخزينة السرية</h1>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0">أدخل كلمة مرور الخزينة للوصول</p>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
.vault-unlock-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 15px;
    padding: 40px;
    margin: 20px auto;
    max-width: 500px;
    box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.vault-unlock-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%;
    right: -50%;
    width: 200%;
    height: 200%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
    animation: pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
}

.vault-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.form-control-vault {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 15px 20px;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
}

.form-control-vault::placeholder {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
}

.form-control-vault:focus {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    color: white;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
}

.btn-vault-unlock {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    color: white;
    padding: 15px 40px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    width: 100%;
}

.btn-vault-unlock:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    color: white;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.security-info {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px;
    margin-top: 20px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}

.bitcoin-address {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    padding: 15px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-family: monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    word-break: break-all;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="vault-unlock-card">
            <div class="vault-content">
                <div class="text-center mb-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-shield-alt" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #ffc107;"></i>
                </div>
                
                <h3 class="text-center mb-4">🔐 الخزينة السرية</h3>
                <p class="text-center mb-4">
                    أدخل كلمة مرور الخزينة للوصول إلى إدارة الدفع
                </p>
                
                <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payment_vault.unlock_vault') }}">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="vault_password" class="form-label">
                            <i class="fas fa-key mr-2"></i>كلمة مرور الخزينة
                        </label>
                        <input type="password" 
                               class="form-control form-control-vault" 
                               id="vault_password" 
                               name="vault_password" 
                               placeholder="أدخل كلمة مرور الخزينة"
                               required>
                    </div>
                    
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-vault-unlock">
                        <i class="fas fa-unlock mr-2"></i>
                        فتح الخزينة
                    </button>
                </form>
                
                <div class="security-info">
                    <h6><i class="fas fa-info-circle mr-2"></i>معلومات الأمان</h6>
                    <p class="mb-2">
                        <strong>كلمة مرور الخزينة:</strong> هي عنوان محفظة Bitcoin الخاص بك
                    </p>
                    <p class="mb-2">
                        <strong>مثال:</strong>
                    </p>
                    <div class="bitcoin-address">
                        bc1qyourbtcaddresshere
                    </div>
                    <p class="mt-2 mb-0 text-warning">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle mr-1"></i>
                        <strong>تحذير:</strong> بعد 3 محاولات فاشلة سيتم قفل الخزينة
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Back Button -->
        <div class="text-center mt-4">
            <a href="{{ url_for('payment_vault.index') }}" class="btn btn-outline-light">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>
                العودة للخزينة
            </a>
        </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\payments\archived.html

Size: 5911 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:41:50

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}شركة أزاد للأنظمة الذكية - الأرشيف{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}أرشيف المدفوعات{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>رجوع
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-body">
    <table id="archivedTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped table-hover">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>رقم السند</th>
          <th>الاسم</th>
          <th>التاريخ</th>
          <th>المبلغ</th>
          <th>النوع</th>
          <th>المصدر</th>
          <th>تاريخ الأرشفة</th>
          <th>الإجراءات</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for item in archived_items %}
        <tr>
          <td>
            <strong>{{ item.number }}</strong>
            {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">سند قبض</small>
            {% else %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">سند صرف</small>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.customer_name %}
              <i class="fas fa-user text-primary mr-1"></i>{{ item.customer_name }}
            {% elif item.supplier_name %}
              <i class="fas fa-truck text-danger mr-1"></i>{{ item.supplier_name }}
            {% else %}
              -
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>{{ item.date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
          <td>
            <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.amount) }} {{ item.currency }}</strong>
            {% if item.currency != tenant_default_currency %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</small>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
              <span class="badge badge-success">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-down mr-1"></i>قبض
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-danger">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up mr-1"></i>صرف
              </span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.source_type == 'sale' %}
              <span class="badge badge-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-1"></i>مبيعات
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'supplier_payment' %}
              <span class="badge badge-warning">
                <i class="fas fa-truck mr-1"></i>مورد
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'customer_payment' %}
              <span class="badge badge-info">
                <i class="fas fa-user mr-1"></i>عميل
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'refund' %}
              <span class="badge badge-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-undo mr-1"></i>استرداد
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-secondary">{{ item.source_type }}</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            <small>{{ item.archived_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</small>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
              {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.view_receipt', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-info" title="عرض">
                  <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                </a>
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.print_receipt', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank" title="طباعة">
                  <i class="fas fa-print"></i>
                </a>
              {% else %}
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.view_payment', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-info" title="عرض">
                  <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                </a>
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.print_payment', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank" title="طباعة">
                  <i class="fas fa-print"></i>
                </a>
              {% endif %}
              <button type="button" class="btn btn-success restore-btn" 
                      data-type="{{ item.type }}"
                      data-id="{{ item.id }}"
                      title="استعادة">
                <i class="fas fa-undo"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
  $('#archivedTable').DataTable({
    language: { url: "{{ url_for('static', filename='datatables/Arabic.json') }}" },
    order: [[6, 'desc']],
    pageLength: 25
  });
  
  // استعادة السندات
  $(document).on('click', '.restore-btn', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    
    var type = $(this).data('type');
    var id = $(this).data('id');
    var endpoint = type === 'receipt' ? '/payments/receipts/' : '/payments/payments/';
    var url = endpoint + id + '/restore';
    var csrfToken = [REDACTED]
    
    $.ajax({
      url: url,
      type: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'X-CSRFToken': csrfToken
      },
      success: function(response) {
        location.reload();
      },
      error: function(xhr) {
        location.reload();
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}


```

---

### File: templates\payments\create.html

Size: 7129 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:33:46

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}شركة أزاد للأنظمة الذكية - إنشاء سند قبض جديد{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  <div>
    <h1 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-receipt mr-2"></i>سند قبض جديد</h1>
  </div>
  <div>
    <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>العودة للمدفوعات
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('main.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-home mr-2"></i>الرئيسية
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card">
  {% set form_data = request.form %}
  <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payments.create_voucher_submit') }}">
    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
    
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-user text-primary"></i> الزبون 
              <span class="text-danger">*</span>
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="اختر العميل - يظهر رصيده الحالي (إجباري)"></i>
            </label>
            <select name="customer_id" id="customer_id" class="form-control customer-select" required onchange="loadCustomerSales()">
              <option value="" {% if not form_data.get('customer_id') %}selected{% endif %}>بلا</option>
              {% for customer in customers %}
              <option value="{{ customer.id }}" {% if form_data.get('customer_id') and form_data.get('customer_id')|int == customer.id %}selected{% endif %}>
                {{ customer.name }} - {{ "{:,.2f}".format(customer.get_balance_base()) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
              </option>
              {% endfor %}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-3">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave text-success"></i> المبلغ 
              <span class="text-danger">*</span>
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="المبلغ المستلم (إجباري)"></i>
            </label>
            <input type="number" name="amount" class="form-control" step="0.01" min="0.01" placeholder="0.00" required>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-3">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign text-warning"></i> العملة
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="عملة الدفع (افتراضي: {{ tenant_default_currency or 'AED' }})"></i>
            </label>
            {% set dc = company_default_currency or system_default_currency or 'AED' %}
            <select name="currency" id="currency" class="form-control">
              <option value="AED" {% if dc == 'AED' %}selected{% endif %}>درهم إماراتي</option>
              <option value="USD" {% if dc == 'USD' %}selected{% endif %}>دولار</option>
              <option value="EUR" {% if dc == 'EUR' %}selected{% endif %}>يورو</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-credit-card text-primary"></i> طريقة الدفع 
              <span class="text-danger">*</span>
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="كيف تم استلام المبلغ؟ (إجباري)"></i>
            </label>
            <select name="payment_method" id="payment_method" class="form-control" required>
              <option value="cash">نقدي</option>
              <option value="card">بطاقة</option>
              <option value="bank_transfer">تحويل بنكي</option>
              <option value="cheque">شيك</option>
              <option value="e_wallet">محفظة إلكترونية</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-hashtag text-info"></i> {{ t('Reference Number') }}
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="رقم مرجعي (اختياري)"></i>
            </label>
            <input type="text" name="reference_number" class="form-control" placeholder="رقم الإيصال/التحويل">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- حقول طريقة الدفع الديناميكية -->
      <div id="paymentFieldsContainer"></div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label>
          <i class="fas fa-sticky-note text-secondary"></i> {{ t('Notes') }}
          <i class="fas fa-info-circle text-muted" data-toggle="tooltip" title="ملاحظات عن الدفعة (اختياري)"></i>
        </label>
        <textarea name="notes" class="form-control" rows="3" placeholder="أي ملاحظات..."></textarea>
      </div>

      <div class="alert alert-info" id="customerSales" style="display:none;">
        <h5><i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-2"></i>الفواتير المستحقة:</h5>
        <div id="salesList"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card-footer">
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
        <i class="fas fa-save mr-2"></i>حفظ سند القبض
      </button>
      <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
        <i class="fas fa-times mr-2"></i>{{ t('Cancel') }}
      </a>
    </div>
  </form>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
$(function () {
  $('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip({
    placement: 'top',
    trigger: 'hover'
  });
});

// إدارة حقول الدفع الديناميكية
if (window.PaymentFieldsManager) {
  PaymentFieldsManager.initSelector('#payment_method', '#paymentFieldsContainer');
}

function loadCustomerSales() {
  const customerId = $('#customer_id').val();
  if (!customerId) {
    $('#customerSales').hide();
    return;
  }
  
  $.get(`/customers/${customerId}/balance`, function(data) {
    if (data.unpaid_sales && data.unpaid_sales.length > 0) {
      let html = '<table class="table table-sm"><tbody>';
      data.unpaid_sales.forEach(sale => {
        html += `<tr>
          <td>${sale.sale_number}</td>
          <td class="text-danger">${sale.balance_due} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
        </tr>`;
      });
      html += '</tbody></table>';
      $('#salesList').html(html);
      $('#customerSales').slideDown();
    } else {
      $('#customerSales').hide();
    }
  });
}
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

### File: templates\payments\create_payment.html

Size: 5198 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:37:23

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}سند صرف - {{ purchase.purchase_number }}{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}إنشاء سند صرف{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
{% set submitted = form_data if form_data is defined else None %}
{% set selected_payment_method = submitted.get('payment_method') if submitted and submitted.get('payment_method') else 'cash' %}
{% set submitted_amount = submitted.get('amount') if submitted and submitted.get('amount') else balance %}
<div class="row">
  <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2">
    <!-- معلومات الفاتورة -->
    <div class="card card-primary">
      <div class="card-header">
        <h3 class="card-title">
          <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-2"></i>معلومات فاتورة المشتريات
        </h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <dl>
              <dt>رقم الفاتورة:</dt>
              <dd><strong>{{ purchase.purchase_number }}</strong></dd>
              
              <dt>المورد:</dt>
              <dd>{{ purchase.supplier_name }}</dd>
              
              <dt>تاريخ الفاتورة:</dt>
              <dd>{{ purchase.purchase_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <dl>
              <dt>إجمالي الفاتورة:</dt>
              <dd><strong class="text-primary">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(purchase.total_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong></dd>
              
              <dt>المدفوع:</dt>
              <dd class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(purchase.paid_amount_aed or 0) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</dd>
              
              <dt>المتبقي:</dt>
              <dd><strong class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- نموذج سند الصرف -->
    <div class="card card-danger mt-3">
      <div class="card-header">
        <h3 class="card-title">
          <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave mr-2"></i>بيانات سند الصرف
        </h3>
      </div>
      <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payments.create_payment', purchase_id=purchase.id) }}">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="amount">المبلغ المدفوع <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <div class="input-group">
              <input type="number" class="form-control" id="amount" name="amount" 
                     step="0.01" min="0.01" max="{{ balance }}" 
                     value="{{ submitted_amount }}" required>
              <div class="input-group-append">
                <span class="input-group-text">{{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <small class="form-text text-muted">
              الحد الأقصى: {{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
            </small>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="payment_method">طريقة الدفع <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <select class="form-control" id="payment_method" name="payment_method" required>
              <option value="cash" {% if selected_payment_method == 'cash' %}selected{% endif %}>نقدي</option>
              <option value="bank_transfer" {% if selected_payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}selected{% endif %}>تحويل بنكي</option>
              <option value="cheque" {% if selected_payment_method == 'cheque' %}selected{% endif %}>شيك</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="notes">ملاحظات</label>
            <textarea class="form-control" id="notes" name="notes" rows="3" 
                      placeholder="أي ملاحظات إضافية...">دفعة لفاتورة مشتريات {{ purchase.purchase_number }}</textarea>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card-footer">
          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">
            <i class="fas fa-save mr-2"></i>حفظ سند الصرف
          </button>
          <a href="{{ url_for('purchases.view', id=purchase.id) }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
            <i class="fas fa-times mr-2"></i>إلغاء
          </a>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
  // التحقق من المبلغ
  $('#amount').on('input', function() {
    const value = parseFloat($(this).val());
    const max = parseFloat($(this).attr('max'));
    
    if (value > max) {
      $(this).val(max.toFixed(2));
      toastr.warning('المبلغ لا يمكن أن يتجاوز المتبقي');
    }
  });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payments\create_receipt.html

Size: 21960 bytes
Modified: 06/05/2026 16:56:48

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - {% if is_payment %}إنشاء سند صرف{% else %}إنشاء سند قبض{% endif %}{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}{% if is_payment %}سند صرف جديد{% else %}سند قبض جديد{% endif %}{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
.receipt-create-form .form-control,
.receipt-create-form .form-select {
  min-height: 48px;
  height: auto;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  text-align: center;
}

.receipt-create-form .form-control::placeholder {
  text-align: center;
  color: #6c757d;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

.receipt-create-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single {
  height: 48px;
  min-height: 48px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0 0.75rem;
}

.receipt-create-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single .select2-selection__rendered {
  width: 100%;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
  line-height: 1.5 !important;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.receipt-create-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single .select2-selection__arrow {
  height: 100%;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}

.receipt-create-form textarea.form-control {
  text-align: right;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.receipt-create-form textarea.form-control::placeholder {
  text-align: right;
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
{% set submitted = form_data if form_data is defined else None %}
{% set selected_customer_id = submitted.get('customer_id') if submitted and submitted.get('customer_id') else (preselected_customer.id if preselected_customer else '') %}
{% set selected_currency = submitted.get('currency') if submitted and submitted.get('currency') else (purchase.currency if purchase else sale.currency if sale else tenant_default_currency or 'AED') %}
{% set selected_payment_method = submitted.get('payment_method') if submitted and submitted.get('payment_method') else 'cash' %}
{% set selected_ewallet = submitted.get('ewallet_name') if submitted and submitted.get('ewallet_name') else '' %}
{% if sale %}
<!-- معلومات فاتورة المبيعات -->
<div class="row mb-4">
  <div class="col-md-12">
    <div class="card card-info">
      <div class="card-header">
        <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i> معلومات الفاتورة</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>رقم الفاتورة:</strong><br>
            <span class="text-primary">{{ sale.sale_number }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>العميل:</strong><br>
            <span>{{ sale.customer_name }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>المبلغ الإجمالي:</strong><br>
            <span class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale.total_amount) }} {{ sale.currency }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>المتبقي:</strong><br>
            {% set sale_balance_display = sale.balance_due %}
            {% if sale.currency != 'AED' and sale.exchange_rate %}
              {% set sale_balance_display = sale.balance_due / sale.exchange_rate %}
            {% endif %}
            <span class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(sale_balance_display) }} {{ sale.currency }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% elif purchase %}
<!-- معلومات فاتورة المشتريات -->
<div class="row mb-4">
  <div class="col-md-12">
    <div class="card card-danger">
      <div class="card-header">
        <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i> معلومات فاتورة الشراء</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>رقم الفاتورة:</strong><br>
            <span class="text-primary">{{ purchase.purchase_number }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>المورد:</strong><br>
            <span>{{ purchase.supplier_name }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>المبلغ الإجمالي:</strong><br>
            <span class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(purchase.total_amount) }} {{ purchase.currency }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-3">
            <strong>المتبقي:</strong><br>
            <span class="text-danger">
              {% if suggested_amount is not none %}
                {{ "{:,.2f}".format(suggested_amount) }} {{ selected_currency }}
              {% else %}
                {{ "{:,.2f}".format(purchase.total_amount) }} {{ purchase.currency }}
              {% endif %}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<div class="card">
  <form method="POST" action="{% if sale %}{{ url_for('payments.create_from_sale', sale_id=sale.id) }}{% elif purchase %}{{ url_for('payments.create_payment', purchase_id=purchase.id) }}{% else %}{{ url_for('payments.create_receipt') }}{% endif %}" class="receipt-create-form">
    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
    
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="row">
        {% if not is_payment %}
        <!-- العميل (سند قبض فقط) -->
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-user text-primary"></i> الزبون 
              <span class="text-danger">*</span>
            </label>
            <select name="customer_id" id="customer_id" class="form-control customer-select" required>
              <option value="" {% if not selected_customer_id %}selected{% endif %}>بلا</option>
              {% if preselected_customer %}
              <option value="{{ preselected_customer.id }}" {% if selected_customer_id and selected_customer_id|string == preselected_customer.id|string %}selected{% endif %}>
                {{ preselected_customer.name }}{% if preselected_customer.phone %} - {{ preselected_customer.phone }}{% endif %}
              </option>
              {% endif %}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% else %}
        <!-- المورد (سند صرف فقط) -->
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-truck text-danger"></i> المورد 
            </label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" id="supplier_display" name="supplier_display" value="{{ supplier.name if supplier else purchase.supplier_name }}" readonly>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        <!-- المبلغ -->
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave text-success"></i> المبلغ 
              <span class="text-danger">*</span>
            </label>
            <input type="number" name="amount" id="amount" class="form-control" step="0.01" min="0.01" 
                   value="{{ submitted.get('amount') if submitted and submitted.get('amount') else (suggested_amount if suggested_amount else '') }}" 
                   data-suggested-amount="{{ suggested_amount if suggested_amount else '' }}"
                   placeholder="0.00" required>
            {% if suggested_amount %}
            <small class="form-text text-info">
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> المبلغ المقترح حسب ديون الزبون
            </small>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- العملة -->
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-dollar-sign text-warning"></i> العملة
            </label>
            <select name="currency" id="currency" class="form-control">
              {% set currency_options = [
                ('AED', 'AED - درهم إماراتي'),
                ('USD', 'USD - دولار أمريكي'),
                ('EUR', 'EUR - يورو'),
                ('GBP', 'GBP - جنيه إسترليني'),
                ('SAR', 'SAR - ريال سعودي'),
                ('KWD', 'KWD - دينار كويتي'),
                ('QAR', 'QAR - ريال قطري'),
                ('OMR', 'OMR - ريال عماني'),
                ('BHD', 'BHD - دينار بحريني')
              ] %}
              {% for value, label in currency_options %}
              <option value="{{ value }}" {% if selected_currency == value %}selected{% endif %}>{{ label }}</option>
              {% endfor %}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <!-- سعر الصرف -->
        <div class="col-md-12">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-exchange-alt text-primary"></i> سعر الصرف مقابل {{ tenant_currency_name_ar or 'درهم إماراتي' }}
            </label>
            <input type="number" name="exchange_rate" id="exchange_rate" 
                   class="form-control" step="0.000001" min="0.000001"
                   value="{% if purchase %}{{ purchase.exchange_rate }}{% elif sale %}{{ sale.exchange_rate }}{% else %}1{% endif %}" 
                   readonly style="background-color: #f8f9fa;">
            <small class="form-text text-muted">
              <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> سعر الصرف من الفاتورة (ثابت)
            </small>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <!-- طريقة الدفع -->
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-credit-card text-info"></i> طريقة الدفع
            </label>
            <select name="payment_method" id="payment_method" class="form-control" required>
              <option value="cash" {% if selected_payment_method == 'cash' %}selected{% endif %}>نقداً</option>
              <option value="bank_transfer" {% if selected_payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}selected{% endif %}>تحويل بنكي</option>
              <option value="cheque" {% if selected_payment_method == 'cheque' %}selected{% endif %}>شيك</option>
              <option value="card" {% if selected_payment_method == 'card' %}selected{% endif %}>بطاقة ائتمان</option>
              <option value="e_wallet" {% if selected_payment_method == 'e_wallet' %}selected{% endif %}>محفظة إلكترونية</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- رقم المرجع -->
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>
              <i class="fas fa-hashtag text-secondary"></i> رقم المرجع
            </label>
            <input type="text" name="reference_number" id="reference_number" class="form-control" 
                   value="" placeholder="رقم المرجع">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- حقول الشيك (تظهر عند اختيار شيك) -->
      <div id="cheque_fields" class="row" style="display: none;">
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label><i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> رقم الشيك <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" name="cheque_number" class="form-control" placeholder="رقم الشيك">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label><i class="fas fa-calendar"></i> تاريخ استحقاق الشيك <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <input type="date" name="cheque_date" class="form-control">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label><i class="fas fa-university"></i> اسم البنك <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
            <inpu

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

### File: templates\payments\index.html

Size: 3126 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 09:34:24

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - سندات القبض والدفع{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}سندات القبض{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <a href="{{ url_for('payments.create_voucher') }}" class="btn btn-success">
      <i class="fas fa-plus mr-2"></i>سند قبض جديد
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-body">
    <table id="receiptsTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped" data-lang-url="{{ url_for('static', filename='datatables/Arabic.json') }}">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>رقم السند</th>
          <th>الشركة</th>
          <th>الفرع</th>
          <th>الزبون</th>
          <th>{{ t('Date') }}</th>
          <th>{{ t('Amount') }}</th>
          <th><i class="fas fa-exchange-alt mr-1"></i>سعر الصرف</th>
          <th>الطريقة</th>
          <th>الإجراءات</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for receipt in receipts %}
        <tr>
          <td><strong>{{ receipt.receipt_number }}</strong></td>
          <td><span class="badge badge-light border">{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or '-' }}</span></td>
          <td>
            {% if receipt.branch %}
              <span class="badge badge-light border">{{ receipt.branch.name }}{% if receipt.branch.code %} ({{ receipt.branch.code }}){% endif %}</span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="text-muted">-</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>{{ receipt.customer.name if receipt.customer else '-' }}</td>
          <td>{{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
          <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}</td>
          <td>
            {% if receipt.exchange_rate and receipt.exchange_rate != 1 %}
              <span class="badge badge-info" title="سعر الصرف وقت المعاملة">
                <i class="fas fa-exchange-alt mr-1"></i>{{ "{:.4f}".format(receipt.exchange_rate) }}
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="text-muted">1.0000</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td><span class="badge badge-success">{{ receipt.payment_method }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <a href="{{ url_for('payments.view_receipt', id=receipt.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-info">
              <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
            </a>
            <button
              type="button"
              class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary js-print-receipt"
              data-print-url="{{ url_for('payments.print_receipt', id=receipt.id) }}"
            >
              <i class="fas fa-print"></i>
            </button>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script defer src="{{ url_for('static', filename='js/payments-index-page.js') }}"></script>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payments\print.html

Size: 7018 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:41:12

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="{{ current_language }}" dir="{{ 'rtl' if is_rtl else 'ltr' }}">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - سند قبض #{{ receipt.receipt_number }}</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    @page {
      size: A4 portrait;
      margin: 10mm;
    }
    body { font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif; padding: 20px; }
    .receipt-container {
      max-width: 600px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      border: 3px solid #28a745;
      border-radius: 15px;
    }
    .receipt-header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 25px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .receipt-title {
      background: #f8f9fa;
      padding: 15px;
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 3px solid #28a745;
    }
    .receipt-title h2 { color: #28a745; font-size: 22px; margin: 0; }
    .receipt-body { padding: 25px; }
    .info-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #ccc; }
    .amount-box {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }
    .amount-box h3 { font-size: 32px; margin: 0; }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="receipt-print payment-receipt">
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: #28a745; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 25px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer;">
      <i class="fas fa-print"></i> طباعة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="receipt-container">
    <div class="receipt-header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <h3 style="margin: 10px 0;">{{ print_branding.company_name_ar if print_branding is defined else (tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة') }}</h3>
      <p style="font-size: 13px;">{{ print_branding.address_ar if print_branding is defined else (tenant_address or company_address) }}</p>
    </div>

    <div class="receipt-title">
      <h2>
        {% if is_payment %}
          سند صرف 💸
        {% else %}
          سند قبض 💵
        {% endif %}
      </h2>
      <p style="color: #28a745; margin: 5px 0; font-weight: 700;">رقم: 
        {% if is_payment %}
          {{ receipt.payment_number }}
        {% else %}
          {{ receipt.receipt_number }}
        {% endif %}
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="receipt-body">
      <div class="info-row">
        <span><strong>التاريخ:</strong></span>
        <span>
          {% if is_payment %}
            {{ receipt.payment_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}
          {% else %}
            {{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}
          {% endif %}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="info-row">
        <span><strong>اسم الزبون:</strong></span>
        <span>
          {% if is_payment %}
            {% if receipt.customer %}
              {{ receipt.customer.name }}
            {% else %}
              {{ receipt.supplier_name or '-' }}
            {% endif %}
          {% else %}
            {{ receipt.customer.name if receipt.customer else '-' }}
          {% endif %}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="info-row">
        <span><strong>طريقة الدفع:</strong></span>
        <span>
          {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cash' %}نقدي
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'card' %}بطاقة
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}تحويل بنكي
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' %}شيك
          {% else %}محفظة إلكترونية{% endif %}
        </span>
      </div>

      {% if receipt.reference_number %}
      <div class="info-row">
        <span><strong>رقم المرجع:</strong></span>
        <span>{{ receipt.reference_number }}</span>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% if receipt.cheque_number %}
      <div class="info-row" style="background: #e7f3ff; padding: 12px; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 8px;">
        <div style="width: 100%;">
          <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 5px;">
            <span><strong>رقم الشيك:</strong></span>
            <span>{{ receipt.cheque_number }}</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 5px;">
            <span><strong>البنك:</strong></span>
            <span>{{ receipt.bank_name }}</span>
          </div>
          {% if receipt.cheque_date %}
          <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
            <span><strong>تاريخ الاستحقاق:</strong></span>
            <span style="color: #28a745; font-weight: bold;">{{ receipt.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</span>
          </div>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      <div class="amount-box">
        <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 16px;">المبلغ المستلم</p>
        <h3>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}</h3>
        {% if receipt.currency != tenant_default_currency %}
        <p style="margin: 5px 0; font-size: 14px;">= {{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</p>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      {% if receipt.notes %}
      <div style="background: #fff3cd; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border-right: 4px solid #ffc107;">
        <strong>ملاحظات:</strong> {{ receipt.notes }}
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      <div style="margin-top: 40px; text-align: center;">
        <div style="border-top: 2px solid #333; width: 200px; margin: 0 auto; padding-top: 10px;">
          <strong>توقيع المحاسب</strong>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%); color: white; padding: 15px; text-align: center;">
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 13px;">{{ developer_credit or config.DEVELOPER_CREDIT }}</p>
      <p style="margin: 5px 0; font-size: 12px;">📞 {{ developer_phone or config.DEVELOPER_PHONE }} | 📧 {{ developer_email or config.DEVELOPER_EMAIL }}</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>


```

### File: templates\payments\print_payment.html

Size: 3647 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 22:06:03

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}طباعة سند صرف - {{ payment.payment_number }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="text-center mb-4">
            <h2>سند صرف</h2>
            <h4>رقم: {{ payment.payment_number }}</h4>
          </div>
          
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <table class="table table-borderless">
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>المورد:</strong></td>
                  <td>{{ payment.supplier_name if payment.supplier_name else '-' }}</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>تاريخ السند:</strong></td>
                  <td>{{ payment.payment_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>نوع الدفع:</strong></td>
                  <td>
                    {% if payment.payment_type == 'supplier_payment' %}
                      دفع مورد
                    {% elif payment.payment_type == 'customer_payment' %}
                      دفع عميل
                    {% elif payment.payment_type == 'refund' %}
                      استرداد
                    {% else %}
                      {{ payment.payment_type }}
                    {% endif %}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              </table>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <table class="table table-borderless">
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>المبلغ:</strong></td>
                  <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(payment.amount) }} {{ payment.currency }}</strong></td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>المبلغ بـ{{ tenant_currency_name_ar or 'درهم إماراتي' }}:</strong></td>
                  <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(payment.base_amount or payment.amount_aed) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</strong></td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>طريقة الدفع:</strong></td>
                  <td>{{ payment.get_method_display() }}</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                  <td><strong>الحالة:</strong></td>
                  <td>
                    {% if payment.payment_confirmed %}
                      <span class="badge badge-success">{{ payment.status_ar }}</span>
                    {% else %}
                      <span class="badge badge-warning">{{ payment.status_ar }}</span>
                    {% endif %}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {% if payment.notes %}
          <div class="row mt-3">
            <div class="col-12">
              <h5>ملاحظات:</h5>
              <p>{{ payment.notes }}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {% endif %}
          
          <div class="row mt-4">
            <div class="col-6">
              <p>_________________</p>
              <p>توقيع المحاسب</p>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6">
              <p>_________________</p>
              <p>توقيع المدير</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
window.onload = function() {
  window.print();
}
</script>
{% endblock %}

```
