### File: templates\payments\print_receipt.html

Size: 8125 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:40:09

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>طباعة إيصال - {{ doc_number or receipt.receipt_number or receipt.payment_number }}</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 10px;
      font-family: 'Tajawal', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      direction: rtl;
      text-align: right;
      background: #e5e7eb;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size if settings else 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation if settings else 'portrait' }};
      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .receipt {
      {% if settings and settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
      width: 212mm;
      height: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '148mm' }};
      {% elif settings and settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
      width: 212mm;
      height: {{ '279mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '216mm' }};
      {% else %}
      width: {{ '210mm' if (not settings or settings.orientation == 'portrait') else '297mm' }};
      height: {{ '297mm' if (not settings or settings.orientation == 'portrait') else '210mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      border: 1px solid #334155;
      background: #fff;
      overflow: auto;
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    }
    .header {
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 2px solid #0f766e;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .header h1 {
      margin: 0 0 5px 0;
      color: #0f766e;
      font-size: 18px;
    }
    .header p { margin: 2px 0; }
    .info-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .info-label { font-weight: 700; }
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 12px 0;
    }
    th, td {
      padding: 8px;
      border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
      text-align: right;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    th {
      background: #0f766e;
      color: #fff;
    }
    .total {
      font-weight: 700;
      background: #f3f4f6;
    }
    .footer {
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 14px;
      padding-top: 8px;
      border-top: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    }
    @media print {
      body { background: #fff; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
      .receipt {
        width: 100% !important;
        height: auto !important;
        max-width: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border: none !important;
        padding: 6mm 5mm !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="receipt-print payment-receipt">
  <div class="receipt">
    <div class="header">
      <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">{% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}</div>
      <h1>{{ company.name_ar if company else (print_branding.company_name_ar if print_branding is defined else (tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة')) }}</h1>
      <p>{{ company.address or '' }}</p>
      <p>هاتف: {{ company.phone or '' }}</p>
      {% if print_branch %}
      <p><strong>الفرع:</strong> {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}</p>
      {% if print_branch.address %}
      <p><strong>عنوان الفرع:</strong> {{ print_branch.address }}</p>
      {% endif %}
      {% endif %}
      <h2 style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; font-size: 14px;">{{ 'سند صرف' if is_payment else 'سند قبض' }}</h2>
    </div>
    
    {% set doc_title = ('💸 سند صرف' if is_payment else '💵 سند قبض') %}
    {% set doc_number = doc_number or receipt.receipt_number or receipt.payment_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}
    
    <div class="info-row">
      <div><span class="info-label">رقم السند:</span> {{ doc_number or receipt.receipt_number or receipt.payment_number }}</div>
      <div><span class="info-label">التاريخ:</span> {{ (receipt.receipt_date or receipt.payment_date).strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if (receipt.receipt_date or receipt.payment_date) else '' }}</div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="info-row">
      <div>
        <span class="info-label">{{ 'المورد' if is_payment else 'العميل' }}:</span>
        {{ receipt.supplier_name if is_payment else (receipt.customer.name if receipt.customer else 'عميل نقدي') }}
      </div>
      <div><span class="info-label">المستخدم:</span> {{ print_user_name or (receipt.user.full_name if receipt.user else 'موظف') }}</div>
    </div>
    
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>البيان</th>
          <th>المبلغ</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td>المبلغ ({{ receipt.currency or tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</td>
          <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ receipt.currency or tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
        </tr>
        {% if receipt.payment_method %}
        <tr>
          <td>طريقة الدفع</td>
          <td>
            {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cash' %}نقدي
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'card' %}بطاقة
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}تحويل بنكي
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' %}شيك
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'e_wallet' %}محفظة إلكترونية
            {% else %}{{ receipt.payment_method }}{% endif %}
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endif %}
        {% if receipt.reference_number %}
        <tr>
          <td>رقم المرجع</td>
          <td>{{ receipt.reference_number }}</td>
        </tr>
        {% endif %}
      </tbody>
      <tfoot>
        <tr class="total">
          <td>الإجمالي</td>
          <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ receipt.currency or tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</td>
        </tr>
      </tfoot>
    </table>

    {% set _payment_words = amount_in_words or (number_to_arabic_words(receipt.base_amount or receipt.amount or 0, receipt.currency or tenant_default_currency or 'AED') if number_to_arabic_words is defined else '') %}
    <div style="margin: 10px 0; padding: 8px 10px; background: #f8fafc; border-right: 4px solid #64748b; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 9px; color: #1f2937;">
      <strong>المبلغ بالحروف:</strong> {{ _payment_words or ("{:.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) + " " + (receipt.currency or tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED')) }}
    </div>
    {% if qr_data_url %}
    <div style="margin: 10px 0 6px 0; text-align: center;">
      <img src="{{ qr_data_url }}" alt="QR" style="width: 110px; height: 110px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px; background: #fff;">
      <div style="font-size: 8px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px;">رمز تحقق السند</div>
    </div>
    {% endif %}
    
    {% if receipt.notes %}
    <div style="margin-top: 20px;">
      <strong>ملاحظات:</strong> {{ receipt.notes }}
    </div>
    {% endif %}
    
    <div class="footer">
      <p>شكراً لتعاملكم معنا</p>
      <p style="font-size: 0.9em; color: #666;">تم الطباعة: {{ printed_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-primary" style="padding: 10px 30px; font-size: 1.1em;">
      <i class="fas fa-print"></i> طباعة
    </button>
    <button onclick="window.close()" class="btn btn-secondary" style="padding: 10px 30px; font-size: 1.1em; margin-right: 10px;">
      إغلاق
    </button>
  </div>
</body>
</html>

```

### File: templates\payments\receipts.html

Size: 9516 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:40:29

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - إدارة المدفوعات{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}جميع المدفوعات{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
@media print {
  @page {
    size: A4 landscape;
    margin: 10mm;
  }

  body {
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    font-size: 11pt;
    direction: rtl;
  }

  .main-sidebar,
  .main-header,
  .main-footer,
  .content-header,
  .btn,
  .card-header,
  .card-footer,
  .dataTables_filter,
  .dataTables_length,
  .dataTables_paginate,
  .dataTables_info,
  .dt-buttons,
  .dropdown-menu {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .content-wrapper {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }

  .card {
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  .table-responsive {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }

  table {
    width: 100% !important;
    border-collapse: collapse !important;
  }

  table th,
  table td {
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6 !important;
    padding: 6px 8px !important;
    text-align: center !important;
  }

  table thead th {
    background: #198754 !important;
    color: #fff !important;
  }

  table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
    background: #f8f9fa !important;
  }
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
    <h3 class="card-title mb-0">
      <i class="fas fa-wallet mr-2"></i>إدارة المدفوعات
    </h3>
    <div class="btn-group">
      <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" id="printReceiptsBtn">
        <i class="fas fa-print mr-1"></i>طباعة
      </button>
      <a href="{{ url_for('payments.create_voucher') }}" class="btn btn-success">
        <i class="fas fa-plus mr-2"></i>سند قبض جديد
      </a>
      <a href="{{ url_for('payments.archived_receipts') }}" class="btn btn-warning">
        <i class="fas fa-archive mr-2"></i>الأرشيف
      </a>
      <div class="btn-group">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary dropdown-toggle" data-toggle="dropdown">
          <i class="fas fa-filter mr-1"></i>فلترة
        </button>
        <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-right">
          <a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts', direction='') }}">
            <i class="fas fa-list mr-1"></i>الكل
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts', direction='incoming') }}">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-down mr-1 text-success"></i>سندات القبض (وارد)
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts', direction='outgoing') }}">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-up mr-1 text-danger"></i>سندات الصرف (صادر)
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table id="receiptsTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped" data-lang-url="{{ url_for('static', filename='datatables/Arabic.json') }}">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>رقم السند</th>
          <th>العميل/المورد</th>
          <th>{{ t('Date') }}</th>
          <th>{{ t('Amount') }}</th>
          <th>النوع</th>
          <th>الاتجاه</th>
          <th>المصدر</th>
          <th>الطريقة</th>
          {% if show_branch_columns %}
          <th>الفرع</th>
          {% endif %}
          <th>الحالة</th>
          <th>الإجراءات</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for item in receipts %}
        <tr>
          <td>
            <strong>{{ item.number }}</strong>
            {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">سند قبض</small>
            {% else %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">سند صرف</small>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.customer_name %}
              <i class="fas fa-user text-primary mr-1"></i>{{ item.customer_name }}
            {% elif item.supplier_name %}
              <i class="fas fa-truck text-danger mr-1"></i>{{ item.supplier_name }}
            {% else %}
              -
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>{{ item.date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
          <td>
            <strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.amount) }} {{ item.currency }}</strong>
            {% if item.currency != tenant_default_currency %}
              <br><small class="text-muted">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</small>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
              <span class="badge badge-success">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-down mr-1"></i>قبض
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-danger">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up mr-1"></i>صرف
              </span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.direction == 'incoming' %}
              <span class="badge badge-success">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-down mr-1"></i>وارد
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-danger">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up mr-1"></i>صادر
              </span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            {% if item.source_type == 'sale' %}
              <span class="badge badge-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-1"></i>مبيعات
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'supplier_payment' %}
              <span class="badge badge-warning">
                <i class="fas fa-truck mr-1"></i>مورد
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'customer_payment' %}
              <span class="badge badge-info">
                <i class="fas fa-user mr-1"></i>عميل
              </span>
            {% elif item.source_type == 'refund' %}
              <span class="badge badge-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-undo mr-1"></i>استرداد
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-secondary">{{ item.source_type }}</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td><span class="badge badge-info">{{ item.payment_method }}</span></td>
          {% if show_branch_columns %}
          <td>
            {% if item.branch_label and item.branch_label != '-' %}
              <span class="badge badge-light border">{{ item.branch_label }}</span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="text-muted">-</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          {% endif %}
          <td>
            {% if item.payment_confirmed %}
              <span class="badge badge-success">
                <i class="fas fa-check mr-1"></i>مؤكد
              </span>
            {% else %}
              <span class="badge badge-warning">
                <i class="fas fa-clock mr-1"></i>معلق
              </span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm">
              {% if item.type == 'receipt' %}
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.view_receipt', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-info" title="عرض">
                  <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                </a>
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.print_receipt', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank" title="طباعة">
                  <i class="fas fa-print"></i>
                </a>
              {% else %}
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.view_payment', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-info" title="عرض">
                  <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                </a>
                <a href="{{ url_for('payments.print_payment', id=item.id) }}" 
                   class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank" title="طباعة">
                  <i class="fas fa-print"></i>
                </a>
              {% endif %}
              <button type="button" class="btn btn-warning js-archive-payment"
                      data-item-type="{{ item.type }}"
                      data-item-id="{{ item.id }}"
                      data-item-number="{{ item.number }}"
                      title="أرشفة">
                <i class="fas fa-archive"></i>
              </button>
              <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" 
                      onclick="deleteItem('{{ item.type }}s', {{ item.id }}, '{{ item.number }}')" 
                      title="حذف">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% set endpoint = 'payments.receipts' %}
  {% include 'partials/flask_pagination.html' %}
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script defer src="{{ url_for('static', filename='js/payments-receipts-page.js') }}"></script>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payments\view_receipt.html

Size: 6173 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:40:50

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - سند قبض #{{ receipt.receipt_number }}{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}سند قبض رقم: {{ receipt.receipt_number }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <a href="{{ url_for('payments.print_receipt', id=receipt.id) }}" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank">
      <i class="fas fa-print mr-2"></i>طباعة
    </a>
    
    {% if is_payment %}
    <form action="{{ url_for('payments.delete_payment', id=receipt.id) }}" method="POST" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('هل أنت متأكد من حذف سند الصرف هذا؟\n\nتنبيه: سيتم أرشفة السند إذا كان مرتبطاً بشيكات، أو حذفه نهائياً إذا كان غير مرتبط.');">
      <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">
        <i class="fas fa-trash mr-2"></i>حذف
      </button>
    </form>
    {% else %}
    <form action="{{ url_for('payments.delete_receipt', id=receipt.id) }}" method="POST" class="d-inline" onsubmit="return confirm('هل أنت متأكد من حذف سند القبض هذا؟\n\nتنبيه: سيتم أرشفة السند إذا كان له تخصيصات أو مرتبط بشيكات، أو حذفه نهائياً إذا كان غير مرتبط.');">
      <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger">
        <i class="fas fa-trash mr-2"></i>حذف
      </button>
    </form>
    {% endif %}

    <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="btn btn-info">
      <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>العودة
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="row">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header bg-gradient-success">
        <h3 class="card-title text-white">تفاصيل السند</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <dl class="row">
          <dt class="col-sm-5">رقم السند:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7"><strong>
            {% if is_payment %}
              {{ receipt.payment_number }}
            {% else %}
              {{ receipt.receipt_number }}
            {% endif %}
          </strong></dd>
          
          <dt class="col-sm-5">الزبون:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7">
            {% if is_payment %}
              {% if receipt.customer %}
                <a href="{{ url_for('customers.view', id=receipt.customer.id) }}">{{ receipt.customer.name }}</a>
              {% else %}
                {{ receipt.supplier_name or '-' }}
              {% endif %}
            {% else %}
              <a href="{{ url_for('customers.view', id=receipt.customer.id) }}">{{ receipt.customer.name }}</a>
            {% endif %}
          </dd>
          
          <dt class="col-sm-5">التاريخ:</dt>
                <dd class="col-sm-7">
                  {% if is_payment %}
                    {{ receipt.payment_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}
                  {% else %}
                    {{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}
                  {% endif %}
                </dd>
          
          <dt class="col-sm-5">المبلغ:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7"><h4 class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}</h4></dd>
          
          {% if receipt.currency != tenant_default_currency %}
          <dt class="col-sm-5">المبلغ ({{ tenant_currency_name_ar or 'درهم' }}):</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</dd>
          {% endif %}
          
          <dt class="col-sm-5">طريقة الدفع:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7"><span class="badge badge-success">{{ receipt.payment_method }}</span></dd>
          
          {% if receipt.reference_number %}
          <dt class="col-sm-5">رقم المرجع:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7">{{ receipt.reference_number }}</dd>
          {% endif %}
          
          {% if receipt.cheque_number %}
          <dt class="col-sm-5">رقم الشيك:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7">{{ receipt.cheque_number }}</dd>
          
          <dt class="col-sm-5">البنك:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7">{{ receipt.bank_name }}</dd>
          
          {% if receipt.cheque_date %}
          <dt class="col-sm-5">تاريخ استحقاق الشيك:</dt>
          <dd class="col-sm-7"><span class="badge badge-info">{{ receipt.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</span></dd>
          {% endif %}
          {% endif %}
        </dl>

        {% if receipt.notes %}
        <div class="alert alert-warning">
          <strong>📝 ملاحظات:</strong> {{ receipt.notes }}
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header">
        <h3 class="card-title">التخصيصات</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body p-0">
        <table class="table table-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>الفاتورة</th>
              <th>المبلغ المخصص</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {% set source_info = receipt.get_source_info() if not is_payment else None %}
            {% if source_info %}
              <tr>
                <td>{{ source_info.type }} #{{ source_info.number }} ({{ source_info.date }})</td>
                <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}</td>
              </tr>
            {% else %}
              <tr>
                <td colspan="2" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد تخصيصات (دفعة عامة)</td>
              </tr>
            {% endif %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\payments\voucher.html

Size: 10826 bytes
Modified: 06/05/2026 17:01:23

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - سند مالي موحد{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}إنشاء سند مالي (قبض/صرف){% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
.voucher-form .form-control,
.voucher-form .form-select {
  min-height: 48px;
  height: auto;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.voucher-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single {
  height: 48px;
  min-height: 48px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  border: 1px solid #ced4da;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.voucher-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single .select2-selection__rendered {
  line-height: 48px;
  padding-left: 10px;
}
.voucher-form .select2-container--default .select2-selection--single .select2-selection__arrow {
  height: 48px;
}
.type-card {
  cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: all 0.3s;
}
.type-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
.type-card.selected {
  border-color: #007bff;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="card voucher-form">
  <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
    <h3 class="card-title mb-0"><i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave mr-2"></i>سند مالي جديد</h3>
  </div>
  <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('payments.create_voucher_submit') }}" id="voucherForm">
    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
    
    <div class="card-body">
      
      <!-- 1. Voucher Direction (In/Out) -->
      <div class="row mb-4 justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-5">
          <div class="card type-card text-center p-3 selected" id="card-incoming" onclick="selectDirection('incoming')">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-down fa-2x text-success mb-2"></i>
            <h4>سند قبض (وارد)</h4>
            <p class="text-muted small mb-0">استلام أموال من عميل أو مورد</p>
            <input type="radio" name="direction" value="incoming" checked style="display:none;">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-5">
          <div class="card type-card text-center p-3" id="card-outgoing" onclick="selectDirection('outgoing')">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-up fa-2x text-danger mb-2"></i>
            <h4>سند صرف (صادر)</h4>
            <p class="text-muted small mb-0">دفع أموال لمورد أو عميل</p>
            <input type="radio" name="direction" value="outgoing" style="display:none;">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <hr>

      <!-- 2. Party Selection -->
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">نوع الجهة</label>
            <select class="form-control" name="party_type" id="party_type" onchange="updatePartyList()">
              <option value="customer">عميل / شريك / تاجر</option>
              <option value="supplier">مورد</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-8">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">اسم الجهة</label>
            <select class="form-control select2" name="party_id" id="party_id" required>
              <option value="">اختر الجهة...</option>
              <!-- Populated via JS -->
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">المبلغ</label>
            <div class="input-group">
              <input type="number" step="0.01" class="form-control font-weight-bold text-center" name="amount" id="amount" required placeholder="0.00">
              <div class="input-group-append">
                <span class="input-group-text" id="amount_currency_label">{{ preselected_currency or tenant_default_currency or 'AED' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">العملة</label>
            {% set selected_voucher_currency = preselected_currency or tenant_default_currency or 'AED' %}
            <select class="form-control" name="currency" id="currency">
              {% for code in ['AED','USD','EUR','GBP','SAR','QAR','KWD','BHD','OMR','ILS','JOD','EGP'] %}
              <option value="{{ code }}" {% if selected_voucher_currency == code %}selected{% endif %}>{{ code }}</option>
              {% endfor %}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">سعر الصرف</label>
            <input type="number" step="0.000001" min="0.000001" class="form-control" name="exchange_rate" id="exchange_rate" value="{{ preselected_exchange_rate or 1 }}">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="font-weight-bold">طريقة الدفع</label>
            <select class="form-control" name="payment_method" id="payment_method" onchange="toggleChequeFields()">
              <option value="cash">نقدي</option>
              <option value="bank_transfer">تحويل بنكي</option>
              <option value="cheque">شيك</option>
              <option value="card">بطاقة</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>التاريخ</label>
            <input type="date" class="form-control" name="date" value="{{ today_date }}">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Cheque Fields -->
      <div class="row bg-light p-3 rounded mb-3" id="cheque_fields" style="display: none;">
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group mb-0">
            <label>رقم الشيك</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" name="cheque_number">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group mb-0">
            <label>تاريخ الاستحقاق</label>
            <input type="date" class="form-control" name="cheque_date">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-4">
          <div class="form-group mb-0">
            <label>اسم البنك</label>
            <input type="text" class="form-control" name="bank_name">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-12">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>ملاحظات / البيان</label>
            <textarea class="form-control" name="notes" rows="3" placeholder="أدخل تفاصيل السند..."></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
    <div class="card-footer text-right">
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg px-5"><i class="fas fa-save mr-2"></i>حفظ السند</button>
      <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="btn btn-secondary btn-lg ml-2">إلغاء</a>
    </div>
  </form>
</div>

<!-- Data Store for JS -->
<div id="customers-data" style="display:none;">{{ customers_json|safe }}</div>
<div id="suppliers-data" style="display:none;">{{ suppliers_json|safe }}</div>

{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
function selectDirection(dir) {
  $('.type-card').removeClass('selected');
  $('#card-' + dir).addClass('selected');
  $('input[name="direction"][value="' + dir + '"]').prop('checked', true);
}

function toggleChequeFields() {
  if ($('#payment_method').val() === 'cheque') {
    $('#cheque_fields').slideDown();
  } else {
    $('#cheque_fields').slideUp();
  }
}

// Parse data
var customers = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('customers-data').textContent || '[]');
var suppliers = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('suppliers-data').textContent || '[]');

function updatePartyList() {
  var type = $('#party_type').val();
  var select = $('#party_id');
  select.empty();
  select.append('<option value="">اختر الجهة...</option>');
  
  var list = (type === 'customer') ? customers : suppliers;
  
  list.forEach(function(item) {
    var typeLabel = '';
    if (type === 'customer' && item.type !== 'regular') {
      typeLabel = ' (' + (item.type === 'merchant' ? 'تاجر' : 'شريك') + ')';
    }
    select.append('<option value="' + item.id + '">' + item.name + typeLabel + '</option>');
  });
  
  // Refresh Select2
  // Assuming select2 is initialized globally or we trigger it
  if ($.fn.select2) {
      select.trigger('change');
  }
}

async function loadVoucherRate() {
  var currency = $('#currency').val() || 'AED';
  $('#amount_currency_label').text(currency);
  if (currency === 'AED') {
    $('#exchange_rate').val('1.000000');
    return;
  }
  try {
    var response = await fetch('/api/currency-rate/' + encodeURIComponent(currency) + '/AED');
    var data = await response.json();
    if (data.success && data.rate) {
      $('#exchange_rate').val(Number(data.rate).toFixed(6));
    }
  } catch (err) {
    // Keep the manual value if the live lookup is unavailable.
  }
}

$(document).ready(function() {
  $('.select2').select2({
    theme: 'bootstrap4',
    width: '100%'
  });
  updatePartyList();

  var preDirection = {{ preselected_direction|default('incoming')|tojson }};
  var prePartyType = {{ preselected_party_type|default('customer')|tojson }};
  var prePartyId = {{ preselected_party_id|default(none)|tojson }};
  var preAmount = {{ preselected_amount|default(none)|tojson }};
  var preCurrency = {{ preselected_currency|default(none)|tojson }};
  var preExchangeRate = {{ preselected_exchange_rate|default(none)|tojson }};

  if (preDirection && preDirection !== 'incoming') {
    selectDirection(preDirection);
  }
  if (prePartyType) {
    $('#party_type').val(prePartyType);
    updatePartyList();
  }
  if (prePartyId) {
    $('#party_id').val(String(prePartyId)).trigger('change');
  }
  if (preAmount) {
    $('#amount').val(preAmount);
  }
  if (preCurrency) {
    $('#currency').val(preCurrency);
    $('#amount_currency_label').text(preCurrency);
  }
  if (preExchangeRate) {
    $('#exchange_rate').val(preExchangeRate);
  }
  $('#currency').on('change', loadVoucherRate);
  if (!preExchangeRate) {
    loadVoucherRate();
  }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

```

---

### File: templates\payroll\add_employee.html

Size: 3413 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}إضافة موظف{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header bg-gradient-purple text-white">
      <h3><i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> إضافة موظف جديد</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <form method="post">
        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>الاسم الكامل (English)</label>
                    <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control" required>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>الاسم بالعربية</label>
                    <input type="text" name="name_ar" class="form-control">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>الهاتف</label>
                    <input type="text" name="phone" class="form-control">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>الفرع <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
                    <select name="branch_id" class="form-control" required>
                        <option value="">-- اختر الفرع --</option>
                        {% for branch in branches %}
                        <option value="{{ branch.id }}">{{ branch.name }}</option>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </select>
                    <small class="text-muted">إجباري لكل موظف.</small>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>تاريخ الانضمام</label>
                    <input type="date" name="joined_date" class="form-control" value="{{ now }}">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <hr>
        
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>نظام الدفع</label>
                    <select name="employment_type" class="form-control">
                        <option value="salary">راتب شهري (Monthly Salary)</option>
                        <option value="daily">مياومة (Daily Wages)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>القيمة الأساسية</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.01" name="basic_salary" class="form-control" placeholder="الراتب الشهري أو أجرة اليوم" required>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> حفظ</button>
        <a href="{{ url_for('payroll.employees_list') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">إلغاء</a>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\payroll\advances.html

Size: 3208 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}السلف المقدمة{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header bg-gradient-warning text-white">
                <h3 class="card-title">تسجيل سلفة جديدة</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label>الموظف</label>
                        <select name="employee_id" class="form-control select2" required>
                            {% for emp in employees %}
                            <option value="{{ emp.id }}">{{ emp.name }}</option>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label>قيمة السلفة</label>
                        <input type="number" step="0.01" name="amount" class="form-control" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label>ملاحظات</label>
                        <textarea name="description" class="form-control" rows="3"></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-warning btn-block">صرف السلفة</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="col-md-8">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title">آخر السلف</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body p-0">
                <table class="table table-striped">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>التاريخ</th>
                            <th>الموظف</th>
                            <th>المبلغ</th>
                            <th>الحالة</th>
                            <th>البيان</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for adv in advances %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ adv.date }}</td>
                            <td>{{ adv.employee.name }}</td>
                            <td>{{ adv.amount }}</td>
                            <td>
                                {% if adv.is_deducted %}
                                <span class="badge badge-success">تم الخصم</span>
                                {% else %}
                                <span class="badge badge-warning">معلق</span>
                                {% endif %}
                            </td>
                            <td>{{ adv.description }}</td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\payroll\employees.html

Size: 4207 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}الموظفين{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
  #employeesTable th,
  #employeesTable td {
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  #employeesTable .actions-cell {
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
  (function() {
    const tableSelector = '#employeesTable';
    const languageUrl = "{{ url_for('static', filename='datatables/Arabic.json') }}";

    function initEmployeesTable() {
      const $table = $(tableSelector);
      if (!$table.length || !$.fn.DataTable) {
        return;
      }
      if ($.fn.DataTable.isDataTable($table)) {
        return;
      }

      $table.DataTable({
        language: { url: languageUrl },
        pageLength: 25,
        lengthMenu: [[10, 25, 50, 100, -1], [10, 25, 50, 100, "الكل"]],
        responsive: true,
        autoWidth: false,
        order: [[0, 'asc']],
        columnDefs: [
          { orderable: false, targets: -1 },
          { searchable: false, targets: -1 }
        ]
      });
    }

    $(document).ready(initEmployeesTable);
  })();
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="mb-3 d-flex flex-wrap" style="gap:.5rem;">
    <span class="badge badge-primary">
      <i class="fas fa-users"></i> الإجمالي: {{ employees|length }}
    </span>
    <span class="badge badge-success">
      <i class="fas fa-money-check"></i> راتب شهري: {{ employees|selectattr('employment_type', 'equalto', 'salary')|list|length }}
    </span>
    <span class="badge badge-warning">
      <i class="fas fa-business-time"></i> مياومة: {{ employees|selectattr('employment_type', 'equalto', 'daily')|list|length }}
    </span>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header bg-gradient-purple text-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2">
      <h3 class="card-title mb-0"><i class="fas fa-users-cog"></i> الموظفين</h3>
      <a href="{{ url_for('payroll.add_employee') }}" class="btn btn-light btn-sm position-relative" style="z-index: 2;">
        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> إضافة موظف
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <table id="employeesTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>الاسم</th>
            {% if show_branch_columns %}
            <th>الفرع</th>
            {% else %}
            <th>الوظيفة/الفرع</th>
            {% endif %}
            <th>الهاتف</th>
            <th>نوع التوظيف</th>
            <th>الراتب الأساسي</th>
            <th>الإجراءات</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for emp in employees %}
          <tr>
            <td>{{ emp.name }} <br> <small class="text-muted">{{ emp.name_ar }}</small></td>
            <td>
              {% if show_branch_columns %}
                {% if emp.branch %}
                  <span class="badge badge-light border">{{ emp.branch.name }}{% if emp.branch.code %} ({{ emp.branch.code }}){% endif %}</span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="text-muted">-</span>
                {% endif %}
              {% else %}
                {{ emp.branch.name if emp.branch else 'عام' }}
              {% endif %}
            </td>
            <td>{{ emp.phone }}</td>
            <td>
                {% if emp.employment_type == 'salary' %}
                <span class="badge badge-success">راتب شهري</span>
                {% else %}
                <span class="badge badge-warning">مياومة</span>
                {% endif %}
            </td>
            <td>{{ emp.basic_salary }} {{ emp.currency }}</td>
            <td class="actions-cell">
                <a href="{{ url_for('payroll.statement', id=emp.id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-info" title="كشف حساب"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i></a>
            </td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\payroll\process.html

Size: 9274 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}صرف الرواتب{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  
  <!-- Branch Payroll Generation -->
  <div class="row mb-3">
    <div class="col-md-12">
        <div class="card card-primary collapsed-card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> توليد رواتب الفرع (دفعة واحدة)</h3>
                <div class="card-tools">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-tool" data-card-widget="collapse"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <input type="hidden" name="generate_branch" value="1">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>الفرع</label>
                                <select name="branch_id" class="form-control select2" required>
                                    {% for branch in branches %}
                                    <option value="{{ branch.id }}">{{ branch.name }}</option>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>الشهر</label>
                                <select name="month" class="form-control">
                                    {% for i in range(1, 13) %}
                                    <option value="{{ i }}" {% if i == today.month %}selected{% endif %}>{{ i }}</option>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>السنة</label>
                                <input type="number" name="year" class="form-control" value="{{ today.year }}">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-2">
                             <div class="form-group">
                                <label>&nbsp;</label>
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-block">توليد الرواتب</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="alert alert-warning mt-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> سيتم توليد رواتب جميع موظفين الفرع (نظام الراتب الشهري) فقط. موظفي المياومة يجب معالجتهم فردياً لتحديد أيام العمل.
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-md-12">
        <div class="card collapsed-card">
            <div class="card-header bg-gradient-success text-white">
                <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave"></i> معالجة راتب موظف (فردي)</h3>
                <div class="card-tools">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-tool" data-card-widget="collapse"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>الموظف</label>
                                <select name="employee_id" class="form-control select2" required>
                                    {% for emp in employees %}
                                    <option value="{{ emp.id }}">{{ emp.name }} ({{ emp.employment_type }})</option>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-2">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>الشهر</label>
                                <select name="month" class="form-control">
                                    {% for i in range(1, 13) %}
                                    <option value="{{ i }}" {% if i == today.month %}selected{% endif %}>{{ i }}</option>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-2">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>السنة</label>
                                <input type="number" name="year" class="form-control" value="{{ today.year }}">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-2">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>أيام العمل (للمياومة)</label>
                                <input type="number" name="days_worked" class="form-control" value="0">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>بدلات / إضافي</label>
                                <input type="number" step="0.01" name="allowances" class="form-control" value="0">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-3">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label>خصومات</label>
                                <input type="number" step="0.01" name="deductions" class="form-control" value="0">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <div class="alert alert-info mt-4">
                                سيتم خصم السلف المعلقة تلقائياً.
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success">اعتماد وصرف</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="row mt-3">
      <div class="col-12">
          <div class="card">
              <div class="card-header">
                  <h3 class="card-title">سجل الرواتب المصروفة</h3>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body">
                  <table class="table table-bordered">
                      <thead>
                          <tr>
                              <th>التاريخ</th>
                              <th>الموظف</th>
                              <th>الفترة</th>
                              <th>الأساسي</th>
                              <th>إضافي</th>
                              <th>خصومات</th>
                              <th>سلف</th>
                              <th>الصافي</th>
                              <th>طباعة</th>
                          </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                          {% for t in transactions %}
                          <tr>
                              <td>{{ t.payment_date }}</td>
                              <td>{{ t.employee.name }}</td>
                              <td>{{ t.month }}/{{ t.year }}</td>
                              <td>{{ t.basic_amount }}</td>
                              <td class="text-success">{{ t.allowances }}</td>
                              <td class="text-danger">{{ t.deductions }}</td>
                              <td class="text-warning">{{ t.advances_deducted }}</td>
                              <td class="font-weight-bold">{{ t.net_salary }}</td>
                              <td>
                                  <a href="{{ url_for('payroll.salary_slip', id=t.id) }}" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-print"></i></a>
                              </td>
                          </tr>
                          {% endfor %}
                      </tbody>
                  </table>
              </div>
          </div>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\payroll\slip.html

Size: 3185 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 21:12:42

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}قسيمة راتب{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container">
    <div class="card mt-5 shadow">
        <div class="card-body p-5" id="printable">
            <div class="text-center mb-4">
                <h2>قسيمة راتب / Salary Slip</h2>
                <hr>
            </div>
            <div class="row mb-4">
                <div class="col-6">
                    <p><strong>الموظف:</strong> {{ t.employee.name }}</p>
                    <p><strong>الفرع:</strong> {{ t.employee.branch.name if t.employee.branch else 'المركز الرئيسي' }}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="col-6 text-right">
                    <p><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ t.payment_date }}</p>
                    <p><strong>الفترة:</strong> {{ t.month }}/{{ t.year }}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <table class="table table-bordered">
                <thead class="bg-light">
                    <tr>
                        <th>البند</th>
                        <th class="text-center">المبلغ</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <tr>
                        <td>الراتب الأساسي / الأجر</td>
                        <td class="text-center">{{ t.basic_amount }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td>بدلات وإضافي</td>
                        <td class="text-center text-success">{{ t.allowances }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td>خصومات</td>
                        <td class="text-center text-danger">({{ t.deductions }})</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td>سلف مستردة</td>
                        <td class="text-center text-warning">({{ t.advances_deducted }})</td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody>
                <tfoot>
                    <tr class="h4">
                        <th>صافي الراتب / Net Salary</th>
                        <th class="text-center">{{ t.net_salary }} {{ tenant_default_currency or 'AED' }}</th>
                    </tr>
                </tfoot>
            </table>
            
            <div class="row mt-5">
                <div class="col-6">
                    <p class="text-muted">توقيع المحاسب</p>
                    <br>..........................
                </div>
                <div class="col-6 text-right">
                    <p class="text-muted">توقيع الموظف</p>
                    <br>..........................
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-footer d-print-none">
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-print"></i> طباعة</button>
            <a href="{{ url_for('payroll.process_payroll') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">العودة</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\payroll\statement.html

Size: 2600 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:12

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}كشف حساب موظف{% endblock %}
{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header bg-gradient-info text-white">
            <h3 class="card-title">كشف حساب: {{ employee.name }}</h3>
            <div class="card-tools">
                <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-tool"><i class="fas fa-print"></i></button>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="row mb-3">
                <div class="col-md-6">
                    <p><strong>الاسم:</strong> {{ employee.name }}</p>
                    <p><strong>الفرع:</strong> {{ employee.branch.name if employee.branch else 'عام' }}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-6 text-left">
                    <p><strong>الراتب الأساسي:</strong> {{ employee.basic_salary }}</p>
                    <p><strong>تاريخ الطباعة:</strong> {{ now }}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>التاريخ</th>
                        <th>النوع</th>
                        <th>البيان</th>
                        <th class="text-center">المبلغ</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for item in history %}
                    <tr>
                        <td>{{ item.date }}</td>
                        <td>
                            {% if item.type == 'سلفة' %}
                            <span class="badge badge-warning">{{ item.type }}</span>
                            {% else %}
                            <span class="badge badge-success">{{ item.type }}</span>
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                        <td>{{ item.desc }}</td>
                        <td class="text-center" dir="ltr">
                            {% if item.amount < 0 %}
                            <span class="text-danger">{{ item.amount }}</span>
                            {% else %}
                            <span class="text-success">+{{ item.amount }}</span>
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

### File: templates\pos\index.html

Size: 27218 bytes
Modified: 06/05/2026 16:52:47

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}نقطة البيع POS{% endblock %}

{% block page_title %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
  <div>
    <h1 class="mb-0"><i class="fas fa-cash-register mr-2"></i>نقطة البيع (POS)</h1>
    <p class="text-muted mb-0">شاشة كاشير سريعة للباركود والطباعة</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <a href="{{ url_for('sales.index') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-2"></i>المبيعات
    </a>
    <a href="{{ url_for('main.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
      <i class="fas fa-home mr-2"></i>الرئيسية
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
  .pos-wrap .form-control { min-height: 44px; }
  .pos-cart-table td, .pos-cart-table th { vertical-align: middle; }
  .pos-cart-table input { min-height: 38px; }
  .pos-results { max-height: 280px; overflow: auto; }
  .pos-kpi { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#667eea 0%,#764ba2 100%); color: #fff; border-radius: 12px; }
  .pos-kpi .value { font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 800; }
  @media (max-width: 991px) {
    .pos-right { margin-top: 12px; }
  }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="pos-wrap">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-lg-8">
      <div class="card card-outline card-primary">
        <div class="card-header">
          <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-barcode mr-2"></i>إضافة منتجات</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="mb-1">العميل</label>
              <div class="input-group">
                <input id="customerSearch" class="form-control" placeholder="ابحث بالاسم أو الهاتف (F4)">
                <div class="input-group-append">
                  <button id="walkinCustomer" class="btn btn-outline-primary" type="button" title="عميل نقدي سريع">نقدي</button>
                  <button id="clearCustomer" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">مسح</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div id="customerResults" class="list-group mt-2 pos-results d-none"></div>
              <div class="text-muted mt-2" id="customerSelectedHint">لم يتم اختيار عميل بعد — أو اضغط «نقدي»</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="mb-1">بحث/باركود</label>
              <div class="input-group">
                <input id="productSearch" class="form-control" placeholder="امسح الباركود أو اكتب الاسم/الكود">
                <div class="input-group-append">
                  <button id="clearProductSearch" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">مسح</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div id="productResults" class="list-group mt-2 pos-results d-none"></div>
              <div class="text-muted mt-2">Enter / F2 لإضافة · F8 حفظ+طباعة · Esc مسح البحث</div>
              <div id="productLoading" class="small text-info d-none mt-1"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> جاري البحث…</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <hr>

          <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover pos-cart-table mb-0">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th style="width: 38%;">المنتج</th>
                  <th style="width: 12%;">الكمية</th>
                  <th style="width: 14%;">السعر</th>
                  <th style="width: 10%;">خصم%</th>
                  <th style="width: 16%;">الإجمالي</th>
                  <th style="width: 10%;"></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="cartBody">
                <tr id="cartEmptyRow">
                  <td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-4">السلة فارغة</td>
                </tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-lg-4 pos-right">
      <div class="card pos-kpi">
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
            <div>
              <div>الإجمالي</div>
              <div class="value"><span id="kpiTotal">0.00</span> <span id="kpiCurrency">{{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="text-right">
              <div class="small">المجموع</div>
              <div><strong id="kpiSubtotal">0.00</strong></div>
              <div class="small mt-2">الخصم</div>
              <div><strong id="kpiDiscount">0.00</strong></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card card-outline card-info">
        <div class="card-header">
          <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-sliders-h mr-2"></i>إعدادات الفاتورة</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>المستودع</label>
            <select id="warehouseId" class="form-control">
              <option value="">تلقائي (الرئيسي)</option>
              {% for w in warehouses %}
                <option value="{{ w.id }}">{{ w.name_ar or w.name }}{% if w.is_main %} (رئيسي){% endif %}</option>
              {% endfor %}
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>العملة</label>
                <select id="currency" class="form-control">
                  <option value="{{ tenant_default_currency or 'AED' }}" selected>{{ tenant_default_currency or 'AED' }}</option>
                  <option value="USD">USD</option>
                  <option value="EUR">EUR</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>سعر الصرف</label>
                <input id="exchangeRate" type="number" step="0.000001" class="form-control" value="1">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="row" id="pos-tax-row" {% if not tenant_enable_tax %}style="display:none"{% endif %}>
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>ضريبة %</label>
                {% set _default_tax_rate = (tenant_default_tax_rate if tenant_enable_tax else 0) %}
                <input id="taxRate" type="number" step="0.01" class="form-control" value="{{ _default_tax_rate }}">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>شحن</label>
                <input id="shippingCost" type="number" step="0.01" class="form-control" value="0">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label>خصم عام</label>
            <input id="discountAmount" type="number" step="0.01" class="form-control" value="0">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card card-outline card-success">
        <div class="card-header">
          <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-credit-card mr-2"></i>الدفع</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>طريقة الدفع</label>
            <select id="paymentMethod" class="form-control">
              <option value="">بدون دفع الآن (آجل)</option>
              <option value="cash">نقدي</option>
              <option value="card">بطاقة</option>
              <option value="bank_transfer">تحويل بنكي</option>
              <option value="cheque">شيك</option>
              <option value="e_wallet">محفظة إلكترونية</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>المبلغ المدفوع</label>
                <input id="paidAmount" type="number" step="0.01" class="form-control" value="0">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-6">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label>رقم مرجع</label>
                <input id="referenceNumber" class="form-control" placeholder="اختياري">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <button id="checkoutBtn" class="btn btn-success btn-block btn-lg">
            <i class="fas fa-check mr-2"></i>حفظ الفاتورة
          </button>
          <button id="checkoutPrintBtn" class="btn btn-primary btn-block mt-2">
            <i class="fas fa-print mr-2"></i>حفظ + طباعة
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div id="posAlert" class="alert d-none"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal fade" id="posDoneModal" tabindex="-1" role="dialog" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered" role="document">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title">تم إنشاء الفاتورة</h5>
        <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close">
          <span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <div>رقم الفاتورة: <strong id="doneSaleNumber"></strong></div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <a id="doneViewBtn" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" href="#" target="_blank">عرض</a>
        <a id="donePrintBtn" class="btn btn-primary" href="#" target="_blank">طباعة</a>
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" data-dismiss="modal">إغلاق</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
  (function(){
    const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') || '';
    const state = {
      customer: null,
      cart: [],
      lastProductResults: []
    };

    const qs = (s, r=document) => r.querySelector(s);
    const qsa = (s, r=document) => Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
    const fmt = (n) => (Number(n || 0)).toFixed(2);
    const toNum = (v) => {
      const n = Number(v);
      return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
    };
    const baseCurrency = '{{ tenant_default_currency or "AED" }}';
    const selectedCurrency = () => qs('#currency').value || baseCurrency;
    const currentRate = () => toNum(qs('#exchangeRate').value) || 1;
    const priceForCurrency = (basePrice) => {
      const rate = currentRate();
      if (selectedCurrency() !== baseCurrency && rate > 0) {
        return toNum(basePrice) / rate;
      }
      return toNum(basePrice);
    };
    const updateCartPrices = () => {
      state.cart.forEach(it => {
        if (!Number.isFinite(Number(it.basePrice))) {
          it.basePrice = it.price;
        }
        it.price = priceForCurrency(it.basePrice);
      });
      renderCart();
    };
    const loadRateForCurrency = async () => {
      const currency = selectedCurrency();
      if (currency === baseCurrency) {
        qs('#exchangeRate').value = '1';
        updateCartPrices();
        return;
      }
      try {
        const r = await fetch(`/api/currency-rate/${encodeURIComponent(currency)}/${encodeURIComponent(baseCurrency)}`);
        const data = await r.json();
        if (data.success && data.rate) {
          qs('#exchangeRate').value = Number(data.rate).toFixed(6);
        }
      } catch (_) {
        // Keep the user-entered rate if the live lookup fails.
      }
      updateCartPrices();
    };
    const showAlert = (msg, level='danger') => {
      const el = qs('#posAlert');
      el.className = 'alert alert-' + level;
      el.textContent = msg;
      el.classList.remove('d-none');
      setTimeout(()=>{ el.classList.add('d-none'); }, 5000);
    };

    const customerHint = () => {
      const el = qs('#customerSelectedHint'

```

### File: templates\products\categories.html

Size: 6333 bytes
Modified: 05/23/2026 10:44:13

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - فئات المنتجات{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="content-wrapper">
    <div class="content-header">
        <div class="container-fluid">
            <div class="row mb-2">
                <div class="col-sm-6">
                    <h1 class="m-0">فئات المنتجات</h1>
                </div>
                <div class="col-sm-6">
                    <div class="float-right">
                        <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#addCategoryModal">
                            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> إضافة فئة جديدة
                        </button>
                        <a href="{{ url_for('products.index') }}" class="btn btn-secondary">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right mr-2"></i>العودة للمنتجات
                        </a>
                        <a href="{{ url_for('main.dashboard') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                            <i class="fas fa-home mr-2"></i>الرئيسية
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <section class="content">
        <div class="container-fluid">
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col-12">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-header">
                            <h3 class="card-title">فئات المنتجات</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <div class="table-responsive">
                                <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                                    <thead>
                                        <tr>
                                            <th>{{ t('Name') }}</th>
                                            <th>الاسم بالعربية</th>
                                            <th>{{ t('Description') }}</th>
                                            <th>عدد المنتجات</th>
                                            <th>{{ t('Status') }}</th>
                                            <th>الإجراءات</th>
                                        </tr>
                                    </thead>
                                    <tbody>
                                        {% for category in categories %}
                                        <tr>
                                            <td>{{ category.name }}</td>
                                            <td>{{ category.name_ar or '' }}</td>
                                            <td>{{ category.description or '' }}</td>
                                            <td>{{ category.products.count() if category.products else 0 }}</td>
                                            <td>
                                                {% if category.is_active %}
                                                    <span class="badge badge-success">{{ t('Active') }}</span>
                                                {% else %}
                                                    <span class="badge badge-danger">{{ t('Inactive') }}</span>
                                                {% endif %}
                                            </td>
                                            <td>
                                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> تعديل
                                                </button>
                                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">
                                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> حذف
                                                </button>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                        {% endfor %}
                                    </tbody>
                                </table>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
</div>

<!-- Modal for adding new category -->
<div class="modal fade" id="addCategoryModal" tabindex="-1" role="dialog">
    <div class="modal-dialog" role="document">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title">إضافة فئة منتج جديدة</h5>
                <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal">
                    <span>&times;</span>
                </button>
            </div>
            <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('products.create_category') }}">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                <div class="modal-body">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="name">الاسم:</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="name" name="name" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="name_ar">الاسم بالعربية:</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="name_ar" name="name_ar">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="description">الوصف:</label>
                        <textarea class="form-control" id="description" name="description" rows="3"></textarea>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-footer">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-dismiss="modal">{{ t('Cancel') }}</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">{{ t('Add') }}</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```
