```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>سند قبض - {{ receipt.receipt_number }}</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Cairo', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      background: #34495e;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #2c3e50;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: flex-start;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size or 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation or 'portrait' }};
      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .receipt {
      {% if settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '148mm' }};
      {% elif settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '279mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '216mm' }};
      {% else %}
        width: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '297mm' }};
        height: {{ '297mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '210mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      padding: 0;
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      overflow: auto;
    }
    .header {
      background: {{ settings.header_color or '#28a745' }};
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      border-bottom: 4px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#20c997' }};
    }
    .header-content {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .company-info-left {
      text-align: right;
      flex: 1;
    }
    .company-name { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .company-details { font-size: 9px; line-height: 1.6; opacity: 0.95; }
    .receipt-info-right {
      text-align: left;
    }
    .receipt-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.9; }
    .receipt-number-large { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
    .content { padding: 10px; }
    .section {
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      padding: 8px;
      background: #f8f9fa;
      border-left: 4px solid {{ settings.accent_color or '#20c997' }};
    }
    .section-title {
      font-size: 9px;
      color: {{ settings.header_color or '#28a745' }};
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }
    .info-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 5px 0;
      font-size: 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    }
    .info-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .info-row label { color: #7f8c8d; }
    .info-row value { font-weight: 600; color: #2c3e50; }
    .amount-display {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 20px;
      margin: 20px 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, {{ settings.header_color or '#28a745' }} 0%, {{ settings.accent_color or '#20c997' }} 100%);
      color: white;
      border-radius: 10px;
    }
    .amount-text { font-size: 9px; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .amount-big { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; }
    .payment-box {
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 6px;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .payment-method-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 6px 12px;
      background: {{ settings.accent_color or '#20c997' }};
      color: white;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .cheque-card {
      background: linear-gradient(to right, #fff3cd 0%, #ffeaa7 100%);
      border: 1px solid #fdcb6e;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 6px;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }
    .cheque-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 10px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .cheque-item {
      background: white;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 5px;
    }
    .cheque-item-label {
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #856404;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .cheque-item-value {
      font-size: 8px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #1a1a1a;
    }
    .allocations-list {
      background: #e3f2fd;
      border-left: 4px solid #2196f3;
      padding: 6px;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .allocation-item {
      background: white;
      padding: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      border-radius: 5px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .allocation-item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .notes-box {
      background: #fff9e6;
      border-left: 4px solid #ff9800;
      padding: 6px;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .notes-title {
      color: #e65100;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .notes-text {
      font-size: 8px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: #333;
    }
    .footer {
      background: #ecf0f1;
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 9px;
      color: #7f8c8d;
      border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    }
    .signatures {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      padding: 30px 20px;
    }
    .sig-box {
      text-align: center;
      width: 140px;
    }
    .sig-line {
      border-top: 2px solid #95a5a6;
      margin-top: 35px;
      padding-top: 6px;
      font-size: 9px;
      color: #7f8c8d;
    }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; background: white; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="receipt-print minimal-receipt">
  <div class="no-print" style="position: fixed; top: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 1000;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: {{ settings.header_color or '#28a745' }}; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 25px; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer;">
      طباعة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="receipt">
    <div class="header">
      <div class="header-content">
        <div class="company-info-left">
          {% with logo_style='height: 40px; background: white; padding: 5px; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 8px;' %}{% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}{% endwith %}
          <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
          <div class="company-details">
            {{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address }}<br>
            📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone }} | 📧 {{ (settings.email if settings and settings.email else none) or tenant_email or company_email }}<br>
            {% if settings and settings.website and settings.website != 'None' %}🌐 {{ settings.website }}{% endif %}
            {% if print_branch %}
            <br>🏢 الفرع: {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}
            {% if print_branch.address %}<br>📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ print_branch.address }}{% endif %}
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="receipt-info-right">
          <div class="receipt-label">RECEIPT</div>
          <div class="receipt-number-large">{{ receipt.receipt_number }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '💵 سند قبض' %}
    {% set doc_number = doc_number or receipt.receipt_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <div class="content">
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-title">معلومات العميل</div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <label>الاسم:</label>
          <value>{{ receipt.customer.name }}</value>
        </div>
        {% if receipt.customer.phone %}
        <div class="info-row">
          <label>الهاتف:</label>
          <value>{{ receipt.customer.phone }}</value>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        <div class="info-row">
          <label>التاريخ:</label>
          <value>{{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') }}</value>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <label>المستخدم:</label>
          <value>{{ print_user_name or (receipt.user.full_name if receipt.user else 'النظام') }}</value>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="amount-display">
        <div class="amount-text">المبلغ المستلم</div>
        <div class="amount-big">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) }}</div>
        <div class="amount-text">{{ tenant_currency_name_ar or 'درهم إماراتي' }}</div>
      </div>

      <div class="payment-box">
        <div style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
          <span style="font-size: 8px; color: #7f8c8d;">طريقة الدفع:</span>
          <span class="payment-method-badge">
            {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cash' %}💵 نقدي
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'card' %}💳 بطاقة
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}🏦 تحويل
            {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' %}📝 شيك
            {% else %}💰 محفظة{% endif %}
          </span>
        </div>

        {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' and receipt.cheque_number %}
        <div class="cheque-card">
          <div style="text-align: center; color: #856404; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 8px;">
            معلومات الشيك
          </div>
          <div class="cheque-grid">
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <div class="cheque-item-label">رقم الشيك</div>
              <div class="cheque-item-value">{{ receipt.cheque_number }}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <div class="cheque-item-label">تاريخ الاستحقاق</div>
              <div class="cheque-item-value">{{ receipt.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if receipt.cheque_date else '-' }}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <div class="cheque-item-label">البنك</div>
              <div class="cheque-item-value">{{ receipt.bank_name or '-' }}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      {% set source_info = receipt.get_source_info() %}
      {% if source_info %}
      <div class="allocations-list">
        <div style="font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: #1565c0; margin-bottom: 8px;">
          📋 تفاصيل الفاتورة
        </div>
        <div class="allocation-item">
          <div>
            <strong>{{ source_info.number }}</strong>
            <span style="color: #999; margin: 0 5px;">•</span>
            <span style="color: #666;">{{ source_info.date }}</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #28a745;">
            {{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% if receipt.notes %}
      <div class="notes-box">
        <div class="notes-title">📝 ملاحظات وسبب الدفع</div>
        <div class="notes-text">{{ receipt.notes }}</div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}

      <div class="signatures">
        <div class="sig-box">
          <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #7f8c8d; margin-bottom: 5px;">المحصل</div>
          <div class="sig-line"></div>
        </div>
        <

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">

  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

      font-family: 'Tajawal', 'Arial', sans-serif;
      background: #95a5a6;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 9px;
      display: flex;

      align-items: flex-start;

    }
    @page {

      margin: 5mm;
    }
    .receipt {
      {% if settings.paper_size == 'A5' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '148mm' }};
      {% elif settings.paper_size == 'Letter' %}
        width: 212mm;
        height: {{ '279mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '216mm' }};
      {% else %}
        width: {{ '210mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '297mm' }};
        height: {{ '297mm' if settings.orientation == 'portrait' else '210mm' }};
      {% endif %}
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: auto;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .header {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 10px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .logo { height: 50px; background: white; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .company-name { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .company-info { font-size: 8px; opacity: 0.95; }
    .receipt-title {
      background: linear-gradient(to right, #d4edda 0%, #c3e6cb 100%);
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #28a745;
    }
    .receipt-title h2 { color: #28a745; font-size: 9px; margin: 0; }
    .receipt-number { color: #20c997; font-size: 9px; margin-top: 5px; font-weight: 700; }
    .content { padding: 10px; }
    .info-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;

      padding: 6px;

    }
    .info-box h3 { color: #28a745; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; }
    .info-box p { margin: 5px 0; font-size: 8px; }
    .amount-box {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 18px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }
    .amount-label { font-size: 9px; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9; }
    .amount-value { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; margin: 10px 0; }
    .payment-method {
      background: #d4edda;
      padding: 6px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      border-right: 4px solid #28a745;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .payment-method h4 { color: #28a745; font-size: 9px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .cheque-box {
      background: #fff3cd;
      border: 1px solid #ffc107;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 6px;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }
    .cheque-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .cheque-item label { 
      display: block; 
      font-size: 9px;

      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .cheque-item value { 
      display: block; 
      font-size: 9px; 
      font-weight: 700;

    }
    .allocations-section {
      background: #e7f3ff;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      border-right: 4px solid #007bff;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }
    .allocations-section h4 { 
      color: #007bff; 
      font-size: 9px; 
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .allocation-item {
      background: white;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      border-radius: 5px;
      border: 1px solid #b8daff;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 8px;
    }
    .notes-section {
      background: #fff3cd;
      border: 1px solid #ffc107;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 6px;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .notes-section h4 { 
      color: #856404; 
      font-size: 9px; 
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .notes-section p { font-size: 8px; line-height: 1.6; color: #1a1a1a; }
    .footer {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 10px;
      border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
    }
    .signature-section {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      margin-top: 20px;
      padding-top: 20px;
      border-top: 2px dashed #28a745;
    }
    .signature-box {
      text-align: center;
      width: 150px;
    }
    .signature-line {
      border-top: 2px solid #28a745;
      margin-top: 40px;
      padding-top: 8px;
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #666;
    }
    @media print {
      body { padding: 0; background: white; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
      .receipt { box-shadow: none; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="receipt-print modern-receipt">
  <div class="no-print" style="position: fixed; top: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 1000;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #28a745 0%, #20c997 100%); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);">
      🖨️ طباعة السند
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="receipt">
    <div class="header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
      <div class="company-info">
        <div>{{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address }}</div>
        <div>📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone }} {% if settings and settings.phone_2 and settings.phone_2 != 'None' %}| {{ settings.phone_2 }}{% endif %}</div>
        <div>📧 {{ (settings.email if settings and settings.email else none) or tenant_email or company_email }} {% if settings and settings.website and settings.website != 'None' %}| 🌐 {{ settings.website }}{% endif %}</div>
        {% if settings and settings.tax_number and settings.tax_number != 'None' %}<div style="margin-top: 3px;">الرقم الضريبي: {{ settings.tax_number }}</div>{% endif %}
        {% if print_branch %}
        <div>🏢 الفرع: {{ print_branch.name }}{% if print_branch.code %} ({{ print_branch.code }}){% endif %}</div>
        {% if print_branch.address %}
        <div>📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ print_branch.address }}</div>
        {% endif %}
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '💵 سند قبض' %}
    {% set doc_number = doc_number or receipt.receipt_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <div class="content">
      <div class="info-grid">
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>👤 بيانات العميل</h3>
          <p><strong>الاسم:</strong> {{ receipt.customer.name }}</p>
          {% if receipt.customer.phone %}<p><strong>الهاتف:</strong> {{ receipt.customer.phone }}</p>{% endif %}
          {% if receipt.customer.email %}<p><strong>البريد:</strong> {{ receipt.customer.email }}</p>{% endif %}
        </div>
        <div class="info-box">
          <h3>📅 بيانات السند</h3>
          <p><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</p>
          <p><strong>الوقت:</strong> {{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%H:%M') }}</p>
          <p><strong>المستخدم:</strong> {{ print_user_name or (receipt.user.full_name if receipt.user else 'النظام') }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="amount-box">
        <div class="amount-label">المبلغ المستلم</div>
        <div class="amount-value">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</div>
        {% if receipt.currency != tenant_default_currency %}
        <div style="font-size: 9px; margin-top: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">
          ({{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }})
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      <div class="payment-method">
        <h4>💳 طريقة الدفع</h4>
        <div style="font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; color: #155724;">
          {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cash' %}💵 نقدي
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'card' %}💳 بطاقة ائتمانية
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}🏦 تحويل بنكي
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' %}📝 شيك بنكي
          {% else %}💰 محفظة إلكترونية{% endif %}
        </div>
        
        {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' and receipt.cheque_number %}
        <div class="cheque-box">
          <div style="text-align: center; color: #856404; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 9px;">
            📝 معلومات الشيك
          </div>
          <div class="cheque-grid">
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <label>رقم الشيك</label>
              <value>{{ receipt.cheque_number }}</value>
            </div>
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <label>تاريخ الاستحقاق</label>
              <value>{{ receipt.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if receipt.cheque_date else '-' }}</value>
            </div>
            <div class="cheque-item">
              <label>البنك</label>
              <value>{{ receipt.bank_name or '-' }}</value>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {% elif receipt.reference_number %}
        <div style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 8px;">
          <strong>رقم المرجع:</strong> {{ receipt.reference_number }}
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      {% set source_info = receipt.get_source_info() %}
      {% if source_info %}
      <div class="allocations-section">
        <h4>📋 تفاصيل الفاتورة</h4>
        <div class="allocation-item">
          <div>
            <strong style="color: #007bff;">{{ source_info.number }}</strong>
            <span style="color: #666; margin: 0 5px;">|</span>
            <span style="font-size: 9px; color: #666;">{{ source_info.date }}</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #28a745;">
            {{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% if receipt.notes %}
      <div class="notes-section">
        <h4>📝 ملاحظات وسبب الدفع</h4>
        <p>{{ receipt.notes }}</p>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}

      <div class="signature-section">
        <div class="signature-box">
          <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #666;">المحصل</div>
          <div class="signature-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="signature-box">
          <div style="font-size: 9px; color: #666;">العميل</div>
          <div class="signature-line"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="footer">

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```

### File: templates\receipts\simple.html

Size: 10510 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:46:25

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>سند قبض - {{ receipt.receipt_number }}</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='css/accessibility.css') }}">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif;
      padding: 8px;
      font-size: 9px;
      background: white;
    }
    @page {
      size: {{ settings.paper_size if settings else 'A4' }} {{ settings.orientation if settings else 'portrait' }};
      margin: 2mm;
    }
    .receipt {
      max-width: 100%;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid #000;
      padding: 10px;
    }
    .header {
      text-align: center;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .logo { 
      height: 40px; 
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .company-name { 
      font-size: 9px; 
      font-weight: bold; 
      margin: 5px 0;
    }
    .branch-name {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: #555;
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .company-info { 
      font-size: 8px; 
      color: #555;
    }
    .title {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: bold;
      margin: 15px 0;
      background: #f0f0f0;
      padding: 10px;
      border: 1px solid #000;
    }
    .amount-box {
      background: #f9f9f9;
      border: 1px solid #000;
      padding: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }
    .amount-label {
      font-size: 9px;
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .amount-value {
      font-size: 36px;
      font-weight: bold;
      margin: 10px 0;
    }
    .info-table {
      width: 100%;
      margin: 15px 0;
    }
    .info-table td {
      padding: 8px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    }
    .info-table strong {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 120px;
    }
    .footer {
      margin-top: 20px;
      padding-top: 15px;
      border-top: 1px solid #000;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 8px;
      color: #555;
    }
    .bank-info {
      background: #f5f5f5;
      border: 1px solid #999;
      padding: 10px;
      margin: 10px 0;
      font-size: 9px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .signature {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      margin-top: 40px;
    }
    .sig-box {
      text-align: center;
      width: 150px;
    }
    .sig-line {
      border-top: 1px solid #000;
      margin-top: 40px;
      padding-top: 5px;
    }
    @media print {
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="receipt-print">
  <div class="no-print" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 10px;">
    <button onclick="window.print()" style="background: #000; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 20px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 3px;">
      طباعة
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="receipt">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="header">
      {% include 'partials/print_tenant_logo.html' %}
      <div class="company-name">{{ (settings.company_name_ar if settings and settings.company_name_ar else none) or tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }}</div>
      <div class="company-info">
        {{ (settings.address_ar if settings and settings.address_ar else none) or tenant_address or company_address or '—' }}<br>
        📞 {{ (settings.phone_1 if settings and settings.phone_1 else none) or tenant_phone or company_phone or '—' }}
        {% if settings and settings.email %} • 📧 {{ settings.email }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% if print_branch or receipt.branch %}
      {% set header_branch = print_branch or receipt.branch %}
      <div class="branch-name">فرع: {{ header_branch.name }}{% if header_branch.code %} ({{ header_branch.code }}){% endif %}</div>
      {% if header_branch.address %}
      <div class="company-info">📍 عنوان الفرع: {{ header_branch.address }}</div>
      {% endif %}
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    {% set doc_title = '💵 سند قبض' %}
    {% set doc_number = doc_number or receipt.receipt_number %}
    {% include 'partials/print_unified_banner.html' %}

    <!-- Receipt Number & Date -->
    <table class="info-table">
      <tr>
        <td><strong>رقم السند:</strong> {{ receipt.receipt_number }}</td>
        <td><strong>التاريخ:</strong> {{ receipt.receipt_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><strong>المستلم من:</strong> {{ receipt.customer.name if receipt.customer else receipt.customer_name }}</td>
        <td><strong>المستخدم:</strong> {{ print_user_name or (receipt.user.full_name if receipt.user else 'النظام') }}</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td colspan="2"><strong>طريقة الدفع:</strong> 
          {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cash' %}💵 نقدي
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'card' %}💳 بطاقة
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'bank_transfer' %}🏦 تحويل
          {% elif receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' %}📝 شيك
          {% else %}{{ receipt.payment_method }}{% endif %}
        </td>
      </tr>
      {% if receipt.payment_method == 'cheque' and receipt.cheque_number %}
      <tr>
        <td colspan="2">
          <strong>تفاصيل الشيك:</strong>
          رقم {{ receipt.cheque_number }} • 
          استحقاق {{ receipt.cheque_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if receipt.cheque_date else '-' }}
          {% if receipt.bank_name %} • بنك {{ receipt.bank_name }}{% endif %}
        </td>
      </tr>
      {% endif %}
    </table>

    <!-- Amount -->
    <div class="amount-box">
      <div class="amount-label">المبلغ المستلم</div>
      <div class="amount-value">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.base_amount) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}</div>
      <div style="font-size: 9px; margin-top: 5px;">
        {{ amount_in_words or '' }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Allocations -->
    {% set source_info = receipt.get_source_info() %}
    {% if source_info %}
    <div style="margin: 15px 0;">
      <strong style="font-size: 9px;">تفاصيل الفاتورة:</strong>
      <table style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 8px;">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>رقم الفاتورة</th>
            <th>التاريخ</th>
            <th>المبلغ</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>{{ source_info.number }}</td>
            <td>{{ source_info.date }}</td>
            <td><strong>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(receipt.amount) }} {{ receipt.currency }}</strong></td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    <!-- Notes -->
    {% if receipt.notes %}
    <div style="margin: 15px 0; padding: 10px; border: 1px dashed #999; background: #f9f9f9;">
      <strong>ملاحظات:</strong> {{ receipt.notes }}
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    {% include 'partials/print_unified_amount_qr.html' %}

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="footer">
      <!-- Bank Info -->
      {% if settings and ((settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None') or (settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None') or (settings.swift_code and settings.swift_code != 'None')) %}
      <div class="bank-info">
        <strong>للتحويل البنكي:</strong><br>
        {% if settings.bank_name and settings.bank_name != 'None' %}{{ settings.bank_name }}{% if settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None' %} • {% endif %}{% endif %}
        {% if settings.iban and settings.iban != 'None' %}IBAN: {{ settings.iban }}{% endif %}
        {% if settings.swift_code and settings.swift_code != 'None' %}<br>SWIFT: {{ settings.swift_code }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <!-- Business Registration -->
      {% if settings and ((settings.commercial_register and settings.commercial_register != 'None') or (settings.license_number and settings.license_number != 'None')) %}
      <div style="font-size: 8px; margin: 5px 0;">
        {% if settings.commercial_register and settings.commercial_register != 'None' %}س.ت: {{ settings.commercial_register }}{% endif %}
        {% if settings.commercial_register and settings.license_number %} | {% endif %}
        {% if settings.license_number and settings.license_number != 'None' %}رخصة: {{ settings.license_number }}{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <!-- Default Receipt Note -->
      {% if settings and settings.default_receipt_note_ar and settings.default_receipt_note_ar != 'None' %}
      <div style="margin: 10px 0; font-size: 8px; font-style: italic;">
        {{ settings.default_receipt_note_ar }}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
      
      <div style="margin-top: 10px;">شكراً لكم</div>
      
      <!-- Social Media -->
      {% if settings and (settings.facebook_url or settings.instagram_url or settings.whatsapp_number) %}
      <div style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 9px;">
        {% if settings.whatsapp_number %}<span>📱 {{ settings.whatsapp_number }}</span>{% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    <!-- Signature -->
    <div class="signature">
      <div class="sig-box">
        <div class="sig-line">المحصل</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sig-box">
        <div class="sig-line">العميل</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Watermark -->
    {% if settings and settings.enable_watermark %}
      {% if settings.watermark_image_path %}
        <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); opacity: 0.02; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none;">
          <img src="{{ url_for('static', filename=settings.watermark_image_path) }}" alt="Watermark" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
      {% elif settings.watermark_text %}
        <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-45deg); font-size: 100px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.02); font-weight: bold; z-index: -1;">
          {{ settings.watermark_text }}
        </div>
      {% endif %}
    {% endif %}
  </div>
</body>
</html>


```

### File: templates\reports\ar_reconciliation.html

Size: 3857 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:50:44

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - مطابقة الذمم{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}مطابقة الذمم — GL vs العمليات{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row mb-3">
  <div class="col-12">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-body py-2">
        <form method="get" class="form-inline">
          <label class="mr-2">الفرع:</label>
          <select name="branch_id" class="form-control mr-2" onchange="this.form.submit()">
            <option value="">-- الكل --</option>
            {% for branch in branches %}
            <option value="{{ branch.id }}" {% if selected_branch == branch.id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ branch.name }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
          </select>
          <a href="{{ url_for('reports.receivables') }}" class="btn btn-outline-secondary ml-auto">
            <i class="fas fa-user-clock mr-1"></i>تقرير أعمار الذمم
          </a>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
    <h3 class="card-title text-white mb-0">
      <i class="fas fa-balance-scale mr-2"></i>مطابقة الذمم (1130 + 3350 + 2115)
    </h3>
    {% if report.all_matched %}
    <span class="badge badge-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> متطابق</span>
    {% else %}
    <span class="badge badge-warning"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> فروقات</span>
    {% endif %}
  </div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <table class="table table-bordered table-striped mb-0">
      <thead class="thead-light">
        <tr>
          <th>كود الحساب</th>
          <th>الوصف</th>
          <th class="text-left">رصيد GL ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
          <th class="text-left">ذمم تشغيلية — فواتير غير مدفوعة ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
          <th class="text-left">الفرق (GL − تشغيلي)</th>
          <th class="text-center">الحالة</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for row in report.rows %}
        <tr>
          <td><code>{{ row.code }}</code></td>
          <td>{{ row.label }}</td>
          <td class="text-left">{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(row.gl_balance) }}</td>
          <td class="text-left">{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(row.ops_balance) }}</td>
          <td class="text-left {% if row.difference|abs > 1 %}text-danger font-weight-bold{% endif %}">
            {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(row.difference) }}
          </td>
          <td class="text-center">
            {% if row.matched %}
            <span class="badge badge-success">OK</span>
            {% else %}
            <span class="badge badge-warning">مراجعة</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
      <tfoot class="bg-light font-weight-bold">
        <tr>
          <td colspan="2">الإجمالي</td>
          <td class="text-left">{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(report.total_gl) }}</td>
          <td class="text-left">{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(report.total_ops) }}</td>
          <td class="text-left">{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(report.total_difference) }}</td>
          <td></td>
        </tr>
      </tfoot>
    </table>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer text-muted small">
    <strong>1130</strong> — عملاء عاديون &nbsp;|&nbsp;
    <strong>3350</strong> — شركاء &nbsp;|&nbsp;
    <strong>2115</strong> — تجار. الذمم التشغيلية = مجموع (إجمالي الفاتورة − المدفوع) للفواتير المؤكدة حسب نوع العميل.
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

```

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% block title %}{{ tenant_name_ar or company_name_ar or 'نظام المحاسبة' }} - التقارير والإحصائيات{% endblock %}
{% block page_title %}التقارير{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="row">
  <div class="col-12">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header bg-gradient-primary">
        <h3 class="card-title text-white">
          <i class="fas fa-chart-bar mr-2"></i>
          التقارير والإحصائيات
        </h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row">
          
          <!-- تقرير المبيعات -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="info-box bg-gradient-success">
              <span class="info-box-icon"><i class="fas fa-shopping-cart"></i></span>
              <div class="info-box-content">
                <span class="info-box-text">{{ t('Sales Report') }}</span>
                <span class="info-box-number">Sales Report</span>
                <a href="{{ url_for('reports.sales') }}" class="btn btn-light btn-sm mt-2 stretched-link">
                  عرض التقرير <i class="fas fa-arrow-left mr-1"></i>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- تقرير المخزون -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="info-box bg-gradient-warning">
              <span class="info-box-icon"><i class="fas fa-boxes"></i></span>
              <div class="info-box-content">
                <span class="info-box-text">{{ t('Inventory Report') }}</span>
                <span class="info-box-number">Inventory Report</span>
                <a href="{{ url_for('reports.inventory') }}" class="btn btn-light btn-sm mt-2 stretched-link">
                  عرض التقرير <i class="fas fa-arrow-left mr-1"></i>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- الذمم المدينة -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="info-box bg-gradient-danger">
              <span class="info-box-icon"><i class="fas fa-user-clock"></i></span>
              <div class="info-box-content">
                <span class="info-box-text">الذمم المدينة</span>
                <span class="info-box-number">Receivables</span>
                <a href="{{ url_for('reports.receivables') }}" class="btn btn-light btn-sm mt-2 stretched-link">
                  عرض التقرير <i class="fas fa-arrow-left mr-1"></i>
                </a>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="row mt-3">
          
          <!-- التقارير المالية -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card card-outline card-primary">
              <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-book mr-2"></i>التقارير المالية</h3>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body">
                <div class="list-group">
                  <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.trial_balance') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-balance-scale mr-2"></i>ميزان المراجعة
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.income_statement') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-chart-line mr-2"></i>قائمة الدخل
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('ledger.balance_sheet') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-invoice-dollar mr-2"></i>الميزانية العمومية
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('reports.ar_reconciliation') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-balance-scale-right mr-2"></i>مطابقة الذمم (1130/3350/2115)
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- تقارير العمليات -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card card-outline card-success">
              <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-clipboard-list mr-2"></i>تقارير العمليات</h3>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body">
                <div class="list-group">
                  <a href="{{ url_for('sales.index') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-invoice mr-2"></i>فواتير المبيعات
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('purchases.index') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-shopping-bag mr-2"></i>فواتير المشتريات
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('payments.receipts') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave mr-2"></i>المدفوعات
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- تقارير أخرى -->
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card card-outline card-info">
              <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title"><i class="fas fa-list mr-2"></i>تقارير أخرى</h3>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body">
                <div class="list-group">
                  <a href="{{ url_for('customers.index') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-users mr-2"></i>العملاء
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('products.index') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-cubes mr-2"></i>المنتجات
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('expenses.index') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-wallet mr-2"></i>المصروفات
                  </a>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('reports.partners') }}" class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
                    <i class="fas fa-handshake mr-2"></i>تقرير الشركاء والتجار
                  </a>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\reports\inventory.html

Size: 8187 bytes
Modified: 05/25/2026 11:44:28

```html
{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block title %}تقرير المخزون{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
  <div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header">
          <h3 class="card-title">
            <i class="fas fa-boxes"></i> تقرير المخزون
          </h3>
          <div class="card-tools">
            <form method="get" class="form-inline d-inline mr-2">
              <label class="mr-2">الفرع:</label>
              <select name="branch_id" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2" style="min-width: 140px;">
                <option value="">كل الفروع</option>
                {% for b in branches or [] %}
                <option value="{{ b.id }}" {{ 'selected' if selected_branch_id == b.id else '' }}>{{ b.name }} ({{ b.code }})</option>
                {% endfor %}
              </select>

              <label class="mr-2">المستودع:</label>
              <select name="warehouse_id" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2" style="min-width: 160px;">
                <option value="">كل المستودعات</option>
                {% for w in warehouses or [] %}
                <option value="{{ w.id }}" {{ 'selected' if selected_warehouse_id == w.id else '' }}>{{ w.name_ar or w.name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
              </select>

              <label class="mr-2">تاريخ الإدخال:</label>
              <input type="date" name="in_date_from" value="{{ in_date_from or '' }}" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2">
              <input type="date" name="in_date_to" value="{{ in_date_to or '' }}" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2">

              <label class="mr-2">تاريخ الإخراج:</label>
              <input type="date" name="out_date_from" value="{{ out_date_from or '' }}" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2">
              <input type="date" name="out_date_to" value="{{ out_date_to or '' }}" class="form-control form-control-sm mr-2">

              <div class="form-check mr-2">
                <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="includeZero" name="include_zero" value="1" {{ 'checked' if include_zero else '' }}>
                <label class="form-check-label" for="includeZero">عرض الصفر</label>
              </div>

              {% if category_id %}<input type="hidden" name="category" value="{{ category_id }}">{% endif %}
              <button type="submit" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mr-2">
                تطبيق
              </button>

              <div class="btn-group mr-2">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm dropdown-toggle" data-toggle="dropdown">
                  تصدير
                </button>
                <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-right">
                  <a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ url_for('reports.inventory_export', branch_id=selected_branch_id, warehouse_id=selected_warehouse_id, category=category_id, include_zero=('1' if include_zero else ''), in_date_from=in_date_from, in_date_to=in_date_to, out_date_from=out_date_from, out_date_to=out_date_to, format='csv') }}">CSV</a>
                  <a class="dropdown-item" href="{{ url_for('reports.inventory_export', branch_id=selected_branch_id, warehouse_id=selected_warehouse_id, category=category_id, include_zero=('1' if include_zero else ''), in_date_from=in_date_from, in_date_to=in_date_to, out_date_from=out_date_from, out_date_to=out_date_to, format='xlsx') }}">Excel</a>
                </div>
              </div>
            </form>
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-primary">
              <i class="fas fa-print"></i> طباعة
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <!-- إحصائيات سريعة -->
          {% if stats %}
          <div class="row mb-4">
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <div class="info-box">
                <span class="info-box-icon bg-info"><i class="fas fa-boxes"></i></span>
                <div class="info-box-content">
                  <span class="info-box-text">إجمالي المنتجات</span>
                  <span class="info-box-number">{{ stats.total_products }}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <div class="info-box">
                <span class="info-box-icon bg-success"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></span>
                <div class="info-box-content">
                  <span class="info-box-text">متوفر</span>
                  <span class="info-box-number">{{ stats.in_stock }}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <div class="info-box">
                <span class="info-box-icon bg-warning"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i></span>
                <div class="info-box-content">
                  <span class="info-box-text">ناقص</span>
                  <span class="info-box-number">{{ stats.low_stock }}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-3">
              <div class="info-box">
                <span class="info-box-icon bg-danger"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></span>
                <div class="info-box-content">
                  <span class="info-box-text">نفذ</span>
                  <span class="info-box-number">{{ stats.out_of_stock }}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          {% endif %}

          <!-- جدول المخزون -->
          <table class="table table-bordered table-striped">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>المنتج</th>
                <th>الكود</th>
                <th>الكمية المتاحة</th>
                <th>إدخال (حسب التاريخ)</th>
                <th>إخراج (حسب التاريخ)</th>
                <th>مباع (حسب التاريخ)</th>
                <th>الحد الأدنى</th>
                <th>سعر التكلفة</th>
                <th>سعر البيع</th>
                <th>القيمة الإجمالية</th>
                <th>الحالة</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {% for product in products %}
              {% set qty = (stock_map.get(product.id, 0) if stock_map is not none else (product.current_stock or 0)) %}
              {% set in_qty = (in_map.get(product.id, 0) if in_map is not none else 0) %}
              {% set out_qty = (out_map.get(product.id, 0) if out_map is not none else 0) %}
              {% set sold_qty = (sold_map.get(product.id, 0) if sold_map is not none else 0) %}
              <tr>
                <td>{{ product.name }}</td>
                <td>{{ product.sku }}</td>
                <td>{{ qty }}</td>
                <td>{{ in_qty }}</td>
                <td>{{ out_qty }}</td>
                <td>{{ sold_qty }}</td>
                <td>{{ product.min_stock_alert }}</td>
                <td>{{ product.cost_price }}</td>
                <td>{{ product.regular_price }}</td>
                <td>{{ (qty * (product.cost_price or 0))|round(2) }}</td>
                <td>
                  {% if qty == 0 %}
                    <span class="badge badge-danger">نفذ</span>
                  {% elif qty <= (product.min_stock_alert or 0) %}
                    <span class="badge badge-warning">ناقص</span>
                  {% else %}
                    <span class="badge badge-success">متوفر</span>
                  {% endif %}
                </td>
              </tr>
              {% else %}
              <tr>
                <td colspan="11" class="text-center">لا توجد منتجات</td>
              </tr>
              {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}


```

### File: templates\reports\partials\entity_report.html

Size: 7574 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:43:57

```html
{% if error %}
<div class="alert alert-danger">{{ error }}</div>
{% else %}
<div class="card shadow mb-4">
    <div class="card-header py-3 d-flex flex-row align-items-center justify-content-between bg-primary text-white">
        <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold">
            <i class="fas fa-user-circle fa-lg ml-2"></i>
            {{ entity.name }}
            <span class="badge badge-light text-primary ml-2">{{ type_label }}</span>
        </h6>
        <div class="text-white">
            <span class="ml-3"><i class="fas fa-phone ml-1"></i> {{ entity.phone or '---' }}</span>
            <span class="font-weight-bold ml-3">
                الرصيد: {{ "{:,.2f}".format(balance) }} {{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }}
                <small>({{ balance_label }})</small>
            </span>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <!-- Tabs -->
        <ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="entityReportTabs" role="tablist">
            <li class="nav-item">
                <a class="nav-link active" id="products-tab" data-toggle="tab" href="#products" role="tab" aria-controls="products" aria-selected="true">
                    <i class="fas fa-box-open text-info"></i> المنتجات
                </a>
            </li>
            <li class="nav-item">
                <a class="nav-link" id="invoices-tab" data-toggle="tab" href="#invoices" role="tab" aria-controls="invoices" aria-selected="false">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-invoice text-warning"></i> الفواتير
                </a>
            </li>
            <li class="nav-item">
                <a class="nav-link" id="payments-tab" data-toggle="tab" href="#payments" role="tab" aria-controls="payments" aria-selected="false">
                    <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave text-success"></i> الدفعات والقبض
                </a>
            </li>
        </ul>

        <div class="tab-content pt-3" id="entityReportTabsContent">
            
            <!-- Products Tab -->
            <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="products" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="products-tab">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-bordered table-sm table-hover">
                        <thead class="thead-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>المنتج</th>
                                <th>الكمية</th>
                                <th>المجموع ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
                                <th>آخر حركة</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for prod in products %}
                            <tr>
                                <td>{{ prod.name }}</td>
                                <td>{{ prod.quantity }}</td>
                                <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(prod.total) }}</td>
                                <td>{{ prod.last_date }}</td>
                            </tr>
                            {% else %}
                            <tr><td colspan="4" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد منتجات</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Invoices/Bills Tab -->
            <div class="tab-pane fade" id="invoices" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="invoices-tab">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-bordered table-sm table-hover">
                        <thead class="thead-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>رقم الفاتورة</th>
                                <th>التاريخ</th>
                                <th>الحالة</th>
                                <th>المبلغ ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
                                <th>المدفوع</th>
                                <th>المتبقي</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for inv in invoices %}
                            <tr>
                                <td>{{ inv.number }}</td>
                                <td>{{ inv.date }}</td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="badge badge-{{ 'success' if inv.status == 'confirmed' else 'secondary' }}">
                                        {{ inv.status }}
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(inv.amount) }}</td>
                                <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(inv.paid) }}</td>
                                <td class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(inv.balance) }}</td>
                            </tr>
                            {% else %}
                            <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد فواتير</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Payments Tab -->
            <div class="tab-pane fade" id="payments" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="payments-tab">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-bordered table-sm table-hover">
                        <thead class="thead-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th>رقم السند</th>
                                <th>النوع</th>
                                <th>التاريخ</th>
                                <th>المبلغ ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
                                <th>طريقة الدفع</th>
                                <th>البيان</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for trans in transactions %}
                            <tr>
                                <td>{{ trans.number }}</td>
                                <td>
                                    {% if trans.type == 'in' %}
                                    <span class="badge badge-success"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i> قبض</span>
                                    {% else %}
                                    <span class="badge badge-danger"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i> صرف</span>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                                <td>{{ trans.date }}</td>
                                <td class="font-weight-bold">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(trans.amount) }}</td>
                                <td>{{ trans.method }}</td>
                                <td>{{ trans.notes }}</td>
                            </tr>
                            {% else %}
                            <tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted">لا توجد حركات مالية</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

```

### File: templates\reports\partners.html

Size: 25464 bytes
Modified: 06/03/2026 15:39:19

```html
{% extends "base.html" %}

{% block title %}تقرير الشركاء والتجار{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container-fluid">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h1 class="h3 mb-0 text-gray-800">
            <i class="fas fa-handshake fa-fw me-2 text-primary"></i>تقرير الشركاء والتجار
        </h1>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-print me-1"></i> طباعة
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Search Card for Detailed Report -->
    <div class="card shadow mb-4 border-bottom-primary">
        <div class="card-header py-3 bg-gradient-dark text-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
            <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold"><i class="fas fa-search me-2"></i>بحث تفصيلي (Statement of Account)</h6>
            <small class="text-white-50">بحث عن مورد، زبون، شريك، أو تاجر</small>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <div class="row g-3 align-items-center">
                <div class="col-md-3">
                    <label class="form-label fw-bold">نوع الحساب</label>
                    <select class="form-control" id="searchType">
                        <option value="supplier">مورد (Supplier)</option>
                        <option value="customer">زبون (Customer)</option>
                        <option value="partner">شريك (Partner)</option>
                        <option value="merchant">تاجر (Merchant)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-9 position-relative">
                    <label class="form-label fw-bold">بحث بالاسم أو الهاتف</label>
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <span class="input-group-text"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></span>
                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="searchInput" placeholder="ابدأ بالكتابة للبحث..." autocomplete="off">
                    </div>
                    <div id="searchResults" class="list-group position-absolute w-100 shadow mt-1" style="z-index: 1000; display: none; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div id="entityDetailsContainer" class="mt-4">
                <!-- Details will be loaded here -->
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- فلتر التاريخ -->
    <div class="card shadow mb-4">
        <div class="card-header py-3">
            <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold text-primary">تصفية التقرير</h6>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            <form method="get" class="row g-3 align-items-end">
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <label class="form-label">من تاريخ</label>
                    <input type="date" name="date_from" class="form-control" value="{{ request.args.get('date_from', '') }}">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <label class="form-label">إلى تاريخ</label>
                    <input type="date" name="date_to" class="form-control" value="{{ request.args.get('date_to', '') }}">
                </div>
                <div class="col-md-4">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                        <i class="fas fa-filter me-1"></i> عرض النتائج
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- تبويبات التقرير -->
    <ul class="nav nav-tabs mb-4" id="reportTabs" role="tablist">
        <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
            <button class="nav-link active" id="partners-tab" data-toggle="tab" data-target="#partners" type="button" role="tab">
                <i class="fas fa-users me-2"></i>حصص الشركاء (Partners)
            </button>
        </li>
        <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
            <button class="nav-link" id="merchants-tab" data-toggle="tab" data-target="#merchants" type="button" role="tab">
                <i class="fas fa-store me-2"></i>منتجات التجار (Merchants)
            </button>
        </li>
        <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
            <button class="nav-link" id="suppliers-tab" data-toggle="tab" data-target="#suppliers" type="button" role="tab">
                <i class="fas fa-truck me-2"></i>الموردين (Suppliers)
            </button>
        </li>
    </ul>

    <div class="tab-content" id="reportTabsContent">
        <!-- جدول الشركاء -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="partners" role="tabpanel">
            
            <!-- ملخص الشركاء المالي -->
            <div class="card shadow mb-4">
                <div class="card-header py-3 bg-gradient-info text-white">
                    <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice-dollar me-2"></i>الملخص المالي للشركاء</h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered table-hover text-center">
                            <thead class="table-secondary">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>الشريك</th>
                                    <th>إجمالي الحصص المستحقة (Revenue)</th>
                                    <th>مقبوضات من الشريك (Received)</th>
                                    <th>مدفوعات للشريك (Paid To)</th>
                                    <th>صافي الرصيد (Net Balance)</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {% for partner in partners_summary %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="fw-bold">{{ partner.name }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.total_share) }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-primary">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.received_from) }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.paid_to) }}</td>
                                    <td class="fw-bold {% if partner.net_balance >= 0 %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}" style="font-size: 1.1em;">
                                        {{ "{:,.2f}".format(partner.net_balance) }}
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                {% else %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="5" class="text-muted">لا توجد حركات مالية للشركاء في الفترة المحددة</td>
                                </tr>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <small class="text-muted">* صافي الرصيد = (الحصص المستحقة + المقبوضات) - المدفوعات</small>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="card shadow mb-4">
                <div class="card-header py-3 bg-gradient-primary text-white">
                    <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold">تفاصيل حصص الشركاء من المبيعات (حسب المنتج)</h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered table-striped" width="100%" cellspacing="0">
                            <thead class="table-dark">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>المنتج</th>
                                    <th>الشريك</th>
                                    <th>نسبة الشراكة</th>
                                    <th>سعر الوحدة (Avg)</th>
                                    <th>الكمية المباعة</th>
                                    <th>إجمالي المبيعات ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
                                    <th>حصة الشريك المستحقة ({{ tenant_currency_symbol or 'AED' }})</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {% for item in partners_data %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="fw-bold">{{ item.product_name }}</td>
                                    <td>{{ item.partner_name }}</td>
                                    <td><span class="badge bg-info">{{ item.percentage }}%</span></td>
                                    <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.avg_unit_price) }}</td>
                                    <td>{{ item.total_qty }}</td>
                                    <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.total_revenue) }}</td>
                                    <td class="table-success fw-bold text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.partner_share_amount) }}</td>
                                </tr>
                                {% else %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="7" class="text-center py-4 text-muted">لا توجد مبيعات لمنتجات مشتركة في الفترة المحددة</td>
                                </tr>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </tbody>
                            {% if partners_data %}
                            <tfoot class="table-light fw-bold">
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="5" class="text-end">الإجمالي الكلي:</td>
                                    <td>{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partners_data|sum(attribute='total_revenue')) }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(partners_data|sum(attribute='partner_share_amount')) }}</td>
                                </tr>
                            </tfoot>
                            {% endif %}
                        </table>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- جدول التجار -->
        <div class="tab-pane fade" id="merchants" role="tabpanel">
            
            <!-- ملخص التجار المالي -->
            <div class="card shadow mb-4">
                <div class="card-header py-3 bg-gradient-info text-white">
                    <h6 class="m-0 font-weight-bold"><i class="fas fa-file-invoice-dollar me-2"></i>الملخص المالي للتجار</h6>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <div class="table-responsive">
                        <table class="table table-bordered table-hover text-center">
                            <thead class="table-secondary">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>التاجر</th>
                                    <th>إجمالي المستحقات من المبيعات (Revenue)</th>
                                    <th>مقبوضات من التاجر (Received)</th>
                                    <th>مدفوعات للتاجر (Paid To)</th>
                                    <th>صافي الرصيد (Net Balance)</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {% for merchant in merchants_summary %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td class="fw-bold">{{ merchant.name }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-success">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(merchant.total_share) }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-primary">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(merchant.received_from) }}</td>
                                    <td class="text-danger">{{ "{:,.2f}".format(merchant.paid_to) }}</td>
                                    <td class="fw-bold {% if me

[TRUNCATED: file is longer than 12000 chars]
```
